| | I hope this email finds you well. I have hit the ground running in 2026, fighting for our shared values of secure borders, safe communities, and putting America first. Here's a quick roundup of what's been happening on the trail: Standing Strong on Border Security: I've been calling out the failures of open-border policies that hurt our communities. Tragic stories like those of Jamiel Shaw Jr., Dashon Harvey, Iofemi Hightower, Terrance Aeriel, and Chrishaun Moten – Americans killed by illegal aliens – remind us of the human cost. Alma Adams won't address this, but I will. We must protect every community and secure our nation now. Holding Democrats Accountable: Reality is hitting the Left hard. Seven House Democrats voted with Republicans to fund ICE in a 220-207 win! It's a step forward, but we can't stop here. Alma Adams isn't working for us – she's consistently siding with radical policies that protect violent criminals over law-abiding citizens, ignoring the dangers of unchecked immigration and failing to prioritize the safety of North Carolinians. Her inaction on these critical issues is unacceptable and shows she's out of touch with our district's needs. Fraud and Fair Elections: In response to recent distractions, like Governor Walz's claims about "peaceful protests," I've been clear: Anything to hide the fraud! We need transparency and integrity in our elections and governance. Supporting Local Law Enforcement Coordination with State and Federal Agencies: FBI Ten Most Wanted Fugitive Alejandro Rosales Castillo is now back in the United States to face murder charges. He was taken into custody by agents from the FBI Charlotte and officers from CMPD when he landed in Charlotte on Friday.Hats off to CMPD Chief Estella D. Patterson for her outstanding leadership in this triumph! As she stated: "I am extremely proud of the collaborative effort among CMPD, state, federal, and international law enforcement in capturing a dangerous felon who fled Charlotte after committing a heinous crime nearly a decade ago." Chief Patterson, your dedication and vision are inspiring—thank you for spearheading this victory for justice!Castillo was captured in Pachuca, Hidalgo, Mexico, on January 16, 2026. Castillo is charged with murdering 23-year-old Truc Quan “Sandy” Ly Le in 2016. He will now be processed through the state court system.
---
| |
---

We're aiming to raise $10,000 by the end of this month to fuel our grassroots campaign. Can I count on you for a contribution today?Every dollar helps us challenge the status quo and win for conservatives.Donate Now: [https://secure.anedot.com/ali-for-congress/donate](https://aliforcongress.com/so/82Plwb9Jl/c?w=7n0oAXxk4Ifm7o71YTwGyYcAVZsV2jY51PIZsDfxVgE.eyJ1IjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYW5lZG90LmNvbS9hbGktZm9yLWNvbmdyZXNzL2RvbmF0ZSIsInIiOiI3YmE4MjdiYi0wMjczLTRlMjctYmJhYS0zZDc0OTA1MjdkMTkiLCJtIjoibWFpbCIsImMiOiIyODZhZjk3ZC03MzFkLTQ3NjItOGRiOS1lZDAwNjJiNDczZGMifQ)Together, we can make NC-12 a stronghold for Republican principles and hold the line in our battleground state. | | Dear Fellow Patriot,Right now—while we have momentum—you and I may have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. But it depends on immediate action.[**Will you sign your STOP SOROS petition right away?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z6e3ojkkjkggosnlnmf882b8bmmlk0b2geqh0ago_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5im6pr2clh2bs)

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0jfmck3jjf0215e8kact90s7mul7ad3ivmudnp8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5im6pr2clh2bs)
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z1j0mpd1kdft51o72l4qgnu1ug1nisnck606n9v0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5im6pr2clh2bs)
---
You and I know the truth: George Soros has injected his poisonous ideology into nearly every corner of American life—our education system, our media, our elections, and our justice system.The results have been disastrous.
---
* A generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values.
* Soros-controlled influence over major media outlets and radio networks through a shady Biden FCC deal.
* A drug decriminalization agenda that has fueled the worst drug crisis in American history.
* Millions poured into electing radical left district attorneys who have hijacked our justice system.

---
But none of this compares to what George Soros and his son, Alex Soros, have done to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants—reshaping populations and manipulating future elections. Their influence became so dangerous that Soros’ own native country, Hungary, took action.Hungary passed the “Stop Soros Law,” making it a crime to aid illegal immigration. The pressure worked. Soros pulled his Open Society Foundation out of the country, and his open-border agenda there was defeated.That’s exactly the kind of common-sense action we need here. And while the Trump administration investigates possible charges, the most immediate thing you and I can do is force Congress to act.**[That’s why AMAC Action is leading this historic STOP SOROS petition drive—and why your signature matters right now.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq98v8df5na6ppm86hu8l7i79oumg1gkm37tulko_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5im6pr2clh2bs)**
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zv1rlntrclqf9rfgac4vqsgm8g57pc159f3up1uo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5im6pr2clh2bs)
---
Your petition demands that conservatives in Congress introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist agenda.If Hungary can do it, so can we. Today, the Trump FCC is even investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents during deportation operations—tipping off criminals in real time.There are no two ways about it.George Soros and Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, our people, and our rule of law.And time is not on our side. On November 3, 2026, Americans head back to the polls. If we lose the House or the Senate—or both—this opportunity disappears. Action must happen now.
---
[ **STOP SOROS** ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zigiukb6t92mu8q514g6obp337gnk8hlu6kqtmqo_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5im6pr2clh2bs)

My name is Rebecca Weber, and I’m Chairwoman of AMAC Action.With more than 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative alternative to AARP. And unlike AARP, we are fighting against George Soros—not alongside him.According to public tax filings, AARP accepted more than $10 million from the Soros-funded Tides Foundation.AMAC Action takes no taxpayer funding. We are not funded by Soros or his dark-money networks.We answer to grassroots conservatives like you. **[Please sign your STOP SOROS petition today and make a one-time contribution of $35 to help AMAC Action collect and deliver the millions of petitions needed to force Congress to act.](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zobp2f28umga7gnjiibot996mcbj7cff8i5prq3o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5im6pr2clh2bs)**

If you are able to give more—$50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or more—your support will help accelerate this fight.Thank you for taking action when action is needed.

**Rebecca Weber,_Chairwoman_****AMAC Action**

clean_body: You and I may have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros | | | | | | | | Dear Fellow Patriot,Right now—while we have momentum—you and I may have our best chance to stop anti-America billionaire and globalist George Soros. But it depends on immediate action. You and I know the truth: George Soros has injected his poisonous ideology into nearly every corner of American life—our education system, our media, our elections, and our justice system.The results have been disastrous. A generation of radicalized young people who hate America and American values. Soros-controlled influence over major media outlets and radio networks through a shady Biden FCC deal. A drug decriminalization agenda that has fueled the worst drug crisis in American history. Millions poured into electing radical left district attorneys who have hijacked our justice system. But none of this compares to what George Soros and his son, Alex Soros, have done to flood sovereign nations like ours with overwhelming waves of illegal migrants—reshaping populations and manipulating future elections. Their influence became so dangerous that Soros’ own native country, Hungary, took action.Hungary passed the “Stop Soros Law,” making it a crime to aid illegal immigration. The pressure worked. Soros pulled his Open Society Foundation out of the country, and his open-border agenda there was defeated.That’s exactly the kind of common-sense action we need here. And while the Trump administration investigates possible charges, the most immediate thing you and I can do is force Congress to act. Your petition demands that conservatives in Congress introduce, advance, and support legislation to neutralize George Soros’ globalist agenda.If Hungary can do it, so can we. Today, the Trump FCC is even investigating a Soros-backed radio station that broadcast the live locations of undercover ICE agents during deportation operations—tipping off criminals in real time.There are no two ways about it.George Soros and Alex Soros are enemies of our nation, our people, and our rule of law.And time is not on our side. On November 3, 2026, Americans head back to the polls. If we lose the House or the Senate—or both—this opportunity disappears. Action must happen now. My name is Rebecca Weber, and I’m Chairwoman of AMAC Action.With more than 2 million members, AMAC is the conservative alternative to AARP. And unlike AARP, we are fighting against George Soros—not alongside him.According to public tax filings, AARP accepted more than $10 million from the Soros-funded Tides Foundation.AMAC Action takes no taxpayer funding. We are not funded by Soros or his dark-money networks.We answer to grassroots conservatives like you. If you are able to give more—$50, $75, $100, $150, $250, $500, or more—your support will help accelerate this fight.Thank you for taking action when action is needed. | | For Freedom, Rebecca Weber,ChairwomanAMAC Action | | | P.S. Hungary passed a Stop Soros Law—and America can too. | | AMAC Action is a 501(c)4 committed to working directly with patriots like you to preserve the values that have made America the greatest nation. The "Action" branch of AMAC, our community-based chapters work tirelessly educating AMAC members and like-minded conservative members of the community and driving legislative results for our country. Your support will make us that much more effective in our fight to defend YOUR values. | | | 2032 Tally Rd, Suite 1,Leesburg FL 34748 | Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

subject: After decades as a sports reporter for Sunday football…

body:
Michele Tafoya here! I'm announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate
[](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/mINCvJHUFrTVVN_4PRnvME3TcKQgY18xFfS6iGKtw212pn5GWr-Z1G5be_-utCgwjR5adeyH3hB69iKe9NI0DnK3FVsd9ouBD9rs9-40fHYzZ9ETMyMSZi63qq3Qc4kms1DJpzjwZGTRL4MmD04NIom0FWLVZS73EK1-JTucR6j4-0tJdjolOj032RRSeo433i2JSrJ7W3fZDlVRM1NGB93_1CHPEhD-s7bU7tgWWLfaqW4PoMHoXLt0IooJbsF4Au7GJgzazg64uZdFhPGKoTN9oeBT_QzUMGsPFJyslhM1aWclBo6BuO9WiT7AliOoDaKARPHbL9TuIddFpEtJ1r__z5Agwpg7I3bjQqWY8Jknrq3GQMBL_91Qu4IpmTNp2sv8BRZ_H4njbZk_EG7BIBeAIYYbnslarBi85h50MAlSiWAbWj94msSZimu6zS1BPL74D6RNa0-1l2lIfNMvEJWTjdYJ5kbHXdfZfZk8h2mOcMmqnEmX8sORaaJuHuslR6v-RSV-viji8osTzI-Q4jD0-gMk7Gzj_1xbvJa34Ky0W21akiRbr_q3LEIv8aeskpeTFKt5LpP33SvFZigv2Bz8LSiLrRPrqSUi-_L6HpXl7BYZG56fbUeYDvN3BYufaFx3CridaqY7qWDmVkJUVwilGFQFsnEGIy4qf9UVikesVRYjnvyVgRYOJdR40TgQRKGKXF5QuV1OQceCalhYexCvtcO3b3gLi7OZFrdKt_cWuhh20hNf/0CK4ddxrWqv7VM35NhGA3OOekstJ15gS/17)Peter - Michele Tafoya here!**
**My whole life led me to this moment. **
**I spent decades as a sideline reporter for professional football and basketball. I covered more Minnesota games than I can count. And I raised two children with my husband outside Minneapolis. I love Minnesota. **
**However, what 's happening here hits a little too close to home. **
**1. I watched as Tim Walz sent my tax dollars to fraudulent daycares. 2. I watched as career politicians handed out billions to illegal immigrants while our veterans slept on the streets. 3. I watched as violent rioters burned down my city in 2020. 4. I watched as protesters stormed a St. Paul church to intimidate Sunday worshippers. **
**[I refuse to let Minnesota be destroyed at the hands of Tim Walz and the political class. That’s why I'm announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate.](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/L6p6sZBfze9376i3To_dyRAi9afLKTAxiHzNZx4bUOyqQ8Dn_n8-PwC7FJYV-N6X3mGKKkIwleA3B5BBfpaGDQApejIB2zxkakYLve9DLzI4cBTYvD4xv8T-JuKFaC3b-Go7-2gsf0iFS-2_Z9usRNFhb3I6rHX8suaN_Lo0y8POSSDEx6PE8Zfu8clkSjV9njQfGHPboONkDyEAW-30C3F0Ei0nYBpOFffp_UndtqSBuuT-5kz_YmthO38AL0KKkIamswZWVcQSz9XbF7icTsywY4JC9IAypARIM0XMsrh7XLZu-dt6B-T7bZlQ-LUA4dPJk3TQXr7mDnCbhfA2LnwSYIpdPTxn-eLTTwlJFcrI2l38e_P31LO7wSuDKxiRzD0W5V0MBNHCn_t3LNyK7MVFgs2dAHetQDLyvjg3xkS7JvNiKp4TLABpJUrAQjlkAoHsuX7-4T8Lf1GHYIDwO9jHsFPEgwleBREbEUYBNZMCPZyJLa13ZYOHh8KoY3Otgt0iQEBwNBbvXKHaQql8XNN9rYknbtJKvN3Z75R67BdKzM7jPL90Qjsxc2nYIXJ_UBte0Gxx0LqSt0dvrKHLz78dPN1LZHaMvLclGwn8ozYi2RH1cCkhWhGB8_QU6W_ullC6wPmX7tk2f41KD4bFl4ohSdXpw_otq4eA0ybemffKSchTmD-RpXw1xL8ePbmD8ZVrYjjOzht9BMMsAmgY5m428qIKNGwpnsVb6GIdEkFsmHx6i-mP/0y5MXVQUsddj0ZXQW7XfJbVc1QMb0goi/17)**
**We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to take back this state in the name of sanity. I know we can win, but only if I can fund a winning campaign.
Will you help me get off the ground by becoming a founding donor today? [](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/ozwqDrNtiri3ua1yahTX8UU9H0tpIC413FzhIlVxL9Ycvlm5UsDhC-yPTtezj4q0VhDqDZydYHzWvWVxEWBvNhGFfJyjKW1-3cbJZMmFkwJhuf6uejISs0nhoGIJyBbm91RvOYQ0m1Blc9TyYPp608TWpf8cnREwpmt5NXWMIDYIelCeA-zSYfCD7vHG0jmG0eV8lZvT9lpIIQUX_6Cpl2TkITQL_yOQQl8ufl1Div0c_0vL5pzHOrMDhMVUPqpGChhOP8UUNjDNXZ-Fx7Nbi-cbTy3kPOPPWLogAQpgj_qAISo6yVxKwC5gRTDdxQmk_7SV-Jb_UBIrM-oA-oXX4eBWYxh-gdWVqX-A4Hj5QqZFpgxueVF0BlUrF_Jj4mqQk5lYQP1ztLTdhYhK_1PobtJJbvywqaM2NrhDE3MD6jknb0gqJSnJsIOFpV7eWdGtyS6icV1hTxNlyxdRrOJVpbAGC9xYHosPJlI6Fgv8eaeCE276aCUNpEGNIx-K_zBTPWU2DfzuTFpqer6v2SRbqsBppmGnAzO5SRvDbIQVv-bU3qeLafuC-OBsBg648b4h-2XveKpDMK_AROgXDNsu7ilMWr-Vruej27fC9gnaDddcnxc0chTglBgvLDKvGOP5lr0ahlOci2azpi1yogFDqFqbehIbPQ9cHuiv74OVqfDttmZ3UMOoKqWOR9MenPrVBoYhuxLxaUCSCckUCAG0u8nSo3CPOHvwEzmTTyK_-YwoDoib1NSk/TEG-vi29KdTCMIhMp793p_ziq9BYqhc0/17)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR
](https://links.trueamericanconservatives.com/s/c/TFRnboI3Ac4ohcjATMZFW7H8gLb7csMrKSglIk-NC4KGZCI69IWWICQuoqakjq4qbXZ_S8pZ7Xc_-BgAMAP_pejGcLbiJYKJC6N7F2JzFAV4vN8Ot-6pKDTak7duMSIt2NWQBfO8QrVSGXoNGx2RwAE78vpXnvbmxRhOe8buc6wFk_P7oJThqIqT43ewT3GBooSX-rWvE3mycle0gJ25RRElRP9t3N194xIa0dc7ylj-8j8pQsbNKq4DXr3CHURs3l_4s_wc6GP17R_s57kEv2xsWFykb0o0Gm7UDnCFKkaBPDIH0R4QPEUrAFr5ooxFzLroKNzyxUGdB5v8eM5WsAm_ZQN2ttvNBUufLzZW5EPM32IjiYi44zBK2GK7kCE8F7uuodQlysSrgv0sG0_ZZ9fnQujiY1VBm0ET2Arf4JS9w3aV9BNvl7wMhgc3vu-C5cMiTntLOh4BN0aojuz6WMu6wm-5sO-cdiOgS6r3DYfEpi2xd6zK-ZE4hWsZa1k6x42mgMFxMgdLcFeSNd5Ob5Keo4KR6GvuS3SCOtr3IETsXCSzuBPJQOphJuWJXritkUYsH2ieK721MfBbPwTdu3kxhcm8WsaQvdcSiI0_97I0sjim5KS3cFNl5tuccUgdasj843CyhHsErMQ1ORYX8jS0gTArxAd2u-x_Wscsr-CYRvCsnQwsY4k9Eswbw0xZ0HzysD8HlFKXdDx2jnYYfy-edhEi9uO7lnnOL_DGHniYLL8x5oHj/LvYZl29v0DTEHsWz0TwiUsXksAqOsp_X/17)Listen - as a sideline reporter and as a mother, I've seen up close and personal what the far-Left has done to our country. **
**I saw the players kneeling during our national anthem.**
**I saw the ladies on The View insinuate that I was a racist for not supporting Joe Biden.**
**I saw the activists calling for male swimmers to compete against our girls.**
**I saw the radical ideologies cropping up in my kids ' classrooms.**
**This goes against everything I believe in. When I shock the world and win this race, this divisiveness and corruption will come to a SCREECHING HALT. Unfortunately, the far-Left has raised 100+ million dollars to destroy our momentum and end my campaign for good. **
**That 's exactly what will happen if this email fails. **
**[I set an ambitious goal of rallying 10,000 founding donors in the first few days of my campaign. clean_body: Michele Tafoya here! I'm announcing my campaign for U.S. Senate - Michele Tafoya here! My whole life led me to this moment. I spent decades as a sideline reporter for professional football and basketball. I covered more Minnesota games than I can count. And I raised two children with my husband outside Minneapolis. I love Minnesota. However, what 's happening here hits a little too close to home. 1. I watched as Tim Walz sent my tax dollars to fraudulent daycares. 2. I watched as career politicians handed out billions to illegal immigrants while our veterans slept on the streets. 3. I watched as violent rioters burned down my city in 2020. 4. I watched as protesters stormed a St. Paul church to intimidate Sunday worshippers. We have the opportunity of a LIFETIME to take back this state in the name of sanity. I know we can win, but only if I can fund a winning campaign. Will you help me get off the ground by becoming a founding donor today? - as a sideline reporter and as a mother, I've seen up close and personal what the far-Left has done to our country. I saw the players kneeling during our national anthem. I saw the ladies on The View insinuate that I was a racist for not supporting Joe Biden. I saw the activists calling for male swimmers to compete against our girls. I saw the radical ideologies cropping up in my kids ' classrooms. This goes against everything I believe in. When I shock the world and win this race, this divisiveness and corruption will come to a SCREECHING HALT. Unfortunately, the far-Left has raised 100+ million dollars to destroy our momentum and end my campaign for good. That 's exactly what will happen if this email fails. Your support will mean the difference between victory and defeat in Minnesota. make history together - God bless you! Be brave. Do good. - Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:**| | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447 If you would like to opt-out of important updates like this,

# **Sophisticated far-left network coordinated rapid response to Minneapolis shooting**
**[A Fox News Digital investigation](https://substack.com/redirect/8106ec2f-76ee-4314-b428-177adb9fa214?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** found that Saturday's fatal shooting of 37-year-old agitator Alex Pretti by Border Patrol agents was driven by a complex network of far-left organizations using encrypted Signal chats, street alerts, and a sophisticated database called "MN ICE Plates" that tracked federal agents, with "rapid responders" already mobilized at the scene outside Glam Doll Donuts minutes before any shots were fired.
* **Real-time tracking and backup summoned before shooting occurred:** At 9:50 a.m. ET, just before the killing, a user identified as "Willow" shared video of agents outside Glam Doll Donuts, and three minutes later another user "Salacious B. Crumb" summoned "backup needed" to the location, with local responders making at least 26 entries into the tracking database in the critical hours before and after the killing, documenting license plate numbers and details of alleged ICE vehicles around Nicollet Avenue.
* **National socialist/communist network mobilized protests within hours:** Within hours of the 10:05 a.m. ET shooting, socialist leaders turbocharged their "rapid responders" in Minneapolis and mobilized street protesters from New York City to Los Angeles, with far-left activists descending on Nicollet Avenue and corrugated boxes of supplies--including "DESINER MASKS" and "FREE WINTER HATS"--lined up on sidewalks for protesters, as Vice President JD Vance observed "This level of engineered chaos is unique to Minneapolis. It is the direct consequence of far left agitators, working with local authorities."
* **Billionaire Singham-funded groups spearheaded propaganda effort:** A hub of communist and socialist nonprofit organizations emerged as key organizers, many funded by American-born billionaire Neville Roy Singham, a self-declared Marxist-Leninist living in Shanghai who has funded the People's Forum in New York City since 2017 as an "incubator" for socialist and communist groups, with BreakThrough News--a 501(c)(3) propaganda arm of the People's Forum--breaking the news widely at 10:48 a.m. ET with a dramatic video that garnered 4.1 million views by Sunday afternoon.

Do Democrats have _**NO SHAME?**_
First they called RFK Jr a "conspiracy theorist"... Then they filed **FAKE** articles of impeachment...
Now liberal journalists have launched a phony RFK Jr affair scandal.
Even Tucker Carlson has called it a _**deep state HIT JOB to "destroy Trump by destroying Bobby."**_
It's all part of a left-wing conspiracy to _**STOP**_ Kennedy from revealing **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/548ecc71-b17a-455a-b182-ff07fb7e4ce3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**...
Hundreds-of-billions in ill-gotten profits and political donations are at stake... So Dems will stop at nothing to keep you from hearing **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/548ecc71-b17a-455a-b182-ff07fb7e4ce3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.

P.S. Even for Democrats this is a new low. But they'll sink even deeper if it means you never get to see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/548ecc71-b17a-455a-b182-ff07fb7e4ce3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* * *
# **Former Vikings star accuses Minneapolis of protecting illegal "thugs"**
Former Minnesota Vikings captain and University of Minnesota football star Jack Brewer **[accused Minneapolis authorities of protecting illegal migrant"thugs"](https://substack.com/redirect/106cafa5-9065-413b-8b2c-f50c2956850d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and said Democrats in the state only opposed ICE's actions because the agency was "deporting their voters," telling Fox News Digital "There is something wrong in Minneapolis. We need a city-wide behavioral health assessment. People have completely lost reality."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/106cafa5-9065-413b-8b2c-f50c2956850d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Brewer calls for National Guard, criticizes open-door immigration:** Brewer urged President Trump to "send in the National Guard" with "curfews" and "real consequences for attacking law enforcement," condemning America's open-door immigration policy and claiming people from "Third World countries" don't have American values, saying "You can't allow people to come into your country who don't carry the same morals and values that you do. That's what's happening."
* **Former athlete directly attacks Mayor Frey over Somali community:** Brewer, who was presented with the key to the city of Minneapolis by liberal Mayor Jacob Frey in 2018, directly attacked the mayor saying "I wish I could lock the doors on that city and not let him back in if I had the power. What he has done is absolutely ridiculous. He tap-dances for Somalis. He does anything to go against the culture of America and Christianity for them."

* * *
# **Trump deploys border czar Homan to Minnesota to oversee ICE operations**
President Donald Trump **[announced Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/d9bf1113-3f80-4a0e-b740-26075e08959c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he is sending border czar Tom Homan to Minnesota to report "directly to me" and help lead ICE operations in Minneapolis and St. Paul, with White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt clarifying "Tom Homan will be managing ICE operations on the ground in Minnesota and coordinating with others on the ongoing fraud investigations."
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/d9bf1113-3f80-4a0e-b740-26075e08959c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Trump announces investigations into $20B fraud and Rep. Ilhan Omar:** Trump wrote on Truth Social that "a major investigation is going on with respect to the massive 20 Billion Dollar, Plus, Welfare Fraud that has taken place in Minnesota" and that "the DOJ and Congress are looking at 'Congresswoman' Ilhan Omar, who left Somalia with NOTHING, and is now reportedly worth more than 44 Million Dollars."
* **Deployment follows two protester deaths, ICE agent permanently maimed:** Homan's deployment comes amid widespread unrest in the Twin Cities after two anti-ICE protesters--Renee Nicole Good and Alex Pretti--were killed by federal agents this month, while federal officials say violent unrest directly derailed one immigration arrest last week, leaving an ICE agent permanently maimed after a protester bit off part of his finger, forcing agents to abandon the operation and allowing the suspect to escape.

| | | | | |
# The War On Wealth.
---
|
---
| |
_**Why in the world would you want to wage war on wealth?**_
Well there are multiple reasons, _wealth inequality_ , paying down the _national debt_ , paying for all the _social programs_ Americans rightfully deserve as a first world country.
I would dare say we have an obligation to every American in the country to expand the social safety net programs. With my wage war on wealth tactics, **we can** do just that.
_Some have pointed out that they will just take their money and run away,_ but I can assure you that if they ran away, we can still go after them.
In fact, I would argue we use similar tactics to that of the Biden administration. When the world was sizing Russian Oligarch assets, it worked for Russian billionaires.
_They may very well be able to run, but they can’t hide._
We as well have to address the elephant in the room, you often hear people say the government is so inefficient and the fraud, oh god the fraud.
Now it’s easy to point at an underfunded, understaffed agency and say look at how broken it is, when in reality it was the GOP and their consistent year-over-year cuts to federal programs and agency. Face it, the Republican Party is responsible for the inefficiency with in the government.
**Yes, the people who made the problem are using the same problem to say government just does not work let business Handel it.**
If we want a government that works well and is efficient than they need more money, people and support. Ending the myth of trickle-down economics otherwise known as voodoo economics is a must for the countries very survival, the national debt will bankrupt us. _Wage war on wealth, tax the rich!_

name: Adam Schwarze
subject: They betrayed us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. | [](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f4c0b99f52f14a1cae4ca9bd32df127a&_e=Wohk-c1f-ftwRVtAiinnaT9sLoQDpdiK5bWkKIeJpQymGptmRdFR69Tm1U0_ooQu-tDTBe5jQs-cOz5kQsgiZzER2ml4ZpfNeSNhgvL622iJlpm1WQchNlb6e9vDOK4kkg4_zz0GbC7suDBTJ0c3CoRqyuNgVZjhiQ28Utg8llhbxlfubNTrKuBzQ5oeTPDJHk9ZinB2bmlgv9EUNomrWMCLax-ICLlqVDkxLwrdU79Cey4LVIfSWJopSJPvE0Q0vAVL2pZhD30JUyYzF7fUETffpgHAcIB9LOt0MSGTcwEYTFy5I5u8PlR0zTHRcSU0OOK44QIOaMSFeVZ1BgltIyH1LNAyaMw1NKCqOUpvf5Ro0PG0-2dzbuTwLnuwaS687u5ZV6tEAsiuBYk10dXvpvkN78J3zfgjoTHdMCT-QwO7CUU46RvgFZLZba3CSa49qQ-zuvvaIblF1NTDRLA8wrfU3TpIv0zTC72kK-j7EwAENlbSyqKNmERhf_3_efxv6OdUmIpBrkeHaXmLQtO0BTo1tAwv1qZN3dLrT5_ImF4JF5WlYGPGozIZQmyI9LQ4Anb-O0vaS4wQ5kdi7SB0PHynqlInps48WyEmQaJ733u3bb-ubWor27oFKLTKLPt6z_UUNYXZlSsqgFdvotAA2M7TZPc4C1pDXFbSfi505c_yqDBCylxplPsGfUGF6dhn187-hh6hXvhpS9bj3we-movIPevzGqhNzDyyTMVhRhWCo_PEBsEk4b2j_icps5Ev)

---
Peter,

When hardworking Minnesotans like you pay taxes to feed hungry children, the last thing we expect is for those funds to be used to buy luxury cars, overseas properties, and lavish lifestyles for scammers.

But that's precisely what happened right here in Minnesota with the Feeding Our Future scandal – over $250 million in federal child nutrition dollars stolen through fake claims, phony sites, and outright fraud.

As a retired Navy SEAL who's spent my life fighting for America and holding the line on accountability, I believe anyone who betrays our trust like this – especially if they're naturalized citizens – should face severe consequences, and illegal aliens need to be deported!

**If you don’t have time to finish this entire email, please do me a quick favor and answer the question below:**

_**Should we deport any naturalized citizen who steals from the American taxpayer?**_

[**TAKE THE QUICK SURVEY
**](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=f4c0b99f52f14a1cae4ca9bd32df127a&_e=Wohk-c1f-ftwRVtAiinnaT9sLoQDpdiK5bWkKIeJpQymGptmRdFR69Tm1U0_ooQu-tDTBe5jQs-cOz5kQsgiZzER2ml4ZpfNeSNhgvL622iJlpm1WQchNlb6e9vDOK4kkg4_zz0GbC7suDBTJ0c3CoRqyuNgVZjhiQ28Utg8llhbxlfubNTrKuBzQ5oeTPDJHk9ZinB2bmlgv9EUNomrWMCLax-ICLlqVDkxLwrdU79Cey4LVIfSWJopSJPvE0Q0vAVL2pZhD30JUyYzF7fUERYhKOYHuQ6cc_FPDiBBKoErYLQMxBDaW1ToLFWuqzBrXzOs6Wdx2TGQZsr2mDf80dt3urMUzkHdCSGo74VwBaQX4U444pqEs7vTRRqRXGZ0Vz_t_e5wnLG0dJ0UfEXUGmzKJ-U-lOflyWGrFJMjlODBFI0UP1MAyIhzO5CcDeyMb1_l8ydygz2cO1QSGqJbeyYqVeDNMmnNit1lVpozFyq2oIq4eaHbJyVV9CsjFXbIKYNvJpB3YOwmje4BkERpfkR0Th_jEJDyC4EDKFrgGpyd-vySoT_A1taWGes9GmqkaXMxxz0O3foL5kD0SaM6l3OPPQIvUw2WBXz8dHzii0Y0xTiV_gfyVoTudbRl8kJjEDH0SaQs2g_cbVtX9ozzbrwRHUHfoFC5-8fjYes3z1vA7NMHEFzxyv-uXXTbzPkRgNOYDVyMv8NMRIQ8aY8-6B-1UycHPBdU-zdNkLOiXWHniBKWXtxc9i0BAdvdKxzH)
Prosecutors have already secured dozens of convictions, with assets including Porsches and millions of dollars in cash being seized. But **we need stronger laws to ensure this never happens again** and to send a clear message: Fraud against American taxpayers will not be tolerated.

The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it.

**Now, we need to turn our eyes to the open United States Senate seat, where I’m a Republican candidate.**

I support the introduction of bold new measures in Congress to crack down on these schemes. clean_body: The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. | Peter, When hardworking Minnesotans like you pay taxes to feed hungry children, the last thing we expect is for those funds to be used to buy luxury cars, overseas properties, and lavish lifestyles for scammers. But that's precisely what happened right here in Minnesota with the Feeding Our Future scandal – over $250 million in federal child nutrition dollars stolen through fake claims, phony sites, and outright fraud. As a retired Navy SEAL who's spent my life fighting for America and holding the line on accountability, I believe anyone who betrays our trust like this – especially if they're naturalized citizens – should face severe consequences, and illegal aliens need to be deported! If you don’t have time to finish this entire email, please do me a quick favor and answer the question below: Should we deport any naturalized citizen who steals from the American taxpayer? Prosecutors have already secured dozens of convictions, with assets including Porsches and millions of dollars in cash being seized. But we need stronger laws to ensure this never happens again and to send a clear message: Fraud against American taxpayers will not be tolerated. The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. Now, we need to turn our eyes to the open United States Senate seat, where I’m a Republican candidate. I support the introduction of bold new measures in Congress to crack down on these schemes. I need to hear from you – We've seen enough excuses and weak oversight. It's time for leadership that puts America – and Minnesotans – first. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Bushra Amiwala
subject: Cracked Eggs in Karachi, Big Dreams
body:
Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test.
| | | | | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sgX4cOaAcqMXXJxlQl4t-vEyhKGPCCX_6xw0FfFTTGO_MGRSznX6GjZYit_GJapptzpYgX84XEhG3nh6dt4SWpiinUkKPf99YEdn7wufiZSXgiU7uaOEHVbSGiQswnCHXjm4Ox27xEszm0AiQtumtvd2oAlEsqm7RMQ50k0Qwu2iNpvk2ic3aD5V_Z27cPRpXoDSLBDuU3UtQg-q7WNsfK2hcj5XsxIT&c=4JX5jXd-8Sq6ePtdVRVfYJfXeNnGh-6Ck8HYrvLFt8tVLwISUWUz0A==&ch=Bo3FJ_buL53ZYJlAyyhHy6iv5kxuaswMQcfQ_I1a91em8ax2e7to1g==)
---
|
Peter,
My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury.
He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English.
---
| [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sgX4cOaAcqMXXJxlQl4t-vEyhKGPCCX_6xw0FfFTTGO_MGRSznX6GjZYit_GJapptzpYgX84XEhG3nh6dt4SWpiinUkKPf99YEdn7wufiZSXgiU7uaOEHVbSGiQswnCHXjm4Ox27xEszm0AiQtumtvd2oAlEsqm7RMQ50k0Qwu2iNpvk2ic3aD5V_Z27cPRpXoDSLBDuU3VQ4-ocWt9w6mmPA7vXgGuZ&c=4JX5jXd-8Sq6ePtdVRVfYJfXeNnGh-6Ck8HYrvLFt8tVLwISUWUz0A==&ch=Bo3FJ_buL53ZYJlAyyhHy6iv5kxuaswMQcfQ_I1a91em8ax2e7to1g==)
---
After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream.
When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into.

---
| | [](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sgX4cOaAcqMXXJxlQl4t-vEyhKGPCCX_6xw0FfFTTGO_MGRSznX6GjZYit_GJapptzpYgX84XEhG3nh6dt4SWpiinUkKPf99YEdn7wufiZSXgiU7uaOEHVbSGiQswnCHXjm4Ox27xEszm0AiQtumtvd2oAlEsqm7RMQ50k0Qwu2iNpvk2ic3aD5V_Z27cPRpXoDSLBDuU3WfEoCPhMpjnQh30XCi2lin&c=4JX5jXd-8Sq6ePtdVRVfYJfXeNnGh-6Ck8HYrvLFt8tVLwISUWUz0A==&ch=Bo3FJ_buL53ZYJlAyyhHy6iv5kxuaswMQcfQ_I1a91em8ax2e7to1g==)
---
| From him, I learned three important lessons:

* Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance.

* Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.)

* The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it.

That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday.
With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever.
[Will you make a contribution of whatever you can spare to help me keep fighting for opportunity, education, and the belief that every family deserves a fair shot?](https://e96gjzhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001sgX4cOaAcqMXXJxlQl4t-vEyhKGPCCX_6xw0FfFTTGO_MGRSznX6GjZYit_GJappFnp7hPSV5-MixmlPbwmmSf_XBMXDZU1zn_zgS9XWBhgXpYq_2H1kuPoUkKwWIdY7OhTh4KtR02VxFp_OzgFu8XBEHTNCTEsEcSnH9FQWIpXALypyrOSHPVALw0EcBC30frr0sYN7kuEIc4cTMcNHEQuGB_SzPfiF1MvIleACIW4=&c=4JX5jXd-8Sq6ePtdVRVfYJfXeNnGh-6Ck8HYrvLFt8tVLwISUWUz0A==&ch=Bo3FJ_buL53ZYJlAyyhHy6iv5kxuaswMQcfQ_I1a91em8ax2e7to1g==)

clean_body: Despite not reading English he answered ‘C’ all the way down and passed his taxi test. | | | | | == | Peter, My dad, Shabbir Amiwala, grew up poor in Karachi, Pakistan. His first job as a boy was selling eggs in the market. Each day, he would bring home the cracked ones for him and his sisters to share the following morning. Eggs were a luxury. He dreamt of a better life, so he came to America to chase the American Dream. By pure luck, the taxi driver who picked him up from the airport spoke Urdu and connected him to a job at a restaurant called The Burger Lounge. He worked as a busboy, then as a line cook, and later as a taxi driver -- passing the taxi exam by answering "C" all the way down, despite not being able to read English. | == After years of driving a cab, he saved enough to open a men's clothing store -- a milestone that, to him, was the embodiment of the American Dream. When I was born, he took on debt so our family could move just three miles north, so I could attend better schools in Skokie. That's how much he valued education. Decades later I would be elected to serve on the school board of the very same schools that he sacrificed so much to get me into. | | == | From him, I learned three important lessons: Gratitude -- for every meal, every chance. Faith -- what's meant for you won't miss you. (Like the Urdu-speaking taxi driver who helped him land his first job in Chicago.) * The notion that you can build a foundation as you walk on it. That last lesson -- building a foundation as you walk on it -- is exactly what we are doing together on this campaign. It started with a dream and we've already built it into a front-running campaign, there's still much more work to be done but we'll continue building up everyday. With the American Dream that my father fought to achieve under attack this campaign is needed now more than ever. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | | == | == | Gratefully, | | == | Bushra Amiwala Democrat for IL-9 | | == | | | | == | Mail checks to: Bushra for Congress PO Box 911 Skokie, IL 60076 | | == | | | | Bushra for Congress | PO Box 911 | Skokie, IL 60076 US | |

| | Peter, As we begin a new year, I want to sincerely******_thank you_** for your steadfast support and commitment to Team Knott. Your belief in this mission has made a real difference, and I am deeply humbled and grateful. Over the past few weeks, I have taken time to reflect on what we were able to accomplish together this past year—and it’s something to be proud of:
---
| | We took bold steps to **secure the border** , restoring enforcement and accountability where it was long overdue. That meant arresting and deporting criminal illegal migrants, prioritizing public safety, and turning up the heat on narco-terrorists, traffickers, and cartel networks that profit from chaos and human suffering. **For the first time in years, the message was clear: our laws matter, and they will be enforced.** We **advanced the One Big, Beautiful Bill** that cut through red tape, rolled back burdensome regulations, unleashed American energy and job creation, and **put working families—not bureaucrats—first.** It was a clear rejection of failed, big-government policies and a decisive step toward economic growth, lower costs, and renewed confidence in America’s future.
---
Folks, that’s good progress.** ** As I look ahead to the year before us (an election year) and chart our path to victory, both in our race and for the future of our country, it’s clear that we are facing an organized and engaged opposition. This year will be just as consequential as the last. Our majority in Congress is slim. Every seat matters. And every level of support matters if we are going to **keep Congress red** , **stop the radical agenda** from gaining any foothold, and **build on our victories** for North Carolina and America. **[We will once again rely heavily on your ongoing support—your time, your generosity, and your prayers—to finish the work we started.](https://link.bradknott.com/s/c/zwIrA601TtnEXP5ZB6F3hP0VEpzCMQ6TKPB1jfAbmiQ2Tqz5pDuMBvx5uaOeDOgI8zvmbUhHf_Fvd09dNrClIAjlK2vh2z-d_L4YYW3ZGe0sIfwUxGCrpPi06k_eN7fGROQYd6Xn8a4pcVzC5pHqTBjcDLiygBEDZNSnnF6ZKEchGQg_ja6jztKpJMDLIx3yEb-8jxwZH7jQagM9umcCcQy5mlRAQv1y95Rxl4WlVrR3Fj2kKW-rr8mL8TumLhOspGcHv7cF1psjpj3vOGoFPEIx-GU4ZIKSe5C10_W81n_vwtnzK9HFX-XXiNuKJX0gL1OYs8Z8EkmMgqDldEcduZuXmPz7H8vUUESSmNngIhhbp27cCNf2RCCGxYpzQ0fAJPaSMaUBu0U38yd0cFldhjXriTATHN6EFpraC2eOSfhccjzu3QK67Zmo_--e_M1RQJ51tvfnYy-3cEMiHUWhkA9N_1F-vytT8YRHStppfkEdZKxk9KBkz2NEQDptjhOBpHHPE2uCpWBSjVTxkfB9DwPgsp0lvvR50Hwi3ZA3-krF9UDhdC_k-ze8ZL1CrJ6PbnFPcBvGjA0w6WeDbgW0YrKb1zp9wFFmUpvFGtFskYrGpHPNTrJ7DxZULnYh3uVr_2EAtB3xK3WK0b072Da-yAv3IMocCDnWUREzROZ5wt9vwuFpd4GjdFKI_N6ErB0TieIHJUurDpNDAmL7UOnFgrqhU256FcyWoDsKqLzBd-GMioT4FWB_bbKceVvINb6WW55A22MFBOB5soUvYqCQqZnDlsDLN22woWxtN6i1leFEQX2q-JTAeedHvd_6Ovb-jnwabbk5LPzspRS9MvnmbBVVWqAGVT8I_O_b-APwJBC6/NoKqgk1H0wPgp2kw7mdM8alItlETX3hL/17)**

That meant arresting and deporting criminal illegal migrants, prioritizing public safety, and turning up the heat on narco-terrorists, traffickers, and cartel networks that profit from chaos and human suffering. For the first time in years, the message was clear: our laws matter, and they will be enforced. We advanced the One Big, Beautiful Bill that cut through red tape, rolled back burdensome regulations, unleashed American energy and job creation, and put working families—not bureaucrats—first. It was a clear rejection of failed, big-government policies and a decisive step toward economic growth, lower costs, and renewed confidence in America’s future. Folks, that’s good progress. As I look ahead to the year before us (an election year) and chart our path to victory, both in our race and for the future of our country, it’s clear that we are facing an organized and engaged opposition. This year will be just as consequential as the last. Our majority in Congress is slim. Every seat matters. And every level of support matters if we are going to keep Congress red , stop the radical agenda from gaining any foothold, and build on our victories for North Carolina and America. | | Thank you again for believing in this mission and for standing with us. Sincerely, Brad Knott | Congressman NC-13 | | | | | ---|---|--- | | | Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress Copyright © 2026 Knott for Congress Our mailing address is: Brad Knott for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . If you have any suggestions, comments, complaints, or feedback, please send your ideas to mailto:info@bradknott.com.

name: Bob Brooks
subject: This is not safety, it’s chaos
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB BROOKS FOR CONGRESS
body:
We will not accept a system that wreaks havoc on our communities rather than invests in our schools, infrastructure, and public safety.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124062748/597432859/966921121?refcode=email_012626&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjAxOTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjAyMTQxMDAtY2VmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IUh2EJeOdkw_bInwBPaGgRGLaDChfnHf_XfJ6WaKBiI=) Peter, Last week, I called for the impeachment and removal of Kristi Noem after the murder of Renee Good. Now we have another person killed in Minneapolis. **I spent 20 years working in public safety in this community. This is not safety, it’s chaos.** It’s detaining children. It’s killing people on our streets. It’s terrorizing families and making our neighbors afraid to leave their homes. We will not accept a system that wreaks havoc on our communities rather than invests in our schools, infrastructure, and public safety. And yet Congressman Mackenzie – good at following Trump’s orders and little else – says and does nothing. **It’s time for leadership that actually protects people, not excuses for violence.** We will not stand for this. Bob

name: James O'Keefe
subject: He had a CIA badge in one hand and a martini in the other. Now he wants 10 million dollars.
body:
Two years ago, a CIA official sat across from our undercover journalist at a bar in Virginia. He ordered drinks. He flashed his badge. And then, unprompted,

| | [****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm0a1dqu8vf26eea7ht7smvteepd4cohhdn9j1l8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs)
[****](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zlha10adddnkp5r162rvj0pavg6a66ltg0quamn0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs) Dear Friend,

Two years ago, a CIA official sat across from our undercover journalist at a bar in Virginia. He ordered drinks. He flashed his badge. And then, unprompted, he started talking.

He admitted the CIA withheld intelligence from the sitting President of the United States.

He described how FISA was weaponized to surveil Trump and his team.

He said all of this on camera.

We published it. America watched. And now he's suing me for **$10 million.**

**[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zi4ttb1krs57bfh4itoi7vcsr0v9hi7tp7ab34r0_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs)**Help me defend the 1[**st Amendment by donating to my legal defense fund.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zua40r313fg4kkc5q6n2l9nqn446hrfjc2429910_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs)****

Let me be clear about what he's claiming: that our journalist committed "fraud" by using a dating app to meet him. That's it. A dating profile. Undercover investigative journalism is the same technique used by restaurant critics, investigative reporters, and 60 Minutes for half a century.

He also claims "wiretapping"—in Virginia, a one-party consent state where our recording was completely legal.

And the damages he's demanding? Compensation for "humiliation, depression, fear, and terror" caused by... the public hearing his own words.

This lawsuit isn't really about a dating profile or hurt feelings. **It's a message to every journalist in America: expose the intelligence community, and we will bury you in legal fees until you break.**

They've done it before. They'll do it again. [**Unless we prove it doesn't work**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zbsqq2qb45ien3mp2idic1m97vn5vqfogdsogv6o_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs).

I'm not settling. I'm not backing down. I'm taking this to discovery—where we'll subpoena documents, depose witnesses, and expose even more of what they've been hiding. If we have to, we'll take it to the Supreme Court.

[**But I can't do it alone**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zptrs77a6kq8plh8bthodr125u4p5fbccrs51u68_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs).

Legal defense against a well-funded plaintiff—with what appears to be Deep State backing—costs hundreds of thousands of dollars. Every motion, every filing, every hour of attorney time adds up fast.

**[**Will you stand in the gap with me today?**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z8rp4dqdl9op1p5ddr96r770chie4d1p0ed6b9u8_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs)**

[**Your donation—whether $25 or $2,500—goes directly to legal defense**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm7nd3kqeulqen6f8a9ne6q6j7lp7h59rdi8fb3g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs), keeping our investigators in the field, and ensuring that the cost of telling the truth doesn't become too high to bear.

[**Your gift through Liberty Guard funds our defense so that we can keep fighting.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zvjk65di85qhf8baaamjqp9e0iidml1um39b880g_rp22sh2s8i6eor4s5hm0pj2cth2bs)

He thought the camera would stay hidden. He thought his words would never see daylight. He thought wrong.

Let's finish what we started.

In Truth,
James O'Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

**P.S.** Discovery is where the real fight begins—and where we often uncover more than the plaintiff bargained for. Your support today doesn't just defend this case. It funds the next investigation.

---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Mark Kelly
subject: My take on the Senate special elections. –
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DSCC | PO Box 96047, Washington, DC 20090 | **[dscc
body:
| | | Hi, DSCC Vice Chair Mark Kelly here. I want to talk to you about a _key_ opportunity in front of us as we fight for the Senate majority: **special elections.**

I know a thing or two about these kinds of races, because I got to the Senate by _winning_ a special election back in 2020 — even as Republicans spent over $70 million to stop me. **And my victory proved mission-critical, because without it, Democrats wouldn't have had a Senate majority.**

[**Now, history could repeat itself. Two special elections coming up in Ohio and Florida are among a small handful of races that could decide the majority — again. So I'm coming to ask you, will you donate $5 to win races like those and take back the Senate? >>**](https://go.dscc.org/go/22350?amount=5&t=5&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260126-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260126-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=22490%2E9716520%2E297NK_)

| | [Donate $5](https://go.dscc.org/go/22350?amount=5&t=8&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260126-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260126-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=22490%2E9716520%2E297NK_)
---

I want to be clear, team: **These special elections give us an opportunity we would have waited YEARS for without them, and they make a BIG difference.**

In fact, during Donald Trump's first term, Democrats flipped **_three_** Senate seats in special elections, including mine, my good friend Raphael Warnock's, and even a seat in dark-red Alabama. Each time, we defeated Trump-endorsed candidates who would have been guaranteed votes for his destructive agenda, and instead we elected Democrats who fought for hardworking Americans.

**Now, we're facing the same task again — but it won't be easy.** Trump is reportedly "obsessed" with the midterms, National Republicans will spend big-time to keep their majority, and just like when I first won, Democrats only need to flip a handful of seats to take back the Senate.

**Take it from someone who's been in this position before: We'll need your help to make the most of this opportunity — and that's why I'm reaching out.**

**[As a DSCC Vice Chair, I'm personally asking: Will you chip in $5 or whatever you can to help Democrats win in states like Ohio and Florida and take back the Senate? We have a real opportunity to topple Trump's majority, and we can't let it slip away >>](https://go.dscc.org/go/22350?amount=5&t=9&firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&addr1=&addr2=&city=Cresco&state=Pennsylvania&zip=18326&phone=None&employer=&occupation=&ask=5&amounts=5%2C10%2C20%2C50&code=DPE-FD-20260126-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&refcode=DPE-FD-20260126-MarkKelly-KellySpecialElectionsFR-Pros-sl1&akid=22490%2E9716520%2E297NK_)**

We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

clean_body: | | | Hi, DSCC Vice Chair Mark Kelly here. I want to talk to you about a key opportunity in front of us as we fight for the Senate majority: special elections. I know a thing or two about these kinds of races, because I got to the Senate by winning a special election back in 2020 — even as Republicans spent over $70 million to stop me. And my victory proved mission-critical, because without it, Democrats wouldn't have had a Senate majority. | | I want to be clear, team: These special elections give us an opportunity we would have waited YEARS for without them, and they make a BIG difference. In fact, during Donald Trump's first term, Democrats flipped three Senate seats in special elections, including mine, my good friend Raphael Warnock's, and even a seat in dark-red Alabama. Each time, we defeated Trump-endorsed candidates who would have been guaranteed votes for his destructive agenda, and instead we elected Democrats who fought for hardworking Americans. Now, we're facing the same task again — but it won't be easy. Trump is reportedly "obsessed" with the midterms, National Republicans will spend big-time to keep their majority, and just like when I first won, Democrats only need to flip a handful of seats to take back the Senate. Take it from someone who's been in this position before: We'll need your help to make the most of this opportunity — and that's why I'm reaching out. We need your help to fight for the Senate. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | Thank you for your support. name: Mallory McMorrow
subject: A future worth fighting for
body:
[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/685?t=1001&akid=3879%2E898137%2E7nCAP1 ][IMG]

Hi team,

I’ve been meeting with Michiganders across the state, and two things are
abundantly clear: People are scared, and they're nervous for the future.

Nervous that their kids won’t want to stay in Michigan. Scared that the
president is only sowing more division and danger while putting
opportunity and stability further and further out of reach. I hear you,
loud and clear.

I’m feeling it too, and I’m in this to fight for the future we all
deserve: a future where you can afford to own a home, not just rent, where
groceries don’t break the bank, and where you can get ahead, not just get
by.

I'm not just running to beat Trump's handpicked candidate. I'm running to
build a future worth fighting for.

[ https://act.mcmorrowformichigan.com/go/11?c0=mam-em-jan2026.Z1vuEP&refcode=AU_MAM_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260126_AM1_V1_S1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&amount=5&t=1002&akid=3879%2E898137%2E7nCAP1 ]If you haven’t had the chance to chip in yet, would
you consider a first-time contribution of $5 to help us build our
momentum?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your

name: Voter Action Project
subject: 26 critical, underreported races for 2026
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
These types of elections always fly under the media's radar, Team, but this year 26 Secretary of State races will shape the future of our elections, redistricting in 2030, and the outcome of the 2028 presidential race.
Opponents of voting rights already know this, which is why they’re already pouring money into these elections – and we have to fight back now, while it still makes a difference. Check out this map:
Map of Key Secretary of State Races for 2026 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012626_1&amount=25]
The work to increase voter participation and turnout for these races has to start now, not this summer. We have to build the infrastructure to defend pro-voter initiatives in Arizona, Michigan, Wisconsin, and Nevada, at the same time as we work to flip the script in key battleground states like Georgia, Ohio, and Iowa.
Team: None of it happens without your support. Fuel our work for next year's elections with $35 or whatever you can today >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012626_1&amount=35]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_1&amount=250] Other Amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012626_1&amount=35]
Opponents of voting rights have been working on these objectives for years. They've targeted state legislatures and key statewide offices to control the rules around voting and that's why they've been in a position to follow up on the "Big Lie" with bill after bill suppressing the vote. They've played the long game to pick and choose their voters and protect their own power.
Most people don't know that their Secretary of State is the state official who runs their elections, let alone who the current office-holder in their state is. But they are the last line of defense against voter suppression and diminished ballot access , which is why we need to invest in voter information, registration, and participation in these critical races.
2025 was a tough year, but we did not back down. Our right to vote is too important and too much is at stake for our democracy, our fellow Americans, and the direction of our country. Driving pro-voting rights voters to the polls in November is the best possible response to all that we've been forced to live through the last decade.
Your gift -- $10, $20, $35, or more -- helps provide the resources we need to keep voters apprised of what is at stake and get them out to vote for pro-democracy policies. Please, chip in what you can today! >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=012626_1&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=012626_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=012626_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.
Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.
Integrity First Voter Action Project
P.O. Box 19294
Portland, OR 97280
United States
This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Emails are a crucial way to keep supporters up to date on the latest attacks on voting rights and our efforts to expand ballot access for all Americans. If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://secure.everyaction.com/p/FQb7Rbo110qLPmSvMAn63Q2?unsubscribedata=4Xov9hfBdwg8sbRMGtoiVj8lm7C9bwrU49P1xQ%2FjqtBbyGNMIbuoV57LNCRMZutRTiMTsnOaGgCjKjhinPh3mTOZvlASf2R9GW92uR78PAFF%2FWSHUfxo0RYV0DK%2F4WZbAMjTiG4l%2B8683AUpRlgDt2ldgV8NjO%2FUPddw%2FL1NlclQiW3emjyFbrUC%2FaOMJliwvIZc%2FzmlTAjyAAzOGt%2BgQLLSZmx3i3GK41hyti%2BaMge9ElmdlLn32%2BmNyuuotgfHm6FCFGBLHjlgyf5ZIkJXC0PBNFFVZzukwyhEOVP9jfwbtD%2FvIRAxqISzsK2GyG1WaxNajiA8%2BKzN%2FUYYc1C8%2BKR%2BBqZU7sBMZkl47qoh90DHqde8SvJ%2Fcz4Tr11msLXtu8ycTajlq72vg9XxkFNbYBn9LQrARREWjHvvNqCE%2FP8%3D .

name: Jon Bonck For Congress
subject: 48 hours out: Jon Bonck and Jim Jordan in Cypress!
body:
| | | | |
---
| Friends,
We are now just 48 hours away from a major night in Cypress, and excitement continues to build across our community.
This Tuesday January 28, conservatives will gather in Cypress for a Faith, Family, and Freedom Rally with Jim Jordan and Jon Bonck. The evening will also feature Pastor Gregg Matte of First Baptist Church and Ben Ferguson, co host of The Verdict podcast.
This rally is about more than a single night. It is about standing together for the values that built this country. Faith family freedom and personal responsibility. People from across our community are coming together because they believe America is worth fighting for.
Event Details The Barn at the Frio 16416 Mueschke Road Cypress Texas
Wednesday, January 28 Doors open at 6:30 PM Program begins at 7:00 PM
Tickets are required and space is limited. With only 48 hours remaining we strongly encourage you to reserve your spot now and invite friends and family to join you.
[https://www.tickettailor.com/events/jonbonckforcongress/2018963](https://47x7wwhbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001j4QXxD3R6FizUniwSis1iDaDs7LCwSDOQ5bSKugdhJjx5z5P61-0nlNeEIygJAQiFl4sNo4qoLqMmFN9NG-Bew0PVk-3yloZ3ziQ8S1Az83WOp8SRxi__xMp2vBxnEGuqbr3cZZTW1sqiLsk5JLZZ3IkkV8hOcbPY9vlV6cRUv7eFE1j0ZhqpT5qdEwTj27X7VrZk4G7M3KI0_-6WvJo7w==&c=1zJVQYAyDHPMMrMsenvbcNL0sUgKefAmSm6TTnJL92rQ49WzZyHfNg==&ch=ftovOcuSApzpYaLX0AVEKcSZW6mId2OAuEmN3LH-mOBiLdhzXT9Ebg==)
We hope you will join us Tuesday night. This rally is shaping up to be something special and we would love to see you there.
See you soon,
Jon Bonck
###

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Alex Pretti
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
My constituent, Alex Pretti, was murdered in cold blood by immigration agents in the streets of Minneapolis on Saturday.
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2045%2E791427%2EYFzfno)
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-ice-3/?source=em260126-1-240&akid=2045%2E791427%2EYFzfno)
Friend — One of my constituents, Alex Pretti, was murdered in cold blood by immigration agents in the streets of Minneapolis on Saturday.
Alex was a 37-year-old ICU nurse who worked for the Veterans Administration. His job was to take care of those who had served our country when they were sick and injured. His family and friends say he was a kind soul who enjoyed hiking and camping.
When George Floyd was murdered by police in Alex’s own neighborhood in 2020, he joined the local protests and stood in solidarity with his community. Alex did the same when Renee Good was murdered just weeks ago by ICE. He is one of hundreds of thousands of Minnesotans who have protested, documented, and resisted ICE’s campaign of terror over the last month.
Alex’s final act before being killed was to help a woman who was being beaten by immigration agents on the side of the road. Alex was swarmed by a team of agents, pepper-sprayed, wrestled to the ground, and shot several times.
Friend — I have seen the video from every angle. Many of you have by now. There is no earthly justification for an immigration officer to take this man’s life. **This was a state-sanctioned murder,** and blood is on the hands of Trump and his entire fascist administration.
But, as if this incident couldn’t be even more horrifying, the administration is doubling down on lies, slander, and defamation against an innocent man who was slain by his own government rather than facing accountability.
Kristi Noem did not miss a beat in labeling Alex a “domestic terrorist”, just like she did to Renee Good. Border Patrol commander Greg Bovino rushed to falsely claim that Alex intended to do “maximum damage and massacre law enforcement.” Stephen Miller referred to Alex as “an assassin” who “tried to murder federal agents,” and Vice President JD Vance boosted it.
**This is unadulterated bullsh*t – unbelievable propaganda to cover their behinds after yet another innocent person was murdered under their watch.**
Alex’s family responded in a statement, "The sickening lies told about our son by the administration are reprehensible and disgusting... Please get the truth out about our son. He was a good man,”
Friend, the murder of Alex Pretti is not an isolated incident. **Simply put, the occupation of Minneapolis is an unprecedented crisis for our Constitution, our democracy, and our entire way of life.**
Americans gunned down without accountability. Hundreds beaten and brutalized, from the elderly to tiny babies. Civil rights torn to shreds as ICE breaks down doors, rams into cars, and smashes windows. Citizens arrested without due process and dumped on the side of the road. Families were separated at gunpoint, and toddlers were kidnapped to use as bait against their parents. The situation has reached a boiling point, and it’s time for it to end for the sake of all that is good and decent.
We must get ICE and DHS out of Minnesota, strip them of their funding, impeach Kristi Noem for her catastrophic failure of leadership, charge ICE killers and thugs for murder and assault, and organize to punish Republicans at the ballot box this November for their steadfast reign of terror.
In solidarity,
Ilhan Omar

* * *

**One more thing:**
Trump’s immigration regime is out-of-control, unaccountable, and a clear danger to our communities. We are calling on Congress to stand tall in defense of our Constitution and block any and all funding for DHS and ICE. Please, **[add your name to our petition**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-ice-3/?source=em260126-1-240&akid=2045%2E791427%2EYFzfno) and help us show a massive wave of resistance to the violence and civil rights abuses we are seeing in Minnesota and across the country:**
**[SIGN ON NOW](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/em-jan26-ice-3/?source=em260126-1-240&akid=2045%2E791427%2EYFzfno)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=2&akid=2045%2E791427%2EYFzfno)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=3&akid=2045%2E791427%2EYFzfno)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=4&akid=2045%2E791427%2EYFzfno)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=5&refcode2=2045_791427_YFzfno&akid=2045%2E791427%2EYFzfno)**.
Ilhan for Congress
PO Box 33079
Washington D.C., 20033

If they can do this to us, imagine what they can do to you. |
Fellow Patriot - This is a political witch hunt.

Jack Smith acknowledged MORE subpoenas directed toward members of Congress, including MY phone records.

This is a ludicrous abuse of power at levels we've barely ever seen in this country - just because the Left HATES President Trump and his supporters.

**If they can do this to me,_imagine what they could do to you_.**

It's just the tip of the iceberg.

The Left is targeting hundreds of Americans for simply being conservative and supporting ⁦President Trump.

This enrages me - and I bet it makes you mad, too.

This was a political exercise designed to target the President and all conservatives. We must fight back, Fellow Patriot.

It's critical that we make sure conservatives have voices in power to stand up to this injustice.

It's critical that we make sure conservatives have voices in power to stand up to this injustice. Chip Roy P.S. I've been targeted. President Trump has been targeted. YOU have been targeted. | | PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR CHIP ROY Don't want to receive any more of our emails? We hate to see you go, but .

name: Ken Martin
subject: An update on Minnesota:
body:
---
Derek, This email is long, but it’s important. Because it’s about Minnesota. I hope you can take a moment to read the whole thing. This weekend, in Minneapolis, a federal immigration agent murdered Alex Pretti, an ICU nurse who cared for our veterans at the VA hospital. We all watched it play out from dozens of different angles, filmed by bystanders on their cell phones in the freezing cold. And despite the lies from the government, we all had the same takeaway: this was an execution. In Minnesota, we’re known for being warm. Not the temperature, but the people. We take care of our neighbors, no matter where they’re from or what they look like. We don’t look away when someone is being harmed. We don’t abandon each other. **That’s what Alex Pretti stood for.** Alex was a caregiver. A neighbor. A loving son. A man who spent his life protecting others. And, in his final moments, he was doing it again: showing up, trying to protect people in his community. That’s what patriotism looks like. Donald Trump, Stephen Miller, and all these guys in the White House don’t know a damn thing about patriotism. Think about this. They _want_ us in fear. They want to provoke. They want federal agents with guns and tear gas roaming the streets. They want to break into houses without legitimate warrants and to stop citizens from recording them. Frankly, I can’t think of anything less American. On Saturday night, after Alex was murdered by federal agents, Trump’s Attorney General Pam Bondi sent an extortion letter to my friend, Minnesota Governor Tim Walz. Let me paraphrase this letter. Pam Bondi basically said: give us sensitive personal information about Minnesota voters — driver’s license numbers, Social Security numbers, party affiliations — or else ICE won’t back off. Donald Trump has spent years trying to overturn election results, rig our politics, and fix the game for himself. He’s deeply unpopular. So, in a midterm year where he finally stands to lose his grip on power, we should all be asking ourselves why he wants to take control of state voter rolls. For months, Donald Trump and his politically weaponized DOJ have attempted to force states like Minnesota to hand over their voter data. Their goal is to collect as much sensitive personal information as possible. They seek to hand that data to Homeland Security and build a national voter database, as part of their effort to take control of elections nationwide. **Now, let me tell you about what we are doing to fight back.** At my direction, the Democratic National Committee has assembled a team of lawyers to fight in court to protect voters and prevent the Trump administration from violating states’ rights to run their elections. As we've seen in Minnesota, Donald Trump has no hesitation with using the federal government to trample our rights and inflict brutal violence on our people. We cannot allow him to take control of our elections. As part of that effort, the DNC has filed briefs in five states, fighting back against the DOJ’s unlawful attempt to seize state voter rolls. And we have more to come this week. Additionally, earlier this month, the DNC sent warning letters to 10 states urging them not to agree to send their unredacted voter files to Trump’s DOJ and immediately purge voters from the rolls when DOJ tells them to, as these actions would violate federal law. **We’ve already had success stopping Trump in the courts:** His DOJ lost its first attempt to obtain an unredacted voter file in California, and we expect a federal court in Oregon to hand him another defeat soon. Derek, Donald Trump and his administration think they can threaten and intimidate us into silence and compliance through violence and coercion. But they’re wrong. **The DNC will stand with local elected officials and with our states to fight like hell for our democracy.** And to Donald Trump, Pam Bondi, Kristi Noem, and Greg Bovino, we have a message for you: Get ICE the hell out of Minnesota. Now. To everyone who has read this far, thank you for your time, your energy, and your efforts. Keep showing up. Keep caring. Keep standing up for one another. That’s how we honor the memories of Alex Pretti and Renee Good, and how we keep fighting for those who are being targeted by the ruthless cruelty of this administration. Yours in the fight, Ken Ken Martin
Chair
Democratic National Committee

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

name: Keith Ellison
subject: Standing up for Minnesotans in court
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Abdul for U
body:
I’m suing the Department of Homeland Security to stop their dangerous, illegal, and unconstitutional operation in Minnesota.
Peter,
I’m suing the Department of Homeland Security to stop their dangerous, illegal, and unconstitutional operation in Minnesota.
Thousands of armed, masked, and poorly trained federal agents are terrorizing the Twin Cities. They’ve brazenly and repeatedly used excessive force against Minnesotans, arrested and threatened innocent bystanders, and conducted militarized raids in schools, churches, hospitals, and other sensitive locations.
This violates the law, the First and Tenth Amendment, and the Constitution’s guarantee of equal sovereignty.
No one should be stopped, questioned, or targeted by ICE solely because of how they look, how they speak, or where they come from. No parent should have to wonder if their child will come home safely from school. And no business should have to shut its doors due to fears of violence.
**As Attorney General, I’m doing everything in my power to stop this federal invasion and protect Minnesotans from harm.**
[**Will you split a donation of any amount between our campaign and Abdul El-Sayed to support us as we fight to stop ICE and their unlawful behavior?**](https://act.abdulformichigan.com/go/507?c0=partner_em2601ddke_abdulelsayed.mklscE&amount=5&refcode=em20260126-1608&t=2&akid=1609%2E251025%2EdY7PWB)

Thank you,
Keith Ellison
Minnesota Attorney General

I know I’ve been emailing you a lot, asking you to speak out, push back, and fight for Virginia and our country. I couldn’t be more grateful to have supporters like you by my side stepping up during critical moments for our country.

[_**If you’re able, will you make your first donation to my campaign to help Democrats win the midterms and finally put a check on this administration?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124069017/597452555/556305950?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Gratitude_260126_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNkNDNlMy1kNmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DEFe3od1m5666RU89TzrOUkL0D8Wi_r9wC-Z9M-T8Sk=)

As I travel the Commonwealth, I've heard from folks who are fired up and ready to defeat the Republicans in Congress that have spent the last year bending to Trump's every demand.

Let me tell you, I can feel the momentum.

But I've been doing this job long enough to know that no campaign is won overnight. It takes sustained engagement and support from folks like you. A victory in November requires us to build this momentum day by day, until the last voter has cast their ballot.

That's why I’m so grateful for your continued support. The resources we raise now determine how many volunteers we can recruit, how many ads we can put on the airwaves, and how strong our Get Out the Vote operation is in the fall.

**It all starts now, and I'm confident that with committed grassroots supporters like you, we can get the job done.**

[_**Which is why I have to ask: Will you pitch in $5, $10, or whatever you can today? Your contribution right now lays the groundwork for the rest of the year.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124069018/597452556/556305950?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Gratitude_260126_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNkNDNlMy1kNmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DEFe3od1m5666RU89TzrOUkL0D8Wi_r9wC-Z9M-T8Sk=)

Thank you for standing with me.

The fight continues,

Mark **Before you go:**

Republicans will spend whatever it takes to hold onto power, no matter how unpopular their agenda is with voters.

**And they know that there’s no Senate majority for Democrats without Virginia.**

[_**Will you consider a contribution today as an early investment in the campaign infrastructure we're building to reelect Mark Warner and flip control of Congress? Your donation today will have a much bigger impact than a donation of the same amount made right before the midterm elections.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124069019/597452557/556305950?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Gratitude_260126_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNkNDNlMy1kNmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DEFe3od1m5666RU89TzrOUkL0D8Wi_r9wC-Z9M-T8Sk=)**__********[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124069020/597452558/556305950?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_Gratitude_260126_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NGNkNDNlMy1kNmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DEFe3od1m5666RU89TzrOUkL0D8Wi_r9wC-Z9M-T8Sk=)**********
