body:
This will be quick.

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124069217/597453243/510768709?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDlhMTNjNC1kN2ZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DDXzaldR4cgSYaxRe3ZvdO4Prt1UmhcIMblrcRvy7U=) I’m fully aware that this year is the best shot we have ever had at flipping MI-4 blue and beating MAGA incumbent Bill Huizenga. Polling shows it’s genuinely a toss-up. But I want to be absolutely clear about this: **I am not in this race to “put up a good fight” or “give Republicans a real scare” or “come closer than Democrats ever have.”** **_[I’m in this race to win it](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124069218/597453244/819412648?amounts=5,10,15,25,50,100,250,500&amount=25&refcode=email_012726_inittowin&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDlhMTNjNC1kN2ZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=2DDXzaldR4cgSYaxRe3ZvdO4Prt1UmhcIMblrcRvy7U=)_** — because that’s the only way we actually deliver real change. I’m in this race to fight for your basic freedoms, make your life more affordable, end the constant billionaire handouts — and bring some long-overdue accountability to the Trump administration. I’m in this race to give MI-4 a representative in Congress who puts their families first, delivers real progress, and actually shows up for work — something we’ve gone without for far too long. **I’m in this race to flip the House blue and put our country on track for a future that is better than our present.** **_[If you’re with me that Democrats can’t be satisfied with getting “close” this year— and if you agree that it’s time to fight and _win_ — then I could really use your support, because we’re in a neck-and-neck race against MAGA incumbent Bill Huizenga. clean_body: This will be quick. = I’m fully aware that this year is the best shot we have ever had at flipping MI-4 blue and beating MAGA incumbent Bill Huizenga. Polling shows it’s genuinely a toss-up. But I want to be absolutely clear about this: I am not in this race to “put up a good fight” or “give Republicans a real scare” or “come closer than Democrats ever have.” = — because that’s the only way we actually deliver real change. I’m in this race to fight for your basic freedoms, make your life more affordable, end the constant billionaire handouts — and bring some long-overdue accountability to the Trump administration. I’m in this race to give MI-4 a representative in Congress who puts their families first, delivers real progress, and actually shows up for work — something we’ve gone without for far too long. clean_body: there, I hope you are well! Folks might've killed to have my job. I was a sideline reporter for pro football and basketball. I covered some of the most exciting games in history. I watched sports for a living. And I loved every minute, every touchdown, and every Hail Mary. I reached the pinnacle of my career... but there was one problem: I had to watch what I said. I was a public-facing representative for a world-class sports network. I couldn't share everything I believed, and no one really knew I was a Conservative. So I hung up my press badge and quit my dream job so I could speak my mind. was the hardest decision I've ever made. I was scared, excited, and liberated - all at the same time. People said I was OUT OF MY MIND. But I knew God was leading me in a certain direction, and that 's no time for half-measures. I knew he had a plan for my life. So I took a leap of faith and never looked back. I believe God put me here for a reason. I believe Minnesota is the land of 10,000 problems right now. And I believe a no-BS, sane person who 's ALL-IN can win this seat. But I 'd be lying if I said fundraising doesn't make a difference in a race like this. The far-Left is readying a FORTUNE to drown out our message and take this seat out of play. Our path to victory solely depends on raising enough to keep up. My finance team tells me we 'll need to bring in 10,000 founding donors ASAP so we can: 1) Hire staff, 2) Recruit volunteers in every corner of the state, 3) Print yard signs, 4) Launch our first advertising blitz, and 5) Start contacting on-the-fence voters. I 'm afraid that'll make the difference between a winning campaign and a losing one. put my career on hold to speak out for what I know to be true. I 'm committing my blood, sweat, and tears to take this seat back from the political class. I 'd be honored if you'd be willing to stand alongside me. Donations in these early days make the biggest impact on our path to victory. I hope you 'll join us, but either way, God bless you! Be brave. Do good. - Michele TafoyaRepublican for Senate, Minnesota official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! I wanted you to hear this DIRECTLY from me! | | Thanks to YOU , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. We’ve done SO much, and it’s truly been a HELL OF A RIDE. Our border is SHUT , gas prices have hit a FIVE-YEAR LOW , inflation is UNDER CONTROL , the economy is BOOMING , and the USA is finally RESPECTED again. The Democrats CAN’T STAND that the American people are winning again, and they’ll USE EVERY DIRTY TACTIC possible to destroy our progress. And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after YOU! I’m just standing in their way. We’ve been through HELL together, and NOTHING has torn our bond apart. Unlike the Democrats, I UNDERSTAND how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream. And I NEVER forget who I’m fighting for: YOU, Patriot! Together, we will finish what we started. Together, we will keep MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. — President Donald J. The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=93fbac8ab614495daa7b3ba7d1352fa4&_e=Oic83NHCBz3NvUrfiNu4b156HBk9m68Js5ZONy6yOD6QQagGkzQallJHdXdMhTpgwRvgmJVTGSLZBXf6yWHbvctKJnjIrP0PjAn_Jx2mxsB4FYHVp2aBMkKJPF5vhbd-dEDpyhwLygfkA-ztz3BlLnilSPVLjAxlOYJrCBtuM8T-xgwh6GJP9t78MYUeLFgvTruuEQMnYgxBvRXr6vrxbiRFvmW4HrTZ0hSh-P52opyeQgql6ZaBacl25zrec6bKV8-Gs00yqtSqKC2xxgQPUjCx0_g2ph3GWQGLmQTPqNwarT52BeREOHfKzbq8kl7rgWM5YcTI8ukgFTx_y7Sbjnvq4NAni6r-toOZDyXtoF2bdsLPvhF6EmAua6tq0wXYQ9yaDfPhpGUteLG6msoW_FXW1DaE42BiK3YTdXmEgHCs5XxE2vixV838ycSOxTsP2GUWlPcQCaVb9_vDPK0s5pXPviDf1yQ8Z5eBHnWobKCW-i4iKx6-9bK4lnoDmLrqgq8AHZUaSi2mlQma9An-xZuGfz8EBQDZ6w18mIx3ke7f-Yn8N-Y8Uwh8AeC-W6BEB0yrsitPKhkCjU5DELlb7nwVhj13ZPw5czHf1QdxZSPe0O3Oha87aqnFlSyKeY2zZ0wJfM4KqNqueWuKLfsNVtmPSmMfFYFNRUNvjnNBxYSN4OD55flwlqOdBfE3LzRUeEtV4yefULU-PTjp5FKmbFncJhRHrrNaA-I1Nn7YSfCBLvh-R4ddigx_vFuLCj8U)

Fellow Conservative,

When hardworking Minnesotans like you pay taxes to feed hungry children, the last thing we expect is for those funds to be used to buy luxury cars, overseas properties, and lavish lifestyles for scammers.

But that's precisely what happened right here in Minnesota with the Feeding Our Future scandal – over $250 million in federal child nutrition dollars stolen through fake claims, phony sites, and outright fraud.

As a retired Navy SEAL who's spent my life fighting for America and holding the line on accountability, I believe anyone who betrays our trust like this – especially if they're naturalized citizens – should face severe consequences, and illegal aliens need to be deported!

**If you don’t have time to finish this entire email, please do me a quick favor and answer the question below:**

_**Should we deport any naturalized citizen who steals from the American taxpayer?**_

[**TAKE THE QUICK SURVEY
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=93fbac8ab614495daa7b3ba7d1352fa4&_e=Oic83NHCBz3NvUrfiNu4b156HBk9m68Js5ZONy6yOD6QQagGkzQallJHdXdMhTpgwRvgmJVTGSLZBXf6yWHbvctKJnjIrP0PjAn_Jx2mxsB4FYHVp2aBMkKJPF5vhbd-dEDpyhwLygfkA-ztz3BlLnilSPVLjAxlOYJrCBtuM8T-xgwh6GJP9t78MYUeLFgvTruuEQMnYgxBvRXr6vrxbiRFvmW4HrTZ0hSh-P52opyeQgql6ZaBacl25zrec6bKV8-Gs00yqtSqKC2xxgQPUr0xgY5MD0L9RHLM8aUS5EYAyG5YulK0w1ilko9Z7nx609eCf37utlmUPvbU1bpCoLK_zF0Besi0NKwl0YgcosoqYkuolfdppAgM0_z4y7ciU-K2hcOjrzeSH0UgSpI1YXCAxO73VbYmvl1yHiYEzhjwJJzyDLd1ltd_FR0ltojaICf0NdSy-VMXdZX-tPrX6F-2oCVZ0sYC8sGLNvWCdIjMgVBn9JbxR5nVGgt0tTm94A3N6FSEmrw5BfgOKdkIsl6ukbxWvGfALhdZGzR8aRq1PV17BiP3PEVMRLX55Hwpc4Ngq1K2HXueE6O8ZrJOhVj3tYMElSAfWxxJ5vXM2DKWbxeZR6wYKK8_xRe6IGrmLfDH90fZz_Kaoqlukds5Q_9AUFm9wUOsYJdROFW4TXeJBNsnMtqLiKhsT7EtNGYcaZC7ehRosGOJLd_viacSgfkarv4G8HkD5X3dkXTwK4SSWA7xRdbN1HnE2045glGu)
Prosecutors have already secured dozens of convictions, with assets including Porsches and millions of dollars in cash being seized. But **we need stronger laws to ensure this never happens again** and to send a clear message: Fraud against American taxpayers will not be tolerated.

The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it.

**Now, we need to turn our eyes to the open United States Senate seat, where I’m a Republican candidate.**

I support the introduction of bold new measures in Congress to crack down on these schemes. I need to hear from you – **[do you back deporting those found guilty of massive fraud like this?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=93fbac8ab614495daa7b3ba7d1352fa4&_e=Oic83NHCBz3NvUrfiNu4b156HBk9m68Js5ZONy6yOD6QQagGkzQallJHdXdMhTpgwRvgmJVTGSLZBXf6yWHbvctKJnjIrP0PjAn_Jx2mxsB4FYHVp2aBMkKJPF5vhbd-dEDpyhwLygfkA-ztz3BlLnilSPVLjAxlOYJrCBtuM8T-xgwh6GJP9t78MYUeLFgvTruuEQMnYgxBvRXr6vrxbiRFvmW4HrTZ0hSh-P52opyeQgql6ZaBacl25zrec6bKV8-Gs00yqtSqKC2xxgQPUu1Rd7kK96QHvb8nScnkqAmzczn5SpLMRDJ_rjLEyWD35Td1GHjxXaxGwdOmYd4NkVCaIfzGP8nZ7fcsaaJ3dRoDrUPA7Q4huyrDYJunirf_Ngwklf_tqORwAd7m-MyTruz0NNsqBp5IZjbS1MG2RAN63wyL4vDOOX0YMSpAID3KduOnKKTDkY4iWOpu_SxioWPJNLkEcUPW62JS0Pd0cDnDRs6pLA8tTyEIjOlJ8oLlFpGuyeZwDKHEs5vkNOkiM5JbivNt1YlSEgfp4lIXd-MbwgqZLiX59WeDNNF1ibT9d9OGRwJkkadE65CKsL1ca5bNHOIbjddAN7vDB0Rh8WvT8zJqmHi90mEIj1daKVbCzThYxjcE6L4A4sj8tSyXm6VSsUkJbES4FYZsbErGNv8Mt4fNHY3xrq_dIAPIMttIXF-F-3rEPaFtenjLsKASB8u1DKfw4uRlYrbBvzvxhOmFHNvdI47atcgMuLROb2az)**

**[Your input will guide my fight in the Senate to protect Minnesota families and restore integrity to our systems.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=93fbac8ab614495daa7b3ba7d1352fa4&_e=Oic83NHCBz3NvUrfiNu4b156HBk9m68Js5ZONy6yOD6QQagGkzQallJHdXdMhTpgwRvgmJVTGSLZBXf6yWHbvctKJnjIrP0PjAn_Jx2mxsB4FYHVp2aBMkKJPF5vhbd-dEDpyhwLygfkA-ztz3BlLnilSPVLjAxlOYJrCBtuM8T-xgwh6GJP9t78MYUeLFgvTruuEQMnYgxBvRXr6vrxbiRFvmW4HrTZ0hSh-P52opyeQgql6ZaBacl25zrec6bKV8-Gs00yqtSqKC2xxgQPUqjD11xeWjztJhGQQLCj8dwEF1dzAyZ2oT0FzBTa-z9iWn6j2bf9pSQ1thJ2d0KiQeFpHgiHjn_YmsryYkzILGlcO2iLjrFya9eh-qbsLGs_4B3zWTP8bjNwlqkqQTItOETcbZ6pjht9SdYlPWfnOpR0chYa9wu-WPpFoen_8DEEo3BkwL0SJRJ_nj6Fge12m6WIFiiXOYZchmfyKqpKM87DoT_ne3X7BHp9i8sZpaUN5RrSj3vCNMiN4jFSwwKFlsDU_WHNo85GJAaWMNkXq5LgsA8XA4Vkb3BV8-O4cujMbW6xI30PnhaT2O1A939mAAxGUEZzyFHoIEf1ijlHovPTPCfPYasbfGtzk9JbYvZZy-M1ltDNfEv2VQydZveFA86ni_YTgitnaWDrB5fwAwCPSdgkfaDwoMQVEx4j7gvp_4buJz8F3krfBxmiJ6GrgiA4RsGxwVeTor6G5KBcPCwQVcLTWeY7Gp4H-d9uOESF)**

We've seen enough excuses and weak oversight. It's time for leadership that puts America – and Minnesotans – first.

For love of country,
Adam Schwarze
Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota

clean_body: The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. | Fellow Conservative, When hardworking Minnesotans like you pay taxes to feed hungry children, the last thing we expect is for those funds to be used to buy luxury cars, overseas properties, and lavish lifestyles for scammers. But that's precisely what happened right here in Minnesota with the Feeding Our Future scandal – over $250 million in federal child nutrition dollars stolen through fake claims, phony sites, and outright fraud. As a retired Navy SEAL who's spent my life fighting for America and holding the line on accountability, I believe anyone who betrays our trust like this – especially if they're naturalized citizens – should face severe consequences, and illegal aliens need to be deported! If you don’t have time to finish this entire email, please do me a quick favor and answer the question below: Should we deport any naturalized citizen who steals from the American taxpayer? Prosecutors have already secured dozens of convictions, with assets including Porsches and millions of dollars in cash being seized. But we need stronger laws to ensure this never happens again and to send a clear message: Fraud against American taxpayers will not be tolerated. The first step in this journey has been accomplished: Tim Walz is out of the governor’s race. This happened on his watch, and he did absolutely nothing to stop it. Now, we need to turn our eyes to the open United States Senate seat, where I’m a Republican candidate. I support the introduction of bold new measures in Congress to crack down on these schemes. I need to hear from you – We've seen enough excuses and weak oversight. It's time for leadership that puts America – and Minnesotans – first. For love of country, Adam Schwarze Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

name: Jasmine Crockett
subject: Republicans want you to forget Epstein. I won’t.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JASMINE FOR TEXAS Jasmine for Texas
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124070998/597459364/-1529437191?refcode=260126_E1A7_JC_Epstein&refcode2=9ea73bd0-d8fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&contactdata=TRebOsHdjWJfsjbTQB5XkTWUlfF9C7ZEFIH/eo/YRPOdumD3YVZqFmY7wjMzSi8B&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDMwOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI5ZWE3M2JkMC1kOGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hKYz2l1tdA1kPzk9bD-AsjtNy2s5lSVZ7b3O8W0hBlk=) | | Y’all, Republicans are trying to move on from the Epstein investigation. Not because the questions were answered, but because the truth is inconvenient for the powerful people they protect. They want this buried. Forgotten. Quietly shoved off the front page while they pretend nothing happened. _**That is not acceptable to me.**_ We must hold Jeffrey Epstein accountable for the abuse, the trafficking and the network of powerful people who enabled it. I will stand up for survivors. I will not protect a system that bends over backwards to shield the rich and connected while telling everyone else to move along. **But Republicans don’t want to talk about it anymore._Funny how that works._** **I don’t back down when things get uncomfortable. I don’t suddenly lose interest when the spotlight makes people nervous. body:
I need you on my grassroots team

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=2032%2E49239%2Eq68z_K)
Null, I wanted to follow up to make sure you got my note.
---
I'm still looking for another 157 grassroots Democrats to personally endorse my campaign to become Michigan's next senator, and **I noticed you haven't had a chance to add your name yet.**
**That's why I'm humbly asking:[_Will you personally endorse my campaign to keep Michigan blue, take back the Senate for Democrats, and put a stop to Trump's disastrous agenda?_](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12688?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=2&akid=2032%2E49239%2Eq68z_K)**
| | [ADD YOUR NAME](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12688?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=3&akid=2032%2E49239%2Eq68z_K)
---
Thank you for your support. It means the world to have you by my side in this race.
Haley Stevens
\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: **Haley Stevens**
Subject: What people like you have been telling me
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12689?t=4&akid=2032%2E49239%2Eq68z_K)
---
Hi null,

I’ve been on the road, visiting communities all across Michigan – and everywhere I go, I hear the same things:
🩺 People are anxious about affording health care.
🛟 They’re worried about the future of Medicare and Social Security.

💰 Grocery prices are too damn high.

👷 Working Michiganders want real action to create and protect good-paying jobs.

🗳️ And many are deeply concerned about our civil rights, democracy, and basic freedoms.
These aren’t political talking points – they’re real concerns from real people. And that’s exactly why I’m running for U.S. Senate in Michigan. Because when I see a problem, I get to work:
✅ I helped save 200,000 Michigan jobs as part of President Obama’s Auto Rescue Task Force.

✅ I led the charge to bring semiconductor manufacturing back to Michigan.

✅ I introduced the No Tariffs on Groceries Act to stop reckless food tariffs that are raising grocery prices.

✅ And I filed articles of impeachment against RFK Jr. for endangering public health.
I was recently named one of the most effective lawmakers in Congress – because I pride myself on showing up, listening, and delivering for working families.

Now I’m bringing that same grit to this battleground Senate race. With polls showing I’m the Democrat best positioned to defeat MAGA Republican Mike Rogers, GOP megadonors are set to spend millions to flip this seat red.
So I’m asking: _[**Will you be one of the 15,000 grassroots supporters we need to endorse this campaign before midnight tonight? We're 18% short, and your name would mean a lot, null. >>**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12688?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=5&akid=2032%2E49239%2Eq68z_K)_
| | [Add Your Name](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12688?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=6&akid=2032%2E49239%2Eq68z_K)
---
Thank you for standing with me.
With grit and gratitude,

Haley Stevens
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12688?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=7&akid=2032%2E49239%2Eq68z_K) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12689?t=8&akid=2032%2E49239%2Eq68z_K)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley

name: Team AOC
subject: An ICE officer executed Alex Pretti in the street.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
Alexandria appeared on CNN this weekend; here’s what she had to say:
#
On Saturday, an ICE officer executed Alex Pretti in the street in Minneapolis.
Alexandria appeared on CNN shortly after, and here’s what she had to say regarding the incident:
Immediately preceding the incident, an ICE officer had violently pushed a woman to the ground and he had come over to help get her up. That is what precipitated this incident that very quickly led to an execution, a deadly shooting, in the street.
**What we are seeing here is a pivotal moment for the United States and I cannot underscore enough how precipitous this moment is.**
Between ICE and CBP, we will see which agencies were responsible.
But at the end of the day, under the so-called excuse of border security — where Minneapolis is over 300 miles from the United States border — we have an unleashing of federal agents, exerting a tremendous amount of violence and loss of life against the American people, who are well within their First Amendment rights, and in this case, it seems as though well within their Second Amendment rights.
In the video currently circulating online, you do not see immediate evidence of anyone reaching for a firearm.
It has been reported that Alex Pretti had a legal permit. This administration's response has been that the fact that he was a legal firearm owner was a reason for them to shoot him in the street. If you see directly from DHS's own accounts, they themselves do not claim anything in their accounts or their evidence about any precipitating action — just the fact that he was armed.
This is a pivotal moment and if we do not do something now to contain this abuse of power and violence, I do not know what can happen afterwards because the Trump administration has already indicated earlier this week about discussions to use the Insurrection Act against Americans based on their political affiliation.
**We have to contain this chaos.**
This administration is declaring an openness and a justification for violence against American citizens based on their organizing, based on their political affiliation — and they are using the guise of the Department of Homeland Security to do it.
We have to draw a line in the sand now across sectors — politically, economically, in our media and more.
Do not let this administration intimidate you out of using your First Amendment right to organize and mobilize against what we know is wrong.
We must remember: we outnumber them. We can't allow them to divide us. We must stay united to fight for a better future for all of us.
**[You can support vetted, grassroots organizations in Minnesota who are leading resistance and relief efforts in this critical moment. Click here to learn more at StandWithMinnesota.com →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35628?source=em20260126-10655-P_ENG_RES_GRM&t=1&akid=10655%2E2526796%2EYkssBj)**
**[StandWithMinnesota.com](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/35628?source=em20260126-10655-P_ENG_RES_GRM&t=2&akid=10655%2E2526796%2EYkssBj)**
Thank you for reading,
Team AOC

[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=3&akid=10655%2E2526796%2EYkssBj) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=4&akid=10655%2E2526796%2EYkssBj) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=5&akid=10655%2E2526796%2EYkssBj) | [](https://bsky.app/profile/aoc.bsky.social?t=6&akid=10655%2E2526796%2EYkssBj)
---|---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=7&akid=10655%2E2526796%2EYkssBj)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=8&akid=10655%2E2526796%2EYkssBj)

Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress

Hi team, it’s Emma, Chris Pappas’s Digital Director.
If you haven’t heard from me before, hello! 👋 I know you get a lot of emails from our campaign, but I wanted to personally give you an update.
_A LOT is happening on the ground here in New Hampshire:_
🔴 **Senate Republicans recruited John Sununu into the race** -- because they know he’s their best chance at flipping this seat red.
📉 Election experts _**downgraded**_ Democrats’ chances of defending this open seat -- shifting the race toward a GOP flip.
📊 Polling shows this race is **TIED** -- proving that _New Hampshire is and has always been a purple state._
Democrats’ path to the Senate majority depends on keeping New Hampshire blue -- and I know that with this grassroots team, we can do it.
**But since we missed our fundraising goal last quarter, we need to ramp up our January fundraising right now to catch up.**
**[Can you chip in $5 to power this campaign, defend this open seat, and help flip the Senate blue this November?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260126_1.Jetza9&refcode=em20260126-1&t=2&akid=4782%2E582294%2ELOBf_e)**

name: Jeremy Moss
subject: We cannot have ICE agents act as masked vigilantes in our communities
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeremy Moss for Congress
body:
Even in this heightened political climate, our government must be transparent and accountable to the public. In the Legislature, we haven’t changed our procedures to take votes in secret when making laws. In the same way, officers should also be transparent and accountable when enforcing laws.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124074240/597467656/680287355?refcode=BLU_EM_MOSS_2026-01-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc5OTIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTNiNmI4NTgtZGRmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=5Uf034cR6v8maJTbTFdLu7DwEaWpNG7TOgpA8mkB0Ug=)
---
| Peter,

I recently introduced legislation to require ICE agents in Michigan to wear uniforms that identify themselves and ban them from wearing masks to conceal their identities.

We cannot have law enforcement act as masked vigilantes in our communities.

Even in this heightened political climate, our government must be transparent and accountable to the public. In the Legislature, we haven’t changed our procedures to take votes in secret when making laws. In the same way, officers should also be transparent and accountable when enforcing laws.

My bill is about restoring trust, protecting our communities, and ensuring power is never exercised in the shadows.

I’m running for Congress because we need leaders who aren’t afraid to show up in the face of adversity and challenge the status quo.

body:
Hi folks! I just made it official: I‘m running for U.S. Senate!
[](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5c1e985072474f38a3c89fb648c88dc2&_e=G-FpJ2EVAK9cE2fcahwEsjzviYmJ2_kHLZQebd_XSteb8d0v6mjM2I8AtWoDhl8TgakxoC8qt0rakSrI4XwIVLoOjO_XDTN_T48396mef4jcFi6yyjylGKtm4I2J1IFpvu2HDikrrRfTMcl4GEeYT9wufgmGTqxz1C7EvqptPbvO0ODMDtCa0O_LOmY_8PyFz27UOzQluct-r7Jzb1janey8INmqGVxg6HJdf8y3EnhYBsx8v4YGU7XfnVhdZNLCV5qxK-DSU5e04-eN5-umZOFPdQRSZ2QRgHiEBRSVknl1Mb3WZlADvrTuDZOHBkMmylKX_N8uZNLpwTi7Nv8vySOlndGpPuOI2e2xNvOGrbJVao_oIvheMxqKQwpmmuQMjVNIM4xuDs5WQXFrYeAMI7Uyhs7H5vhpxncMDMrZ67wXUlKb5w3RQeQKz6HkCD_mjriJgNk-31PkX3S-nZy9C1DZhbtDV9oVRyipQ_f8uLuSWhtB4Dx_hz0HMQMRVcTWztVQaWuDAFB1Mf6hZVn7_yj1OoQl758T_Qwo2UngkQmvp55WWHxRUybXf7dc5e_u9-zpiNQLVg0ISulbb-9R7tT1yL9YG3t8iEUujZS84YRV6xSdEOu-0Iaz3TBfFoIxgHh-AKnD3MrgvM7Kj07SaC9ch0hU6-ixQy4SfXqKdwDIDgTUFeBGQ0UWUvIsQJ-tcwjRRFLFLLoOg9MXhRSR1JVeSGU_0QE-PB3tz4qzfkUBvx9_sinw9KNbnbxPkmiyxFUYRyq6Uwh7HNet449ToA%3D%3D)Folks - my name is Michele Tafoya. **
**I made a career as a sideline reporter for some of the biggest moments in sports history. I spent many Sunday evenings out on the gridiron. And I 've interviewed all-time greats, including Peyton Manning, Patrick Mahomes, and many others who changed the game forever. **
**Now I 'm ready to make a big change myself.**
**With the disaster that failed leadership has brought us to in Minnesota, I just made it official: I'm running for U.S. Senate in my home state of Minnesota!
Before I go on, this will be one of the most consequential Senate races in the entire country - is there anything I can say to convince you to become a [FOUNDING DONOR](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5c1e985072474f38a3c89fb648c88dc2&_e=G-FpJ2EVAK9cE2fcahwEsjzviYmJ2_kHLZQebd_XSteb8d0v6mjM2I8AtWoDhl8TgakxoC8qt0rakSrI4XwIVLoOjO_XDTN_T48396mef4jcFi6yyjylGKtm4I2J1IFpvu2HDikrrRfTMcl4GEeYT9wufgmGTqxz1C7EvqptPbvO0ODMDtCa0O_LOmY_8PyFz27UOzQluct-r7Jzb1janey8INmqGVxg6HJdf8y3EnhYBsx8v4YGU7XfnVhdZNLCV5qxK-DSU5e04-eN5-umZNDg5kw4ujl05bDB2xtC6gU17p97QAPWuzOlo8GmojqcaCGXFoU6tNWwf2NeO9BZV2d-_X51rw79PdisbhqQ_nf00ifpcuHORRestKoN6WR8-OnUgFmfCPmI8S4EE133na1lLBMdw3deUYMV3xvpbEkGwen2rmKm0muQzR-kj7CdG17AdMlle7nGBHRDXPfTmkieKEnQbu5VkOnvvibvssc3wrmpBspJvKjgwh7aPysC7e5AnhHRlUHkUq5CC1UMDZiCfSX5LFacQrB5TAGiIQo7bYi9ceb_zzHPxIO9VQurHSnOhA5ysjiLXRhCqD03FPEHgVkrGuXcwae7PQrH71evWnoC4-c_uCPFlT9qg1OCvbc_E7Poq_X2rOWnieATJ453vq6w-nezWi-GV431z0OSYtB1E5-4jcXnqF0hJdK4m1HFoUX2X5inJxWgeof_yWx6Ay-2fHpA6oiO-DD8A9UFgngjX0B2MvKRJ67vAU3aVmtvq1ieHlD90TaPX_2XlA%3D%3D) to my new campaign? [](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5c1e985072474f38a3c89fb648c88dc2&_e=G-FpJ2EVAK9cE2fcahwEsjzviYmJ2_kHLZQebd_XSteb8d0v6mjM2I8AtWoDhl8TgakxoC8qt0rakSrI4XwIVLoOjO_XDTN_T48396mef4jcFi6yyjylGKtm4I2J1IFpvu2HDikrrRfTMcl4GEeYT9wufgmGTqxz1C7EvqptPbvO0ODMDtCa0O_LOmY_8PyFz27UOzQluct-r7Jzb1janey8INmqGVxg6HJdf8y3EnhYBsx8v4YGU7XfnVhdZNLCV5qxK-DSU5e04-eN5-umZIH1PdmJzy0Xz0H9E7n6-l-Tky3HQmrFSEUFKI8OD94Y_IhKKgsoFMTAgPvkNdgqJwK5JKCbAnkQ2PhECdbIru-UdxXV1Eo3Qp95IJRfpdaBJgQX0Xi9PR4_iIUq_HRO7eb31d9LdLIPopVeAUNzUtfu2PZ1v46wfGPjtmRsSvxruuJHpxD5nMgciqE8uFNqJN8h2AvuIsrxgvsoJGU5AvuM-gkx6occLKENJBe4DYvtwXfMquoMTIsDryl6E-2MY20E8NKjc6vnmV97Axqq4GpOzSvyJngaGMQhvtf5iqSeiVpGmYHcqoQxdLSsNjeWkowDzhZ4Oz0_ACVSh3qqueXziMvxbh6epaibBYUP4Dyl6Ux-z8O0IK5eppWjVqrdD-dzaLIBAfahlrjM43vN3voosttOv4AyMA1XApq-n09L-2COAfrtEpOaXXmiuSA_13OqNTAzxVLwwNixnC2GD4b66_1MRvakpqi2cmgW1OM2pdSZATx8ZWmW37ehA5TSWw%3D%3D)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR
](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=5c1e985072474f38a3c89fb648c88dc2&_e=G-FpJ2EVAK9cE2fcahwEsjzviYmJ2_kHLZQebd_XSteb8d0v6mjM2I8AtWoDhl8TgakxoC8qt0rakSrI4XwIVLoOjO_XDTN_T48396mef4jcFi6yyjylGKtm4I2J1IFpvu2HDikrrRfTMcl4GEeYT9wufgmGTqxz1C7EvqptPbvO0ODMDtCa0O_LOmY_8PyFz27UOzQluct-r7Jzb1janey8INmqGVxg6HJdf8y3EnhYBsx8v4YGU7XfnVhdZNLCV5qxK-DSU5e04-eN5-umZG1F8b9fFxhr9PEr2SxT8414_ADDAF5be7VkGT6MIBL4vh_cCokmgovvDgFdC9hPZtZJXp1NKnYXttmJEUDbYZ79pulWaHrqvmQbQnWkxuJPMPy1JH8Ot6tLZlepwYjkLjZIXcWqSgmx7J9wBJBeELu8IvKN-2nfWAp5CA2bYepRfEtXgGIZszwrylYKcOg3sXSnvOzxT4joikz7OT9cDyCvxwWVkJI1Qu8y13s0Usf28YpyVYhF3Ia8XmTjX_bn0L9v0WrO89OZnqSDUYfUxdCLSPMvE-HEWM7xJQtsuJs2Z5XNzQeD8eI99ajYw7hvG1APK7VjT5l09mnCbVAdygwstMS6czH-Mde-srrpGHbWXc4fucZLWh2fxFNhDRSSKHHYcEOWUTrgaK22qPvP8gADgQrByFkYbeaSWXWRYQW1mkVh0wyT6Nikp7GX_aI9AE1O99rvCOQxpPsByaEv4ljNL4gptn8Dz1uiZ55F--pya-1kdkYDcOzFb_gKn-v0Ew%3D%3D)I never in my life thought I'd be sending you this email. **
**I 'm not a politician, I haven't run for office before, and elected office wasn't really an endgame I'd ever thought about. But what Tim Walz, the far-Left, and the career politicians have done to our state forced me to reconsider, including when they ... **
**- STORMED our churches to intimidate worshippers - SQUANDERED our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares- DEMONIZED our brave cops and border agents- ALLOWED men into women's locker rooms - TAXED us into oblivion with zero tangible benefits - SUED the Trump Admin to allow boys in girls' sports- OPENED our borders to millions of illegal immigrants- FORCED divisive propaganda into our classrooms**
**As a sports professional, patriot, Catholic, granddaughter of legal immigrants, wife, and mama bear, they've come after just about everything I care about most. So I had a choice to make: 1) let my state and country descend into ruin, or 2) take a leap of faith to fix it. **
**Experts and consultants told me running for Senate in Minnesota was a fool 's errand. **
**After all, we have a far-Left Governor and two far-Left Senators, Minnesota has been a blue state since Nixon, and it 's the ONLY STATE Ronald Reagan didn't win. **
**But blazing my own trail has never scared me. I made history on TV and won four Emmys for my sports coverage. I 've taken on longer odds than this - and I beat them. **

clean_body: Hi folks! I just made it official: I‘m running for U.S. Senate! - my name is Michele Tafoya. I made a career as a sideline reporter for some of the biggest moments in sports history. I spent many Sunday evenings out on the gridiron. And I 've interviewed all-time greats, including Peyton Manning, Patrick Mahomes, and many others who changed the game forever. Now I 'm ready to make a big change myself. With the disaster that failed leadership has brought us to in Minnesota, I just made it official: I'm running for U.S. Senate in my home state of Minnesota! Before I go on, this will be one of the most consequential Senate races in the entire country - is there anything I can say to convince you to become a to my new campaign? never in my life thought I'd be sending you this email. I 'm not a politician, I haven't run for office before, and elected office wasn't really an endgame I'd ever thought about. But what Tim Walz, the far-Left, and the career politicians have done to our state forced me to reconsider, including when they ... - STORMED our churches to intimidate worshippers - SQUANDERED our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares- DEMONIZED our brave cops and border agents- ALLOWED men into women's locker rooms - TAXED us into oblivion with zero tangible benefits - SUED the Trump Admin to allow boys in girls' sports- OPENED our borders to millions of illegal immigrants- FORCED divisive propaganda into our classrooms As a sports professional, patriot, Catholic, granddaughter of legal immigrants, wife, and mama bear, they've come after just about everything I care about most. So I had a choice to make: 1) let my state and country descend into ruin, or 2) take a leap of faith to fix it. Experts and consultants told me running for Senate in Minnesota was a fool 's errand. After all, we have a far-Left Governor and two far-Left Senators, Minnesota has been a blue state since Nixon, and it 's the ONLY STATE Ronald Reagan didn't win. But blazing my own trail has never scared me. I made history on TV and won four Emmys for my sports coverage. I 've taken on longer odds than this - and I beat them. I'm taking on Tim Walz's inner circle, the DC power brokers, and the political class who have sold us out for too long. Luckily, there are a lot more of us than there are of them! Now that I have made my decision, my path to winning this Senate race is in your hands. The ONLY way we can flip this seat is by out-organizing, out-working, and out-raising our opponents. That last part is important - because if we can't get our message out far and wide, this race is over and the far-Left wins. | | ---|--- This just became one of the biggest Senate races in the entire country. I mean it. I'm already hearing that the career politicians are terrified of my campaign. They 're scared because 120+ million people saw a viral video showcasing rampant fraud happening under Tim Walz's watch. They 're scared because folks know who I am and they know I don't take BS from anyone - not from players on the field and certainly not from some empty suits in DC. And they 're scared because they know that if the American people have to choose between fraud, incompetence, special interests, and powerful party bosses... And honesty, common sense, and plain talk - the political class is in for a reckoning. Are you with me? I can 't do this without you! Thanks for taking the time to read this email! Together, we 're going to make history - I can feel it in my bones. Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele Tafoya Republican for Senate, Minnesota It's official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:** | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

| Peter,
Minneapolis is not alone in this fight for our democracy.
In the wake of the killings of Renee Good and Alex Pretti, and after Attorney General Pam Bondi all but admitted that the ICE invasion is being used to extort Minnesota into handing over voter records, one thing is now painfully clear: this was never just about immigration.

Trump is using ICE as part of an all-out assault on our democracy.
Many of the states now facing ICE invasions are the very states where Defend Our Courts plans to protect, expand, or build pro-democracy Supreme Court majorities--the courts that ultimately decide election cases and determine whether abuse of power is stopped or allowed to continue.
Here's what we're seeing:

* Kentucky: ICE arrests surged by more than 37% in early 2025. Local law enforcement agencies and county jails are increasingly entangled with ICE enforcement.

* Montana: ICE operations have expanded statewide, with multiple high-profile detentions and arrests.

* Nevada: Arrests are surging in Reno and Las Vegas, and the governor authorized National Guard support for ICE.

* Georgia: The state now ranks fourth nationally in ICE arrests, with National Guard support deployed.

* Michigan: Targeted enforcement surges are underway as part of broader Midwest operations.

* Minnesota: Nearly 2,700 ICE agents have been deployed as part of "Operation Metro Surge."

* North Carolina: A high number of local law enforcement agencies now participate directly in ICE programs.

* Ohio: Enforcement activity has increased, with National Guard support authorized.

* Texas: Over 24,000 people entered ICE custody in just two months during 2025.

* Wisconsin and Kansas: Both are included in expanded Midwestern ICE operations.

It's no coincidence.
MAGA knows elections are run by states, not the federal government. That's why they are pressuring governors, intimidating state officials, and demanding voter records. And that's why state Supreme Courts are now the last line of defense.
With strong, independent, pro-democracy state courts, we can block election interference, protect voter privacy, and hold those who commit brutality on our streets accountable, beyond the reach of presidential pardons.
In 2025, because of supporters like you, we proved this works when we successfully defended the Democrat majority on Pennsylvania's Supreme Court.
As ICE violence ratchets up, so do the stakes.
Protecting our constitutional rights. Holding abusers of power accountable. Stopping a MAGA election rigging.
That is our mission. And we cannot do it without you.

# [](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43706?t=1&akid=240638%2E444211%2ETJ-5tO)
Powered by People is launching a **statewide Vote by Mail & Ballot Chase program** to support voters across Texas ahead of the February vote-by-mail deadline— _and we want you to be part of the team._
Texas vote-by-mail rules are intentionally confusing and without follow-up, too many eligible voters get pushed out of the process. Our job is to make sure that doesn’t happen, and to make sure their vote counts.
Starting this week, vote-by-mail applications will begin landing in mailboxes across the state. Volunteers will step in to follow up, answer questions, and make sure voters have what they need to have their voice heard and vote counted.
You don’t need to be an expert—we’ll train you on everything. You also don’t need to live in Texas—this work can be done from anywhere. What matters is showing up during a short, critical window when every returned application makes a difference.
[**Don’t wait! RSVP today to help protect Texas votes and be part of winning races up and down the ballot. This is the kind of organizing work that wins elections: focused, strategic, and people-powered.**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67468?source=ema20260126-240638&t=3&akid=240638%2E444211%2ETJ-5tO)
**[RSVP TODAY](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/67468?source=ema20260126-240638&t=4&akid=240638%2E444211%2ETJ-5tO)**
Thank you,
Powered by People

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18] | | | | | | Something extraordinary happened just 24 hours after Trump returned to office... Dear Friends,
We're only 4 days away for our FREE Housing Town Hall [NorCalHousingTownHall.eventbrite.com] on Thursday, January 29 in Oakland where I’ll share my plan to increase housing across California and make sure it’s affordable and accessible for the people who live and work here.
I’m honored to be joined by special guest speakers:
* Barbara Lee , Mayor of Oakland
* Jesse Arreguín , State Senator & Chair of the Senate Housing Committee
* Zac Unger , Oakland City Councilmember
NorCal Housing Town Hall
Thursday, January 29

name: Chuck Rocha
subject: 🗓️ REMINDER: Event Happening tomorrow 01/27!
body:
Meet Eva Lopez Chavez – Running for UT-01! | | | |
---
| | | Our dear friends,

We hope you're staying warm and safe. Just a quick reminder that TOMORROW, Jan. 27th, we'll be hosting an [in-person fundraiser](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=1d411ec063&e=b8f90417f9) for Eva Lopez Chavez, Democrat for the newly drawn Utah 1 Congressional District.
---
|
---
| [ ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=832ba482d3&e=b8f90417f9)
---
| [ ](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=59db665f58&e=b8f90417f9)
---
|
---
| **About Eva and her race:**
Eva Lopez Chavez is a doer; where Western grit meets bold, democratic representation and a track record of making things happen. Known to many as the Salt Lake City Councilwoman or a project manager helping deliver housing and real solutions, she’s built a career on action, not talk. Today she’s stepping forward as a candidate for Congress, ready to fight for the communities that raised her. The new Utah 1st Congressional District encapsulates the bluest precincts of Salt Lake County. It’s a district Kamala Harris won by over 23 points in 2024 and a new D+13 baseline that is hungry to support a new generation of leadership.
---
|
---
| Consider supporting Eva’s historic campaign **[ONLINE](https://solidaritystrategies.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=985fddf6f660c0281e297f819&id=38ba74fde3&e=b8f90417f9) **or reply to this email to confirm your attendance if supporting by mail:
**Friends of Eva Lopez Chavez
PO Box 581061
Salt Lake City, UT 84158**

Your support can make all the difference in lifting a historic candidate and energizing Utah’s growing Latino electorate.

We look forward to seeing you TOMORROW!

Thank you,
Chuck Rocha
---
|
---
| [RSVP HERE](mailto:daysi@solidaritystrategies.com?subject=RSVP%20for%20Eva%20Lopez%20Chavez%20Fundraiser&body=Hi%20Daysi!%20Please%20sign%20me%20up%20to%20attend%20the%20Eva%20Lopez%20Chavez%20fundraiser.%20Thanks.%20 "RSVP HERE")

I'm Shawn Harris, and I'm running to bring steady, serious leadership back to a district that's been defined for too long by chaos and embarrassment. After 40 years in uniform, I believe service should look like showing up, listening, and doing the job with dignity. Special elections move fast. There's no long runway. No chance to "build momentum later." **_What we raise in the coming weeks determines whether we can fully fund voter outreach before Election Day -- or whether we're forced to scale back._** Republicans are counting on people forgetting this date. They're counting on low turnout. And they're counting on Democrats assuming someone else will step up. **_I 'm asking you to be the person who does._** [**If you 're able, please make a special contribution today to help me finish this race strong. Every dollar helps me reach one more voter before March 10.**](http://clicksp.shawnharrisforcongress.com/f/a/j9c1r67f0o8pGG-n4cih-Q~~/AAPPABA~/vMmrttdZbyloasVAQ7ihhaEOt1qKNBwKj-m1Qh6uARxCcXV-NT-Mczmd8dQsXnAvhPq-mcQhacrrgFfMNJAjxRLZRLCDX_qXbKkEwBEIiZt2Ua0GgS84AGHfi5Dc4TXacNvwMI3e_IpBe4DuujoezJeGE-8aBGnCFA0IQTO-VvsMfdSsg3HmjBcPbOgREclEXqt0GCXJR8qNd7tMDZlKCCetnWFH05QBW_nWmwKzq4H0lWkOHuZMy2ywsp7_iAt9yemPpPqMJwzvSlMTwiC9PdbqJe5tRS7E_v4R0LruvWlpkG3Hjld03yZjxyrKbnRu) Thank you for circling this moment, and for standing with me when it matters. --Shawn Harris

name: Tim Holbert, American Veterans Center
subject: Fly the flag that flew at Normandy, Korea, and Vietnam

Fellow Patriot, For more than two decades, American Veterans Center has been dedicated to honoring the sacrifice and preserving the legacy of our nation's heroes. Each year, we host the **National Memorial Day Parade in Washington, D.C.** , bringing Americans together in a powerful display of remembrance and patriotism. We also proudly produce **" American Valor: A Salute to Our Heroes,"** a nationally televised tribute to the men and women who have served across generations.

But our work goes far beyond public events. At the heart of our mission is a commitment to **preserve the stories of veterans from every era of service** -- from the final voices of World War II, to those who served in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 generation. Through these efforts, we ensure that future generations understand the cost of freedom and the courage it has taken to defend it.

This year, American Veterans Center is marking historic military milestones: the 250th anniversaries of the U.S. Army, Navy, and Marine Corps...the 80th anniversary of the victories that won World War II...and key events in the Korean War 75 years ago, and the Vietnam War which ended 50 years ago this year.
---
[](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=67d352141de94a90b8edd96be45ce965&_e=8D4vxfT3CevOVaVMdD2wv0h01zQPYoZrBVcoNGWT5yYZlF1F0TZ87AwWtH4DZtSoI8gbwb0Tc7d7M15XqYUZsf7ZmXAbzjFJ7w1r-Qf8Mz9c4Apa66oPRdbWc6gVjZHrZJfWcbktCOPi8gQaG2kYEOpD3nmm501EFTXvVpzlOMbLpWc9rTdA0TDuaRk_hYUVRwEXOvXTE3nXg1MTUGm8qTylrfUFOfR5naDAGa_GO6LeCwyNBukIjeSqhRFIKvD2rb2uK9TGOVxjrMmoOcgvKrqG_nJFUZtVSpXS3xieDncv-p38Z04tyJP7qjbPEFymqwPDns6L4pyRngRiuaKX9GSKjdK2vofFhDzv5q6zi4Ayhn6egLQYHPlXkZVfE03TNINS8VBvVjtuEbls_EX4Jga0LCm8RL7mcI1lycrRSJ-qHfbpJpM2GEo5CUMjOnzXtpElv-D7h4v_ntGc8QhlSQNlmWK3pwrz7ESqzhYOAhDTT-THdkgnOrqTKcDdGR3v3Vd_cpaBn8fwoFX0mSBZKUo6dCrVo5yp6ESmKc2_Wy510ys3bIT86oQZ9DO64WKG_C3h-_ynU5Tg_VeoInmcHRwIjZ6KOJEjkUsCyhww5wvtrbpmtnIHOuxKKDz8hp3EvuKc9UPGf8aZ5jEAMnmORCmAm-TnHfUXjXVw05YrWMiuSxhCewVCr_YInxFMlnLaBhtnmFeF7xpSPg7Ch4zb8Yxlo1dpEWwB3Z5x05hL5J5RLMTw9h3dT6X6i_CV7KATSoi8E8MQSehpjV-ImEIPyQ%3D%3D)

[**To mark the occasion, I want to send you a full-size (3x5ft) American flag when you make a gift of $25, $50, $100 or more to support the American Veterans Center’s historic campaign: American Honor 2025.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=67d352141de94a90b8edd96be45ce965&_e=8D4vxfT3CevOVaVMdD2wv0h01zQPYoZrBVcoNGWT5yYZlF1F0TZ87AwWtH4DZtSoI8gbwb0Tc7d7M15XqYUZsf7ZmXAbzjFJ7w1r-Qf8Mz9c4Apa66oPRdbWc6gVjZHrZJfWcbktCOPi8gQaG2kYEOpD3nmm501EFTXvVpzlOMbLpWc9rTdA0TDuaRk_hYUVRwEXOvXTE3nXg1MTUGm8qTylrfUFOfR5naDAGa_GO6LeCwyNBukIjeSqhRFIKvD2rb2uK9TGOVxjrMmoOcgvKjEXpAMVzRoF7e46EYAXkW-7vE8T-2tRzIO_VYLg_efAMARS4muWI0VYj2ab_Rkv7MRw2DzDLqb7YKFfz91qvR8P99Hy8g1wkQf1z9jdmRFeZhan1ZcuOdFIcmPnOuk2kD26yX2QYkkmSYihiWBFc9iJa61eTFGAazIqAA72RajMklQ3SCtxx0W0pO9IeRd0qvQu9gPhrKcXkDTEGtHaO2K3IQA6bc1tXl4ggrmoLRWKK6ZwQqH8mihbELyjw7imWV1PBfHBTUYZ5j_IycVSAO-B3RBnl2iSyX5Jm_zTsbYTqBQ3663b9__6XZNvENPtb6xoyoWgOY89xyZckGFr2c9macbGT3FUIjoxpCcFXs6oVFxQEh2RgSWYwC_LwsLYEYrAsJnKfDG0R0UIBWzzfoLduyDlPiv8AJqlyFwQY9pgO_WFKLZynB76QdN5Wk1glbXDkWo4cS1qXKR6XV2dDF6xx97GIWG_-ttuZjA3YuBQPEPCAP849S9eNZedFfkDBQ%3D%3D)

This is one of our most ambitious efforts ever, Fellow Patriot -- a national salute to those who fought to make and keep America free.

**Together, we 're capturing the stories of WWII veterans before it's too late...and preserving seldom-heard accounts from those who fought in Korea, Vietnam, and the post-9/11 wars.**

And with your gift today, I'll send you a free, full-size American flag as my thank you.

To some, it may look like just a flag.

_But to those who served, it 's a promise kept._

It flew over the beaches of Normandy.

It sailed with the Pacific fleet.

It was stitched into the sleeves of every soldier who never made it home.

**This flag reminds us of all they sacrificed, and what we 're now called to defend.**

Let it fly proudly as a reminder that freedom isn't free -- and that this generation will not forget the sacrifices of the last.

[**So please, Fellow Patriot make your gift today. Help us preserve their legacy while there's still time — and proudly fly the flag they fought for.**](http://links.g4yamerica.com/u/click?_t=cc7dda5c2cc64061900678c88bd3a18a&_m=67d352141de94a90b8edd96be45ce965&_e=8D4vxfT3CevOVaVMdD2wv0h01zQPYoZrBVcoNGWT5yYZlF1F0TZ87AwWtH4DZtSoI8gbwb0Tc7d7M15XqYUZsf7ZmXAbzjFJ7w1r-Qf8Mz9c4Apa66oPRdbWc6gVjZHrZJfWcbktCOPi8gQaG2kYEOpD3nmm501EFTXvVpzlOMbLpWc9rTdA0TDuaRk_hYUVRwEXOvXTE3nXg1MTUGm8qTylrfUFOfR5naDAGa_GO6LeCwyNBukIjeSqhRFIKvD2rb2uK9TGOVxjrMmoOcgvKkfaeFQRzGlWxTi7g7_YySEhTuBtMVCVt19BDEOzj4NYdCNjeUfHYi9nF2CZ2xE7OXxmc_Br0Oe0L0sr64Q0ON_OHCukHp8vkbbG4Hxm-s7vryM4RrAWMYwU9vaEwLkyDAgRqYgA9V_vTaMHhyk9V4zLwORcIsJE2AH7I3HiY-CRZNcEt_HaNa7tOULCceycZX3tj8xvE41oW-06ItZJPZ3K0dZ2gT7qWsCVmEmAqeyIYXNJ1bkl8woiaJtLOTcuPh_ctNjFf_cUZ0okWtnIdytig5-rP-EyAC2TBs1VJqrZ3waarc6OsKTbwaT_dSUK3TxCEoTeBQUAXHYctKmSdhH3fntkJFjeDf_k3U8wSUYhbr03MHviu9v9C-DIOO1Vi4GZy7OEQkvTdeUX20KhmGiEVk-NAJmrXiPauqnjABq334nPsJetvOwPVflzMO0RrTg2GxqT-ErNgoRyrIR_LLxZxZzasKjhhTLn5w4bgJK9zO364kje2S6H8jzK-6Iq6A%3D%3D)

* * *
Some weeks the weight of this country feels almost too heavy to carry. This is one of them. After federal agents shot and killed Alex Pretti -- a 37-year-old ICU nurse and U.S. citizen -- on a Minneapolis street this weekend, I'm left with a grief that feels too big for language. Rage, sorrow, numbness -- they blur together until there's no clean word for what's sitting in my chest.
And I want to make this personal for a second -- because on Saturday, Alex's family released a statement. It was more gracious, more restrained than anything I could imagine writing if my own son had been murdered by the federal government.
> "I do not throw around the 'hero' term lightly. However, his last thought and act was to protect a woman. The sickening lies told about our son by the administration are reprehensible and disgusting. Alex is clearly not holding a gun when attacked by Trump's murdering and cowardly ICE thugs. He had his phone in his right hand and his empty left hand is raised above his head while trying to protect the woman ICE just pushed down, all while being pepper sprayed."
I had just had dinner with my wife and son when I read the statement. I pulled it up on my phone, read it on the couch, and I just broke down in tears.
I've gone live this whole weekend -- writing tweets, talking to clients, trying to stay useful, trying to hold it together. But that moment broke me. That statement -- somehow beautiful, somehow composed -- coming from people living a nightmare.
My son came over and asked me what was wrong. He's seen me upset before, but this was different. This time, I sat down and told him what happened.
We talked about ICE. About people being terrorized on the streets because of their skin color and where they come from. About Alex Pretti, an ICU nurse and a human being who was shot and killed by federal agents while documenting what was happening. I told him about Renee Good, and I told him we were safe -- but that there are bad people doing bad things.
It was hard. Emotional. And he just hugged me and said he loved me. Turns out, my six-year-old son has a higher EQ than the President of the United States.
But you know... every time something like this happens, some piece of innocence dies. For my son, for me, for all of us. They steal it from us. They take our empathy, our compassion, our love of country and of each other -- and twist those things into justifications for violence and chaos on American streets. In our schools, communities, homes.
And that's not even the worst of their crimes.
I believe Trump, JD Vance, Kristi Noem, Stephen Miller, Tom Homan, and the rest of these MAGA bootlickers -- who treat the Constitution as circumstantial -- are guilty of a hell of a lot. But this is a crime I won't forget.
No family should ever have to write a statement like that. No parent should be forced to process the murder of their son at the hands of the U.S. government. That death lies at the feet of the President of the United States -- a man who, more likely than not, spent the week golfing or schmoozing at some party with crooks handing him cash for pardons.
No American should have to witness the violence we saw in Minneapolis. Minnesotans don't deserve this. Immigrant communities don't deserve to be hunted and terrorized. No one should have to see what happened to Renee Good. Or Alex Pretti. Or anyone.
And I honestly don't know how we heal from this -- because this isn't the bottom. It's going to get worse.
Tim Walz has called in the National Guard to protect his people. Kristi Noem, now head of DHS, is straight-up lying -- smearing his name within hours of his murder, calling him a "domestic terrorist," saying Alex "attacked" federal agents with his gun. A gun he legally owned and had a permit and concealed carry license for. Videos and witness accounts show beyond reasonable doubt that he was filming with his phone and trying to help someone before he was tackled, beaten, and shot multiple times.
He was a good man. A caregiver. Someone who helped people every day as an ICU nurse. Who did more for this country in his single final act of service than Noem, Bovino, Vance, and all of Trump's sycophants will ever do in their entire lives. Alex's last act was documenting and trying to assist a woman who had been assaulted -- shoved to the ground and pepper-sprayed by an ICE thug -- not threatening law enforcement. And he paid the price for it.
And some of the ICE agents celebrated.
They celebrated.
This tells us everything. These people aren't the good guys. They're not keeping anyone safe. They're not heroes. They're small, insecure men, cosplaying as cops, treating this like a video game, serving chaos and cruelty for the sake of their orange god.
Every single one of them should have been immediately stripped of their duties and fired -- not retrained, as some Democrats like to say.
And the ones who killed Alex Pretti -- and who killed Renee Good -- should be prosecuted. To the fullest extent. They should never see sunlight again.
I don't know where we go from here. But I know this: they want you afraid. They want you paralyzed. They want you to believe you don't matter.
But the people of Minneapolis are showing us something else. They are not backing down -- they are doubling down. And the rest of the country is following suit. In Chicago, neighbors took to the streets, and an outpouring of organizing actions is surging this week -- from a vigil being held by the Nurses Unions at the Jesse Brown VA Medical Center, to community meetings on organizing general strikes, to local leaders and organizations ramping up Rapid Response & ICE Watch trainings.
Yes, it's scary. Yes, resisting does mean putting your body on the line against people who want to hurt you -- and who will lie about you if you die.
But we have to keep showing up. Keep speaking out. Keep reaching out to one another. This doesn't stop.
A million small acts of resistance. Every single day.
No, you might not be able to show up at a protest every day. But you can still do something. We all have something to give.
If you have time, give it -- volunteer with a local mutual aid group, help a neighbor with childcare, deliver groceries to a family that's scared to leave the house. If you have money, support organizations doing legal defense work or back candidates who are actually fighting for people, not just tweeting about it.
If you've got a printer, print flyers. If you've got a car, offer a ride. If you've got a platform and a voice people listen to, use it to lift up organizers, share verified information, and point people toward ways to help.
And don't underestimate the quieter work, either. Have the hard conversation with your dad who voted for Trump -- like I did this weekend. Sit down with your kid and explain what's happening, and what kind of person you hope they grow up to be. Check on your neighbors. Let people know they're not alone.
Not everyone's role is to stand on the front lines. But everyone has a role. And this is the moment to keep finding yours.

name: Rep. Mike Soboleski
subject: Public Safety Comes First — Here’s What’s Happening in Maine
body:
| | |
---
| | [](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q7wGX619E82dFbeKya548y1WBqD1ZX5hsCqN8OP8Fl5vsmp7pENH1RN2o6mlc1ExgGWoh4RjDeTnieEeNDt-UE5vgL6TKYo8Xhr2NAJV2Ek_m94UmhS6FWsTAswc2sdgiOoYakNM5ZwTetuA6kQXJbzsH3QgDET0&c=6W8qhPH9E5JhHDeNHW4R-YPPeafVWTHMouUGgJwg7NGJbzDpBmVsiw==&ch=w3JMOnKGkQeYxZzrgSKqLortYdG1vEgwILeYn3exVNtxXIiax179aw==)
---
---
| |
---
Peter,
Here are the latest headlines out of Maine -- and they paint a troubling picture.
Public safety should always come first, but Democrats like Governor Janet Mills and Secretary of State Shenna Bellows are standing in the way.
As federal authorities work to remove dangerous criminals from our communities, the Mills Administration is refusing to cooperate, including blocking undercover license plates that help keep U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents safe while doing their jobs.
Anti-enforcement protests unnecessarily strain local law enforcement across Maine. Make no mistake: ICE's mission to remove the worst of the worst shouldn't be obstructed. Don't hesitate to contact your elected officials to share your support of the rule of law, along with ICE's role in keeping our communities safe.
Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
ICE arrests 100 in Maine in first three days of "Operation Catch of the Day"
Homeland Security said the operation is targeting the "worst of the worst"
More than 100 people have been arrested in Maine in just three days as part of a federal immigration sweep dubbed "Operation Catch of the Day," according to a Thursday night update from the Department of Homeland Security.
"The brave men and women of ICE have already arrested more than 100 illegal aliens in Maine since the launch of Operation Catch of the Day three days ago," Homeland Security Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin said in a statement to Maine's Total Coverage. "Some of the arrests of the worst of the worst from the first day of operations include criminal illegal aliens charged and convicted of horrific crimes including aggravated assault, false imprisonment, and endangering the welfare of a child."
[https://www.wmtw.com/article/ice-arrests-100-in-maine-in-first-three-days-of-operation-catch-of-the-day/70099982](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q7wGX619E82dFbeKya548y1WBqD1ZX5hsCqN8OP8Fl5vsmp7pENH1bXipkzz-pbac-Rtlen10Lx0VT1jqEr1I3eQNA_rVQo53GktwwWH5D2IN9iyiTyukeExuFGTHFv49ii-IrbIGEP9ZUS2gDCDoaiZbTEC-8eePk656x2mCn6SBb7lXJgCWjwAJdOUv5OuN-q0yTqr8AbX5oSYz4eqkhwSS5qIVrMNZpsuYA9CH1NaMhH4WmpiK7gLlYEy1MF9bMhCy1xsJZZbpmKV6a6mrQ==&c=6W8qhPH9E5JhHDeNHW4R-YPPeafVWTHMouUGgJwg7NGJbzDpBmVsiw==&ch=w3JMOnKGkQeYxZzrgSKqLortYdG1vEgwILeYn3exVNtxXIiax179aw==)

---
|
---
6 arrested for disorderly conduct during anti-ICE protest at Portland hotels
Police said initially, there was a small crowd that was not causing any issues. But by about 10:20 p.m., a crowd of about 40 people appeared together and were blowing whistles, banging on drums and causing disturbances. According to police, the noise was disruptive to hotel guests and others in the area.
Video shows that the crowd was protesting against the increased presence of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers in Portland.
Police said the group of protesters was repeatedly told that if they did not disperse, they would be charged. Some of the protesters refused to comply and shortly before 11 p.m., they were arrested, charged with disorderly conduct and transported to the Cumberland County Jail.
https://www.wmtw.com/article/portland-maine-anti-ice-protest-arrests-fore-st-hotels/70116292

---
|
---
|
---
Mills demands Trump withdraw ICE agents from Maine The governor decried the fatal shooting of a man in Minneapolis by federal immigration agents and called on the president to meet with her.
She encouraged Mainers to continue to protest peacefully. "I am proud of Maine people for standing up in peaceful protest across our state and I continue to encourage peaceful protest as we show the world that we will always stand up for our values - support for the rule of law, due process, compassion, integrity, and justice." https://www.pressherald.com/2026/01/24/live-updates-ramped-up-ice-activity-in-maine-continues-into-weekend/

---
|
---
|
---
'Go home': Mainers react to decision to pause undercover license plate requests for ICE PORTLAND (WGME) -- Maine is pushing back on ICE as they look to potentially ramp up enforcement in the state.
Secretary of State Shenna Bellows says the BMV received a request from U.S. Customs and Border Protection for confidential, undercover Maine license plates. Bellows denied that request and said she wants to ensure that Maine plates will not be used for "lawless purposes." "It really is irresponsible for the State of Maine to not cooperate with ICE in order to keep these agents safe," National Police Association Spokesman Betsy Branter Smith said. https://wgme.com/news/local/go-home-mainers-react-to-decision-to-pause-undercover-license-plate-requests-for-ice-maine-immigration-customs-enforcement-shenna-bellows-president-donald-trump

---
| |
---
| |
---
| ICE removes detainees from Cumberland County Jail, cancels contract after sheriff's criticism Despite several court orders that certain inmates remain in Maine, ICE moved multiple detainees to facilities in other states, which the U.S. Attorney's Office acknowledged was a violation of judicial orders.
Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin cited the corrections officer's arrest on Wednesday, saying it was "shocking" to see the jail employ a "lawbreaker." "Following learning the county jail employed an illegal alien, ICE will no longer house illegal aliens at the facility," McLaughlin said in a written statement on Friday. "We could not, in good conscience, continue to partner with a law enforcement organization that flagrantly violated our nation's immigration laws." [https://www.pressherald.com/2026/01/23/ice-detainees-removed-from-cumberland-county-jail/](https://eqbp6ugbb.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001q7wGX619E82dFbeKya548y1WBqD1ZX5hsCqN8OP8Fl5vsmp7pENH1bXipkzz-pbaaknq3-Df__as9Ch9Q_R6bcA_zvvwMCEVysuyzKcwOr_7CZd-w8jSrM2SyJx_g_vOnrPdAWCfkMrxjI_e_6SpSAiLR417KSJE5w_BvmCSpqjeJqq4nYFs_K7GtIoY20PLFjxDei10nqJHxf14mcZxzFd6z6sIWpeIqMtVh_EsI6MGkh0fZWOBMA==&c=6W8qhPH9E5JhHDeNHW4R-YPPeafVWTHMouUGgJwg7NGJbzDpBmVsiw==&ch=w3JMOnKGkQeYxZzrgSKqLortYdG1vEgwILeYn3exVNtxXIiax179aw==)

clean_body: | | | | | == | | Peter, Here are the latest headlines out of Maine -- and they paint a troubling picture. Public safety should always come first, but Democrats like Governor Janet Mills and Secretary of State Shenna Bellows are standing in the way. As federal authorities work to remove dangerous criminals from our communities, the Mills Administration is refusing to cooperate, including blocking undercover license plates that help keep U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) agents safe while doing their jobs. Anti-enforcement protests unnecessarily strain local law enforcement across Maine. Make no mistake: ICE's mission to remove the worst of the worst shouldn't be obstructed. Don't hesitate to contact your elected officials to share your support of the rule of law, along with ICE's role in keeping our communities safe. Mike Soboleski Rep. Mike Soboleski Proudly Serving House District 73 | | | ICE arrests 100 in Maine in first three days of "Operation Catch of the Day" Homeland Security said the operation is targeting the "worst of the worst" More than 100 people have been arrested in Maine in just three days as part of a federal immigration sweep dubbed "Operation Catch of the Day," according to a Thursday night update from the Department of Homeland Security. "The brave men and women of ICE have already arrested more than 100 illegal aliens in Maine since the launch of Operation Catch of the Day three days ago," Homeland Security Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin said in a statement to Maine's Total Coverage. "Some of the arrests of the worst of the worst from the first day of operations include criminal illegal aliens charged and convicted of horrific crimes including aggravated assault, false imprisonment, and endangering the welfare of a child." == | 6 arrested for disorderly conduct during anti-ICE protest at Portland hotels Police said initially, there was a small crowd that was not causing any issues. But by about 10:20 p.m., a crowd of about 40 people appeared together and were blowing whistles, banging on drums and causing disturbances. According to police, the noise was disruptive to hotel guests and others in the area. Video shows that the crowd was protesting against the increased presence of U.S. Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) officers in Portland. Police said the group of protesters was repeatedly told that if they did not disperse, they would be charged. Some of the protesters refused to comply and shortly before 11 p.m., they were arrested, charged with disorderly conduct and transported to the Cumberland County Jail. | | Mills demands Trump withdraw ICE agents from Maine The governor decried the fatal shooting of a man in Minneapolis by federal immigration agents and called on the president to meet with her. She encouraged Mainers to continue to protest peacefully. "I am proud of Maine people for standing up in peaceful protest across our state and I continue to encourage peaceful protest as we show the world that we will always stand up for our values - support for the rule of law, due process, compassion, integrity, and justice." | | 'Go home': Mainers react to decision to pause undercover license plate requests for ICE PORTLAND (WGME) -- Maine is pushing back on ICE as they look to potentially ramp up enforcement in the state. Secretary of State Shenna Bellows says the BMV received a request from U.S. Customs and Border Protection for confidential, undercover Maine license plates. Bellows denied that request and said she wants to ensure that Maine plates will not be used for "lawless purposes." "It really is irresponsible for the State of Maine to not cooperate with ICE in order to keep these agents safe," National Police Association Spokesman Betsy Branter Smith said. | | | | | ICE removes detainees from Cumberland County Jail, cancels contract after sheriff's criticism Despite several court orders that certain inmates remain in Maine, ICE moved multiple detainees to facilities in other states, which the U.S. Attorney's Office acknowledged was a violation of judicial orders. Assistant Secretary Tricia McLaughlin cited the corrections officer's arrest on Wednesday, saying it was "shocking" to see the jail employ a "lawbreaker." "Following learning the county jail employed an illegal alien, ICE will no longer house illegal aliens at the facility," McLaughlin said in a written statement on Friday. "We could not, in good conscience, continue to partner with a law enforcement organization that flagrantly violated our nation's immigration laws." == | | | | == | | | | == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- == | == ---|--- | | | | Maine Issues & Action PAC | PO Box 603 | Augusta, ME 04332 US | | | | | | |

It’s your personal commitment to helping elect and re-elect Republican Senators across the country. As Chairman Tim Scott certifies on the card itself, this membership marks you as someone dedicated to the mission of stopping the radical left and building a Senate majority rooted in strength, security, and conservative leadership. are already raising obscene amounts of money, and they’re targeting every vulnerable Republican seat they can find. Your membership is how we show the country — and the left — that the Republican grassroots is unified, energized, and ready to win. Will you officially activate your 2026 NRSC Membership today?
