# Gold smashes historic $5000 milestone in "breathtaking and profoundly scary," rally
Gold futures **[surged past $5,000 per ounce for the first time ever](https://substack.com/redirect/25395038-80b6-4493-b8ff-2c8d60dc3608?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Sunday, climbing to $5,089 Monday amid a breathtaking rally fueled by global debt fears, a weakening dollar, and safe-haven demand as investors hedge against inflation and policy uncertainty.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/25395038-80b6-4493-b8ff-2c8d60dc3608?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Debasement trade surges** : Investors flock to gold and precious metals to shield wealth from eroding purchasing power amid soaring worldwide government debt and fears of inflation to manage fiscal crises.
* **Expert sounds alarm** : Brookings Institution's Robin Brooks calls the precious metals boom "breathtaking and profoundly scary," warning it's part of a larger global debt crisis beyond just central bank buying.
* **Dollar weakness accelerates** : A falling US dollar, hitting four-month lows, supercharges gold's appeal to non-dollar buyers and is expected to drive prices even higher in the near term.
* **Forecasts turn bullish** : Goldman Sachs raised its year-end gold target to $5,400 from $4,900, citing upside risks from private investor diversification amid ongoing geopolitical and policy uncertainties.

# Government grabs another stake, this time in USA Rare Earth
The U.S. Department of Commerce has **[agreed to take an equity stake in USA Rare Earth,](https://substack.com/redirect/a5a76c7d-a20e-4bfa-8c72-1c29e1e2beb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** issuing a letter of intent for $1.3 billion in loans and $277 million in funding. The deal sent shares soaring more than 20% as the U.S. pushes to build domestic rare earth supply chains and reduce reliance on China.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a5a76c7d-a20e-4bfa-8c72-1c29e1e2beb3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Equity Stake Details:** Commerce will receive 16.1 million shares and 17.6 million warrants, equating to an 8-16% ownership stake depending on warrant exercise.
* **Funding Timeline and Purpose:** Capital disbursed from 2026-2028 based on milestones to fund a full U.S.-based rare earth value chain, including mining and magnet production.
* **Company Projects Advancing:** Magnet plant in Stillwater, Oklahoma, set to commission in Q1 2026; Round Top mine in Texas targets commercial operations by late 2028.
* **Broader Strategic Push:** Part of Trump administration efforts to counter China's dominance, following similar equity investments in miners like MP Materials.

# Nvidia pumps $2 billion into CoreWeave fueling AI data center optimism
Nvidia invested **[$2 billion in AI infrastructure provider CoreWeave](https://substack.com/redirect/735d31e2-bb84-4742-a303-459dabbb550f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** on Monday, purchasing shares at a discount to accelerate massive data center expansion, sending CoreWeave stock surging 12% as the companies race to build 5 gigawatts of AI factories by 2030 amid booming demand for GPU-powered computing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/735d31e2-bb84-4742-a303-459dabbb550f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Massive capacity target:** CoreWeave aims to construct over 5 gigawatts of AI data center power by 2030, equivalent to the electricity use of about 4 million U.S. households.
* **Strategic stock purchase:** Nvidia bought CoreWeave Class A shares at $87.20 each, a discount from the prior close of $92.98, deepening their partnership beyond prior GPU supply deals.
* **Building on big commitments:** The investment builds on CoreWeave's $6.3 billion Nvidia order, plus major contracts with Meta ($14.2 billion) and OpenAI ($22.4 billion) for AI cloud services.
* **AI industrial push:** Nvidia CEO Jensen Huang hailed CoreWeave's execution speed as key to meeting explosive demand for AI factories in the ongoing AI revolution.

* * *
* * *
# Bitcoin plunges to 2026 low
Bitcoin tumbled as much as 3.5% Sunday to just above $86,000--**[its lowest in 2026](https://substack.com/redirect/999a1ad9-97b0-4e50-9238-5a46a8563890?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** --amid escalating global tensions, before recovering slightly to around $87,883 early Monday as investors flee risk assets for gold amid tariff threats and macro uncertainty.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/dab9e4ff-070c-4497-804e-b2de756afd36?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Geopolitical jitters escalate** : Global tensions, including Trump's 100% tariff threats on Canada, US warships nearing Iran, and shutdown risks, drive flight to safe havens like gold, now over $5,000/oz.
* **ETF outflows surge** : US Bitcoin ETFs recorded $1.7 billion in outflows last week across five days, nearly erasing prior inflows and adding pressure on prices.
* **Macro headwinds persist** : A weakening dollar at four-month lows favors commodities over crypto; analysts note Bitcoin struggles in an environment boosting gold despite its digital-gold narrative.
* **Fed decision looms** : Traders eye Wednesday's Fed rate announcement for clues on inflation trends and possible cuts, as high inflation keeps rates steady and weighs on sentiment.

* * *
* * *
# Natural gas prices blast past $6 due to storm surge
U.S. natural gas futures **[surged more than 17% Monday](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce40209-fc5c-490f-825b-b517dadaf808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[ ](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce40209-fc5c-490f-825b-b517dadaf808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**[to top $6](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce40209-fc5c-490f-825b-b517dadaf808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** per mmBtu for the first time since late 2022, driven by massive Winter Storm Fern blanketing much of the country in snow and ice, spiking heating demand amid widespread power outages and extreme cold gripping millions.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2ce40209-fc5c-490f-825b-b517dadaf808?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Extreme Cold Drives Demand:** Winter Storm Fern brings sub-zero wind chills to eastern U.S., pushing heating needs sky-high across 37 states and 180 million people.
* **Futures Hit Multi-Year Peak:** February natural gas contract climbs to $6.21 per mmBtu, up 68% year-to-date and marking highest level since December 2022.
* **Widespread Disruptions Reported:** Storm causes over 822,000 power outages, thousands of flight cancellations, seven deaths, and emergency orders for New England and Texas grids.
* **Ongoing Weather Threat Looms:** National Weather Service warns of continued below-normal temperatures into early February, sustaining elevated energy demand and market volatility.

* * *
* * *
# Massive winter storm grounds thousands flights nationwide
A brutal winter storm blanketed much of the US with snow and ice, triggering over **[4,000 flight cancellations and nearly 10,000 delays](https://substack.com/redirect/3bfe10c4-6050-4e9a-ba51-dd28575112ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Monday morning after Sunday's record disruptions--the worst since early 2020--stranding travelers as Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy targets Wednesday for air travel to normalize.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3bfe10c4-6050-4e9a-ba51-dd28575112ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Record Sunday Cancellations Surge:** Over 11,000 flights canceled nationwide on Sunday, marking the highest single-day total since early 2020 due to widespread snow, ice, and a following cold snap complicating recovery efforts.
* **Major Airlines Waive Fees:** American, Delta, JetBlue, Southwest, and United airlines eliminated change and cancellation fees, allowing flexible rebooking for passengers impacted by the storm's travel chaos.
* **FAA Tackles Runway Challenges:** Lower staffing from commuting issues and persistent ice prompted focused efforts on salting and clearing runways, with preemptive cancellations preventing stranded aircraft and crews.
* **Recovery Timeline Set:** Transportation Secretary Sean Duffy forecasts air travel returning to normal by Wednesday, with increased capacity leading to fuller flights as schedules stabilize mid-week.

Expert sounds alarm : Brookings Institution's Robin Brooks calls the precious metals boom "breathtaking and profoundly scary," warning it's part of a larger global debt crisis beyond just central bank buying. Dollar weakness accelerates : A falling US dollar, hitting four-month lows, supercharges gold's appeal to non-dollar buyers and is expected to drive prices even higher in the near term. Forecasts turn bullish : Goldman Sachs raised its year-end gold target to $5,400 from $4,900, citing upside risks from private investor diversification amid ongoing geopolitical and policy uncertainties. | | ---|---|--- An excellent way to display your American Pride and stand up to the woke MOB! Government grabs another stake, this time in USA Rare Earth The U.S. Department of Commerce has issuing a letter of intent for $1.3 billion in loans and $277 million in funding. Company Projects Advancing: Magnet plant in Stillwater, Oklahoma, set to commission in Q1 2026; Round Top mine in Texas targets commercial operations by late 2028. [**Your signature of support today would go a long way in proving that this grassroots coalition is here to stay. Here are a few reasons why this matters: Illinois’ primary election is less than two months away, and I’m facing attacks on all sides -- including from Trump himself. My Republican opponents know that with the razor-thin GOP majority, competitive seats like mine could make or break House control. I’m not backing down in Congress. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124078562/597480265/-2092947258?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjczZTIwNWEtZTZmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=vtk1rR0lKVJCl-NbnvD8S-BcTICJu4NLMTI97rp9koo=) Friend, This weekend, an American citizen was needlessly killed by Border Patrol. At this point, it is undeniable that ICE and Border Patrol are acting without any accountability. Their agents are refusing to identify themselves, hiding behind masks, using excessive force, and violating our Fourth Amendment protections against illegal search and seizure. Simply put, ICE and CBP are terrorizing our communities, and bringing chaos and death. They are not keeping the peace. They are not making us safer. **This siege, both in Minneapolis and in other Blue cities, must end immediately. ICE and CBP must be held accountable for their crimes.** I will continue to fight to ensure that ICE doesn't receive another penny while they are out of control. And I will lobby our Senators to hold the line and do the same. Laura

name: Mark Teixeira
subject: Momentum surging – and Jim Jordan rally tonight in San Antonio
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=ffd7b520ba&e=2814cf23ed)
| | Peter,
**Our momentum is surging!**
Early voting starts just three weeks from tomorrow, on Feb. 17th, and our campaign for Congress in TX-21 continues to gain huge support.
We’re excited to add these **new endorsements** :
* Combined Law Enforcement Associations of Texas (CLEAT)
* San Antonio Police Officers’ Association
* True Texas Project
* Texas College Republicans
* New Braunfels Young Republicans

That means we’re now backed by the **largest law enforcement group** in the state and one of the largest conservative grassroots organizations in the state.
This new support comes in addition to the following **previous endorsements** :
* **Governor Greg Abbott**
* National Border Patrol Council
* Conservative Leader Riley Gaines
* Texas Cattle Raisers Association
* 100+ TX-21 conservative and community leaders
* 9 TX Congressmen + Reps. Jim Jordan and Steve Scalise

Help us build our momentum in the home stretch — if you’re in the San Antonio area, [**join us THIS EVENING for a rally with Congressman Jim Jordan**](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=3473c60add&e=2814cf23ed).
If you can’t make it, be sure to [**sign up to volunteer**](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=ca3234dabc&e=2814cf23ed) for block walking or to work polling places.
---
[|
---](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=ad2284463a&e=2814cf23ed)

Finally, be sure to [**watch and share our new TV ad**](https://teixeiraforcongress.us6.list-manage.com/track/click?u=aaeca7d0d6f0c241ad9d38cc7&id=a0a6fffad7&e=2814cf23ed)**.**

subject: I’m proud to endorse Jose Javier for Florida AG
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSE JAVIER RODRIGUEZ FOR FLORIDA ATTORNEY GENERAL
body:
FL used to lead the way. Here's how we get back on track. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124078917/597481250/1546157161?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Butterworth_012626&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAyMmJjMjYtZTdmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9gO2KL3J1sT10lqg6y7yNfFceDaxrIGPdVpqJBLzTT0=&emci=7f5526c4-d1fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=a022bc26-e7fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=32374386)

Hi Peter. I’m Bob Butterworth, and I proudly served as Florida’s Attorney General from 1987 to 2002 — one of the longest tenures in state history. During those years, Florida led the way. We took on Big Tobacco and secured an $11 billion settlement for Florida families. We protected consumers, held polluters accountable, and enforced civil rights laws fairly and firmly. We showed what the Attorney General’s office can accomplish when it’s guided by the public interest. The office of the Florida Attorney General carries enormous responsibility, and it demands a leader who understands the law, respects the independence of the job, and is willing to enforce it without politics or favoritism. **[Jose Javier Rodríguez understands that responsibility, which is why I’m proud to endorse him for Florida Attorney General. Will you join me and support his campaign with a contribution of any amount today? >>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124078918/597481251/-1701841659?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Butterworth_012626&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAyMmJjMjYtZTdmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9gO2KL3J1sT10lqg6y7yNfFceDaxrIGPdVpqJBLzTT0=)** Throughout his public service, Jose Javier has shown steady judgment, independence, and a clear commitment to protecting Floridians and upholding the rule of law. At a moment when trust in government is being tested, we need an Attorney General who will put people first and restore integrity to the office. The job is simple to describe and hard to do: fight crime, tackle corruption, and protect consumers from rising costs. Florida is moving in the wrong direction on all three. Jose will change that. **[If you’re ready to help move Florida in the right direction, please join me by chipping in any amount you can afford today to help Jose Javier Rodríguez bring real leadership to the highest law enforcement office in the state.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124078919/597481252/-1701841659?refcode=em_JJR_FR_Butterworth_012626&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAyMmJjMjYtZTdmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9gO2KL3J1sT10lqg6y7yNfFceDaxrIGPdVpqJBLzTT0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $10](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124078920/597481253/-1701841659?amount=10&express_lane=true&refcode=em_JJR_FR_Butterworth_012626&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDkxMjYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYTAyMmJjMjYtZTdmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9gO2KL3J1sT10lqg6y7yNfFceDaxrIGPdVpqJBLzTT0=) **

name: Mohan Seshadri, API PA
subject: Tell Senator Fetterman: No more funding for ICE!
body:
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/82704/images/api-pa-primary-logo-full-color-rgb-900px-w-72ppi.jpg]
Hi Peter,
This Tuesday, the Senate will vote on a proposed bill [https://www.appropriations.senate.gov/news/majority/committee-releases-conferenced-defense-homeland-security-labor-health-and-human-services-education-and-related-agencies-and-transportation-housing-and-urban-development-and-related-agencies-bills] that will give the Department of Homeland Security and ICE $400 million more for detention and $370 million more for enforcement.
SENATOR FETTERMAN MUST VOTE NO [https://secure.ngpvan.com/M3PW3s4L8kaCQBemcULB6g2?ms=RO+NatOrgCallEmpower+FightBack]
ICE is terrorizing our communities across the United States. Agents are relentlessly targeting and kidnapping people they suspect of being immigrants. In Minneapolis, ICE agents are going door to door asking people where Asians live [https://www.msn.com/en-us/news/us/ice-agents-going-door-to-door-in-minnesota-asking-where-asian-neighbors-live-report/ar-AA1UdDuJ] . Last year in Dauphin County, ICE detained five members of the Bhutanese Nepali refugee community, and continues to target refugee communities in our state.There is an increased number of deaths at detention centers—like Chaofeng Ge and Parady La who died in ICE custody in Pennsylvania last year. And ICE killed two people in Minnesota who were just keeping their neighbors safe.
ICE is a dangerous, rogue agency and a direct threat to public safety.
Congress must not give DHS and ICE any more money. Our tax dollars shouldn’t fund an agency that terrorizes families and destabilizes neighborhoods. We need investment in housing, healthcare, education, and the programs that actually keep people safe. Pennsylvanians all across the commonwealth are going to Senator Fetterman’s office tomorrow to demand that ICE does not receive a single dime to terrorize and murder our communities.

[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AV001/1/82704/images/01.27.2026%20Senator%20Fetterman%20Actions.jpg]
Call Senator John Fetterman and tell him to vote NO on additional funding for ICE and DHS. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/M3PW3s4L8kaCQBemcULB6g2?ms=RO+NatOrgCallEmpower+FightBack]
Tell him: Our communities deserve care, not cruelty. Vote NO on more money for ICE.
Let’s show everyone that we know what real safety looks like: We check in on our neighbors. We shovel each other’s sidewalks. We look out for one another because that’s how strong, healthy communities are built. ICE OUT NOW.
In Solidarity,
Mohan Seshadri

clean_body: [] Hi Peter, This Tuesday, the Senate will vote on a proposed bill [] that will give the Department of Homeland Security and ICE $400 million more for detention and $370 million more for enforcement. SENATOR FETTERMAN MUST VOTE NO [] ICE is terrorizing our communities across the United States. Agents are relentlessly targeting and kidnapping people they suspect of being immigrants. In Minneapolis, ICE agents are going door to door asking people where Asians live [] . Last year in Dauphin County, ICE detained five members of the Bhutanese Nepali refugee community, and continues to target refugee communities in our state.There is an increased number of deaths at detention centers—like Chaofeng Ge and Parady La who died in ICE custody in Pennsylvania last year. And ICE killed two people in Minnesota who were just keeping their neighbors safe. ICE is a dangerous, rogue agency and a direct threat to public safety. Congress must not give DHS and ICE any more money. Our tax dollars shouldn’t fund an agency that terrorizes families and destabilizes neighborhoods. We need investment in housing, healthcare, education, and the programs that actually keep people safe. Pennsylvanians all across the commonwealth are going to Senator Fetterman’s office tomorrow to demand that ICE does not receive a single dime to terrorize and murder our communities. [=] [=] [] Call Senator John Fetterman and tell him to vote NO on additional funding for ICE and DHS. [] Tell him: Our communities deserve care, not cruelty. Vote NO on more money for ICE. Let’s show everyone that we know what real safety looks like: We check in on our neighbors. We shovel each other’s sidewalks. We look out for one another because that’s how strong, healthy communities are built. ICE OUT NOW. name: State Representative Ryan Chamberlin
subject: Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin
body:
Newsletter from Rep. Ryan Chamberlin | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/repryanchamberlin/newsletter-from-rep-ryan-chamberlin-12932062?e=d1c1b9864f)
---
| |
---
| | **NEWSLETTER FROM REP. RYAN CHAMBERLIN**
---
| Friends and Neighbors,

**Week two of the 2026 Legislative Session** has come to a close, and work in Tallahassee is moving quickly. I continue working alongside my colleagues to advance legislation that puts Florida first, with a focus on protecting freedoms, supporting families, and strengthening Florida’s future. **I look forward to sharing updates as the session continues.**

As always, please do not hesitate to [contact my office](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=de27a6601d&e=d1c1b9864f) if there is something we can do for you. My team and I would be more than happy to help you in any way we can.
---
| | _**Events in the District**_
---
|
---
| **Jenny and I attended an event supporting the eradication of human trafficking.**

**Dream** – a new movie is coming soon, and we were able to meet and hear from the producer and the writer of the movie.

It’s always great to have my wife with me when she can attend these events.
---
|
---
|
---
| Spoke to the **Marion County Republican Executive Committee** to give an update on property tax and received a lot of great questions from a packed house.
---
| | _**Bill Presented**_
---
|
---
| Presented my first bill of Session to the Criminal Justice Subcommittee. [**HB 265**](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=2456ddc586&e=d1c1b9864f) is a consumer bill and passed 15-1.

If you'd like to follow my bills, please click: [**Representative Ryan Chamberlin 2026- Sponsored Bills | Florida House of Representatives**](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=ad1ed8ddff&e=d1c1b9864f)
---
|
---
| [Week 2 in Review from House Majority](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=e6cc721839&e=d1c1b9864f "Week 2 in Review from House Majority")
---
|
---
| | _**Committee Meetings**_
---
|
---
| **I have the honor of serving on several important committees for the upcoming 2026 Legislative Session.** Week two is now complete, and these meetings continue to shape the policies and priorities we will carry into the new year.
* [Human Services Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=16bc8ad9cc&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Justice Budget Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=a94bf48eac&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Economic Infrastructure Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=c41a2795bb&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Intergovernmental Affairs Subcommittee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=a30e7526f8&e=d1c1b9864f)
* [Ways and Means Committee](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=51f6ce1699&e=d1c1b9864f)

---
| | _**Events & Receptions Attended in Tallahassee**_
---
|
---
_Professional Engineers Reception_
| While in Tallahassee, I attended several receptions and events, including the **Legislative Appreciation Cookout,** **Clerks Day Reception,** and the **Junior League of Florida Reception**. I also participated in the **Florida Association of Counties Reception,** the **Florida Bar Board of Governors Reception,** the **Rural Counties Day Legislative Networking Reception,** and the **Cattlemen’s Association and United Dairy Farmers Reception. **These events provided valuable opportunities to connect with leaders from across the state and discuss issues impacting our communities as the legislative session continues.
---
|
---
_Cattlemen’s Association/United Dairy Farmers Reception_
| Wonderful time meeting members of the **Florida Cattlemen’s Association** to discuss their training facilities and future expansion plans.

We talked about how these**investments support workforce development, strengthen our agricultural industry, and help ensure Florida ranching continues to thrive for generations to come.** I appreciate the opportunity to hear directly from industry leaders and thank them for the productive conversation.
---
| | _**Meetings in Tallahassee**_
---
|
---
| Had a great time meeting with **students from Florida State University.** We had thoughtful conversations about public service, the legislative process, and the issues that matter most to them as they prepare to lead in their communities.

Always encouraging to see such engaged, curious, and motivated students taking an active interest in how government works. **Thank you for the great discussion and for spending time at the Capitol.**
---
|
---
|
---
| | Had a productive meeting with **Community Legal Services** to discuss the critical role they play in ensuring access to justice for Floridians.

We talked about the **importance of civil legal services for families, seniors, veterans, and vulnerable communities, and how these services help strengthen our state as a whole.** Grateful for the work they do every day and for the thoughtful conversation on their legislative priorities.
---
|
---
|
---
| Great meeting with members of the **Florida Young Republicans** to discuss issues impacting our state.

We had a thoughtful exchange of ideas and perspectives, and**I appreciated the opportunity to hear directly from engaged young leaders who are interested in public service and civic involvement.** Thank you for the productive conversation and for taking the time to meet.
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| It was great to meet with **Florida REALTORS®** and speak about key issues impacting the real estate industry across the state. They asked for a deep dive on **Property Taxes,** so we spent several minutes discussing my **Freedom 1.2.3 plan** to eliminate and replace.
---
|
---
|
---
| Met with **Marion County Clerk of Court Greg Harrell** to discuss improved funding for our growing county.
---
|
---
|
---
---
|
---
---
| I also had several other productive meetings with great groups:**Florida Restaurant & Lodging Association, Arts in Health Ocala Metro, Marion Public Library, and UF Medical Students.**
---
|
---
| Thank you for your continued support of my leadership in the Florida House! I look forward to sharing with you again soon.

Best regards,

**Ryan Chamberlin**
******State Representative**
**District 24**
---
| | _Copyright © 2025 Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative, All rights reserved._

Paid by Ryan Chamberlin, Republican, for State Representative

**Our mailing address is:**
Ryan Chamberlin for State Representative
526 E Park Ave
Tallahassee, FL 32301-2568

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/profile?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&e=d1c1b9864f&c=861766edae) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://ryanchamberlin.us21.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=ec15c6093052c02efbd22b6cd&id=929c76fdea&t=b&e=d1c1b9864f&c=861766edae).

---

Our polling confirms what I’m hearing on the ground everywhere I go: Democratic voters want more backbone from our leaders in Washington, D.C.
A majority of CO-03 voters (53 percent) say they want an independent-minded Democrat who will work across the aisle, not a Republican who serves as a reliable vote for Trump’s extreme MAGA agenda.
Let me be clear: Coloradans are tired of the partisan bickering and gridlock destroying our country, and they’re looking for leaders who are prepared to fight tooth and nail to deliver commonsense solutions on behalf of our district.
That’s exactly the lane I’m in, and why I’m running for Congress.
That’s why I’m building a broad coalition of independent voters and everyday Coloradans strong enough to flip our district blue. I hope you’ll pitch in today to join me in that effort. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/2601-q1-ak?]

---
Joe wrote about the shooting of Alex Pretti by Border Patrol agents in Minneapolis, and once again the familiar cycle played out almost instantly. Democrats declared it murder before the facts were known. The liberal media amplified that framing without hesitation. Social media exploded with certainty where there was none. What remains true, and still [...]

# **[Obama Posts Statement Following Incident in Minneapolis](http://trk.libertyledger.)**
---
Former President Barack Obama entered the Minnesota unrest on Sunday with a statement that stunned even seasoned observers of modern political rhetoric. Rather than urging calm or restraint, Obama called on Americans to “support and draw inspiration” from what he described as “peaceful protests” in Minneapolis — protests that have coincided with organized obstruction of [...]

# **[Family Member Comments On Influencer Who Apologized For Accident On Social Media](http://trk.libertyledger._ahKkBkGQ)**
---
Ms. Rachel occupies a unique space in modern media. To millions of parents, she is a cheerful, trusted entertainer for preschool-aged children, associated with early learning, speech development, and a carefully curated sense of warmth and safety. That carefully built image is precisely why recent political associations and family discord surrounding her have drawn heightened [...]

---
The post-match press conference at the Australian Open is usually a routine affair, a brief space where athletes reflect on form, fitness, and the next round. This week, however, American tennis player Amanda Anisimova’s appearance after her second-round win drew attention for a different reason. Rather than focusing on her performance, a line of questioning [...]

This week, however, American tennis player Amanda Anisimova’s appearance after her second-round win drew attention for a different reason. Rather than focusing on her performance, a line of questioning [...] Peter Schweizer’s The Invisible Coup doesn’t so much break news as it confirms what many Americans have long suspected—and what the ruling class has desperately tried to deny. At the heart of the book is a chilling revelation: elements of the Mexican government—up to and including its presidents—have openly and repeatedly embraced the idea of [...] P.O. * * *
### The Only Swing Voters Left
While Black and white working-class voters remain locked in partisan corners--moving only 2-3% between elections--Latino voters are swinging 11-15%. They're the only true swing voting bloc left in America.
## 11-15%
**Latino voter swing between elections vs 2-3% for Black and white voters**
> "We're the only voting group that is voting in a rational way in an irrational system. When things are bad and people [politicians] lie to you and they reneg on their campaign promises, throw them out. Is that so weird? Like that's the whole way the system's supposed to be."
> ###### \- Mike Madrid
Latinos did it with Biden-Harris in 2024. They kicked out Republicans across the country in 2025. And in March 2026, they'll determine crucial races across the country, starting in Texas.
Thanks for reading! Subscribe for free to receive new posts and support my work.
[Pledge your support](https://substack..j-c9bdh2WanQddqw1oPBfn-kj4-qRpm5KY4sM8g_aMg?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=185858458)
### Housing: The Latino Issue
[Senator Ruben Gallego just dropped a housing plan](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/268ca665-816d-4adf-90a9-d5f91168c187?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): 8 million new affordable units, built strong, with red tape cut. Mike's take? It's the Latino issue.
## 1 in 5
**Latino men work in construction. 20% of Latino GDP is housing. Latinos are most hurt by the housing crisis.**
Mike's argument: You can't solve the affordability crisis until you solve housing. When you're paying 40-50% of income on rent, you feel the price of everything else.
### God & Politics
How did Republicans win the Rio Grande Valley? They systematically infiltrated Baptist churches.
Chuck's story: his immigrant parents met at a Baptist church in Texas. It's the story of countless families--and where Republicans found prime real estate for their messaging.
Now James Talarico, a Texas state rep running for Senate, is making the case for reclaiming Christian values for progressive politics. [Mike and Chuck break down his Ezra Klein podcast appearance](https://link.sbstck.com/redirect/611ce315-6f0b-4dc3-9dda-afea861b09bb?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) and why faith-based messaging matters for Latino voters.
### What's Coming in 2026
The stakes couldn't be higher. Chuck has identified 27 congressional seats where Latino voters will be decisive--and that's not the complete list. Add in multiple Senate races and gubernatorial contests, and 2026 becomes the year that proves whether either party understands the new electoral reality.
In Texas, a chaotic Republican primary between John Cornyn and embattled Attorney General Ken Paxton could create unexpected Democratic opportunities. Meanwhile, candidates like James Talarico are testing whether values-based messaging can win back Latino voters, while the Dallas House race between Colin Allred and Julie Johnson will demonstrate how Latinos navigate choices in diverse coalitions.
The bigger question: Can Democrats rebuild trust by actually delivering on issues like housing, or will they continue to take Latino votes for granted? Latino voters will determine the balance of power in Congress and set the trajectory for American politics through 2050.
**The only question is which party will meet the moment.**
### And About those Gorillas...
However, let's start 2026 off right: with Chuck's harrowing tales from Africa. A 400-pound silverback approaches Chuck in the Rwandan jungle. No glass. No barrier. The gorilla hip-checks him, then sits down in his back pocket. Chuck's trying to record his own death "so Mike can put this on TV."
Chuck Rocha Adventures - 2026 Africa Safari
It's classic Rocha storytelling: absurd, hilarious, and somehow deeply human. But even the gorilla adventure serves as a metaphor for the political landscape the hosts navigate--unpredictable, occasionally dangerous, and requiring both respect for powerful forces and the courage to engage directly.

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I wanted you to hear this directly from me
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20260126-1053&t=1&akid=1054%2E294397%2EX2t3XE)
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260126_1_ak.nLufTy&amount=10&refcode=em20260126-1053&t=3&akid=1054%2E294397%2EX2t3XE)
I wanted you to hear this directly from me.
**My former multi-millionaire opponent, Eric Hovde, is back. This time, he’s trying to boost Judge Chris Taylor’s extreme opponent in Wisconsin’s Supreme Court race.**
Wisconsinites rejected his out-of-touch priorities before because they didn’t reflect our values — fairness, freedom, and respect for our democracy. Those values haven’t changed.
Now, he’s pouring his money and influence into a candidate who would bring the same extreme, out-of-touch views to our state’s highest court.
_We can’t let that happen._
The only way we stop them is the same way we always have — by coming together and **out-organizing** , **out-mobilizing** , and **out-raising** them.
That’s why I’m asking you to pitch in today to support Judge Chris Taylor.
**Your grassroots contribution helps make sure Judge Chris Taylor has the resources to stand up to these attacks, reach voters across Wisconsin, and protect a fair and impartial Supreme Court.** [**Can we count on your support?**](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260126_1_ak.nLufTy&amount=10&refcode=em20260126-1053&t=4&akid=1054%2E294397%2EX2t3XE)
**[Donate $10 ››](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20260126_1_ak.nLufTy&amount=10&refcode=em20260126-1053&t=23&akid=1054%2E294397%2EX2t3XE)**
We’ve defeated this agenda before, and together, we can do it again.
Thank you,
Tammy
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_jct_footer?refcode=em20260126-1053&t=24&refcode2=1054_294397_X2t3XE&akid=1054%2E294397%2EX2t3XE)**

clean_body: If you’d like to unsubscribe, | = Peter, I wanted to emphasize just how serious of a moment we are in. Donald Trump’s federal agents are going door to door in Minnesota looking for folks based on their accent or color of their skin. Kids are afraid to go to school, small businesses are hurting, another life has been lost, and the people responsible have yet to be held accountable. Instead, Donald Trump’s DOJ is investigating me. Why? Because my focus has always been protecting the people of Minnesota. They’re trying to scare me and our state — but Minnesota will not be intimidated into silence and neither will I. This legal battle will be expensive, that’s why they’re doing this. # [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124080998/597487749/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmE5YTJlMC1lYmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxjFXECUh7u6N--6VDoAsGihxkTw0YovgcqSF-Bt4i4=)
The events have this weekend have made two things crystal clear:
1. DHS Secretary Kristi Noem must be impeached.
2. ICE must be abolished.

Democrats in the Senate cannot and should not fund the Department of Homeland Security, and with it, a militarized police force accountable only to Donald Trump in ICE. **ICE agents must leave our cities now.**
Last week, I voted ‘HELL NO’ on the budget for ICE and DHS. But with Republicans in charge of the House of Representatives, it passed anyway. Now the bill goes to the Senate, where the president needs ten Democrats to vote with Republicans to pass his bill.
**[But here’s the truth: The only way for Democrats to truly hold Trump, Noem, and ICE accountable, is to win a majority in this November’s midterms. So I need you with me: Will you contribute $20 or more to my campaign to make sure we win big in the upcoming elections?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124080999/597487750/1968607719?refcode=260126_RG_noem-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmE5YTJlMC1lYmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxjFXECUh7u6N--6VDoAsGihxkTw0YovgcqSF-Bt4i4=&emci=a1682ac9-54fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=62a9a2e0-ebfa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=16877361)**
[donate now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124081001/597487752/-309737922?refcode=260126_RG_noem-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmE5YTJlMC1lYmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxjFXECUh7u6N--6VDoAsGihxkTw0YovgcqSF-Bt4i4=)
What ICE is doing is beyond inhumane. They are kidnapping people off the street, going after gardeners, rounding people up at carwashes, restaurants, throwing people to the ground, and more.
Kristi Noem must be held accountable for this travesty – she must be removed from office.
[**This is a critical moment. Please join me in sending a message.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124081003/597487754/-309737922?refcode=260126_RG_noem-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmE5YTJlMC1lYmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ZxjFXECUh7u6N--6VDoAsGihxkTw0YovgcqSF-Bt4i4=)

body:

name: Michele Tafoya
subject: I can hardly believe I am saying this:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tafoya for Senate
body:
Hi folks! I just made it official: I‘m running for U.S. Senate!
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fa4b8d722dc4ef29f5c5c89ef1d08ba&_e=gMlhgPc4JEZJE3eY-DxQ8c8vdK4J9N0yG_kZdw2sMEaVbkiUAGq362XHJHhE9-WKlrcpAAPrQTvfbOziTmi2IGbv4F-8oOc1tke0d9KtlYZAE072AWR29x72OxRPpuumkIvZ0hy2mp9b7ibQoxE-RL2p6z_ZnnZS5lSC-UO4IE7CX5Vik_MUJwucGf2OxFM1VC0A132p_ZDBiNMydlxYHTHmchZsfcMSzXeVsFhb8edeJB3jb5uEjd-fM7BRj3kHq9G6Q1uHcoBXbi42i0ZfEbrPR8gwRUuSH925jZzqxhf1CTnX9prGNaZLZBzAIP17dceS_sb0KgbASmrwmbVdfaU_nM1DLxsxgh2JXy5i9USrkAUQyJtXr2lCh7TRyqYdRdGu1I60pVmC8YTJ93rMacZUHxok-1ElEVuGNaXjvgQg99Wyj44ZTenyTuo6WE-UgCGeJPLuujaqDWkNqZZpIUhseAwLxQUeEbNUQPtcTQxWa15tyq1PG7Ebx1rby9wXS7EwKWcyWBKErA6YKGBo_IJeTx-OklFpxRcmTdbdQzO0tpcTWydVrqLD-sFs-1K8xVaKxpd1PaosufxVnjS0_Bc46Wj_bHn-zq0X42AIPsKDkl0037_2eBvkEZ0YylYUTCvHf8w6VrempcudxWBwO-3YPNPzhzpuk_W3nT8Zl-OgaX5ig73I5uZqOPMvwILI1Ubf8-F-wbkRYl1Y85eDeC9iVObMW_Lfth2wIJ1cWl8-z7WcYSPk7IQhCiQlIW9l7c-m-sY_EiKukAB8wDmsXQ%3D%3D)Folks - my name is Michele Tafoya. **
**I made a career as a sideline reporter for some of the biggest moments in sports history. I spent many Sunday evenings out on the gridiron. And I 've interviewed all-time greats, including Peyton Manning, Patrick Mahomes, and many others who changed the game forever. **
**Now I 'm ready to make a big change myself.**
**With the disaster that failed leadership has brought us to in Minnesota, I just made it official: I'm running for U.S. Senate in my home state of Minnesota!
Before I go on, this will be one of the most consequential Senate races in the entire country - is there anything I can say to convince you to become a [FOUNDING DONOR](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fa4b8d722dc4ef29f5c5c89ef1d08ba&_e=gMlhgPc4JEZJE3eY-DxQ8c8vdK4J9N0yG_kZdw2sMEaVbkiUAGq362XHJHhE9-WKlrcpAAPrQTvfbOziTmi2IGbv4F-8oOc1tke0d9KtlYZAE072AWR29x72OxRPpuumkIvZ0hy2mp9b7ibQoxE-RL2p6z_ZnnZS5lSC-UO4IE7CX5Vik_MUJwucGf2OxFM1VC0A132p_ZDBiNMydlxYHTHmchZsfcMSzXeVsFhb8edeJB3jb5uEjd-fM7BRj3kHq9G6Q1uHcoBXbi42i0ZfEbrPR8gwRUuSH925jZzqxhdxBotXzGk4L588YrmoSCMuqJLhIci8rMV5JtCO3GnzVURZQ-sC5c-Ag9FZ71_woMvTg4ZoCO371u5eyimBxD1wNyjobOmD0dGc2LSTnTyAkKfX7NniQX-P3riKyZ-n0e-_xbKbjQZQOpX_-W8vnPo-H9uZTE10Im7139vkP53Mkst02yku8nZ-mKhIX2dwnTZvgBV4JpdujjybU-fUdPaptdQDwxL6ev34tQeawJBX_tzQIN8isZkAgWpitJJrkPJa-tuTRQ169SFxSE2KNTmTfxxbibxYTqIW2HCRnLeRzYI9aA9Y___hmZ0C1SMLZB0gEogKoeVUOQHGjtx05UZCSabWKngAvt4p0NXIdsq3OiPm5J_E-ZRo4hGkA200WOfs7td_M7fGyPT8Oz8Pk5swRMbQCeAI8kWMmeh6DBEjdHjDf3iJxjfbtdrt506b7McfgOH5NbpUvh9Exjv3nP6fB1r-45LfxFyeIyQKZzd0XA%3D%3D) to my new campaign? [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fa4b8d722dc4ef29f5c5c89ef1d08ba&_e=gMlhgPc4JEZJE3eY-DxQ8c8vdK4J9N0yG_kZdw2sMEaVbkiUAGq362XHJHhE9-WKlrcpAAPrQTvfbOziTmi2IGbv4F-8oOc1tke0d9KtlYZAE072AWR29x72OxRPpuumkIvZ0hy2mp9b7ibQoxE-RL2p6z_ZnnZS5lSC-UO4IE7CX5Vik_MUJwucGf2OxFM1VC0A132p_ZDBiNMydlxYHTHmchZsfcMSzXeVsFhb8edeJB3jb5uEjd-fM7BRj3kHq9G6Q1uHcoBXbi42i0ZfEbrPR8gwRUuSH925jZzqxhejSiOeMFZ-AqBtbthcDYDS35cLilxBfZkFrshh6n2yqW-fKK3e7QztH3umAZjyolPNDfrpm11MGtqwCAlG_35I2auV5ErPBweU5Yocpx9w-lvMrmOS1DligxCwZfxy5Ou96mMYfYJLCjf15haONnQMjiTfY6FTCHQS0-lUicbxT4jmPy-a8SmmZ5QdMIQ-LhQNh2CbH87jFIDi0RKHrHvgFwtVeAc4Z1MQUf85v8pfBK2VaiQQ1DK8twOBhL1H4LVun75qohDWwZEscnwOWgHRBvJxCRGFGPug1gKTsPo9wnFeyjmEis1zt4Kz28bzX0turfrDn-xiRczLGL63t813x5n2YkMmJyKA2ELuvuz-DYUG1d6KGWqGZihcHnwKMaim3EG3acOsyPmFNQiofMWXPsDmitzDI5eweUZPFXG80OFI0brPBF667keQorPrLXiSR_nyP_0xr4bfnLrJYnoD1fqpfoLQffAbaYkzsFxsMw%3D%3D)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR
](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fa4b8d722dc4ef29f5c5c89ef1d08ba&_e=gMlhgPc4JEZJE3eY-DxQ8c8vdK4J9N0yG_kZdw2sMEaVbkiUAGq362XHJHhE9-WKlrcpAAPrQTvfbOziTmi2IGbv4F-8oOc1tke0d9KtlYZAE072AWR29x72OxRPpuumkIvZ0hy2mp9b7ibQoxE-RL2p6z_ZnnZS5lSC-UO4IE7CX5Vik_MUJwucGf2OxFM1VC0A132p_ZDBiNMydlxYHTHmchZsfcMSzXeVsFhb8edeJB3jb5uEjd-fM7BRj3kHq9G6Q1uHcoBXbi42i0ZfEbrPR8gwRUuSH925jZzqxhczwcqLDTtHLmbjGUd_sBBYA-QzDjjE72qzPGtmIn1IsHS8lWdtpp1Jm-zaEZiHMUnTXGi9yp-Htn6xdSMcwfr0P3xoa4fuSzIcx13AL9BnoyuElhD2vC5EQbdROBur6eXNnyYK9ZzNR5eKOH-VTuNdkob6QkUZ6WtCjcmueo30SSR5n_BjHRwdM7-e7fmgAC2WsYnC6m8W317sPlo0qng00PCTqfbHPd-ThVeuoHY8mW9Musr168VpeahINfFczIxYiigYePvxE7hk02LZfBueTydSYwiIQvtbK8zctFFgDj3ogMj397WxMgGHr9fv-3Yo9848w0t-Bh8DdJzCN17HTHTCOmkQFw_t_JvgQ4gBIQ6EXJX9cCFsiMsoZh6Xh3N49kS4q1HTvmPGWWYy1vF7pVeqWL0JxzLk_2iSWnpIUyliWMEVuRJM9i63OC0q48g5X0ikaSWu6PHxAhcokzURsMGrnq19rtVGWtI8QXJMtg%3D%3D)I never in my life thought I'd be sending you this email. **
**I 'm not a politician, I haven't run for office before, and elected office wasn't really an endgame I'd ever thought about. But what Tim Walz, the far-Left, and the career politicians have done to our state forced me to reconsider, including when they ... **
**- STORMED our churches to intimidate worshippers - SQUANDERED our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares- DEMONIZED our brave cops and border agents- ALLOWED men into women's locker rooms - TAXED us into oblivion with zero tangible benefits - SUED the Trump Admin to allow boys in girls' sports- OPENED our borders to millions of illegal immigrants- FORCED divisive propaganda into our classrooms**
**As a sports professional, patriot, Catholic, granddaughter of legal immigrants, wife, and mama bear, they've come after just about everything I care about most. So I had a choice to make: 1) let my state and country descend into ruin, or 2) take a leap of faith to fix it. **
**Experts and consultants told me running for Senate in Minnesota was a fool 's errand. **
**After all, we have a far-Left Governor and two far-Left Senators, Minnesota has been a blue state since Nixon, and it 's the ONLY STATE Ronald Reagan didn't win. **
**But blazing my own trail has never scared me. I made history on TV and won four Emmys for my sports coverage. I 've taken on longer odds than this - and I beat them. **
**[So that’s why I just launched my Senate campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=9fa4b8d722dc4ef29f5c5c89ef1d08ba&_e=gMlhgPc4JEZJE3eY-DxQ8c8vdK4J9N0yG_kZdw2sMEaVbkiUAGq362XHJHhE9-WKlrcpAAPrQTvfbOziTmi2IGbv4F-8oOc1tke0d9KtlYZAE072AWR29x72OxRPpuumkIvZ0hy2mp9b7ibQoxE-RL2p6z_ZnnZS5lSC-UO4IE7CX5Vik_MUJwucGf2OxFM1VC0A132p_ZDBiNMydlxYHTHmchZsfcMSzXeVsFhb8edeJB3jb5uEjd-fM7BRj3kHq9G6Q1uHcoBXbi42i0ZfEbrPR8gwRUuSH925jZzqxheCRyG-kckjj35N7J7SfZBqSTtGdI3bRG3_DxXwia_NNT99_2AdJMjVGdYj2o9jXdKTbKRLpk9_DOK-nQYlb2YzmCrOSuxgiskn0wjgpIa6VpJM57CQqmM5qSpwngCHB3BlbnTwgZz8sVdHLPchiYTj3lcB0Ck79Uy3a666faguJ7xpqm4Xxsx-rhPse7H7S-Wt2IyiERCEhhSjTelTyLPNAiaDNFUvdC8MGNNbASxcR-MxKMjnbIvPTJpUGJ2dHDJT8E6pSpZynRCD0773_wovKBNyUsgHLJKk_3wHZ3T1c_AzERGfk-r9xlL7becA5lpBwmsgin7LigoR6CbABPW-Z0V6FEy7JqTBVFlgTsDIKk1jS-oZbEsfNy57VXaoByBpRwh_cOcyT81V9shWyABnjJI6hIuw0yCXZAuJExjfABdohdi_4FMTS1Ihlap7q748Vf_GzELDpFexdakXkCquQvwWMF4lBMyP5GAkk7ocuQ%3D%3D) I'm taking on Tim Walz's inner circle, the DC power brokers, and the political class who have sold us out for too long. **
**Luckily, there are a lot more of us than there are of them! **
**Now that I have made my decision, my path to winning this Senate race is in your hands. The ONLY way we can flip this seat is by out-organizing, out-working, and out-raising our opponents.**
**That last part is important - because if we can't get our message out far and wide, this race is over and the far-Left wins.

clean_body: Hi folks! I just made it official: I‘m running for U.S. Senate! - my name is Michele Tafoya. I made a career as a sideline reporter for some of the biggest moments in sports history. I spent many Sunday evenings out on the gridiron. And I 've interviewed all-time greats, including Peyton Manning, Patrick Mahomes, and many others who changed the game forever. Now I 'm ready to make a big change myself. With the disaster that failed leadership has brought us to in Minnesota, I just made it official: I'm running for U.S. Senate in my home state of Minnesota! Before I go on, this will be one of the most consequential Senate races in the entire country - is there anything I can say to convince you to become a to my new campaign? never in my life thought I'd be sending you this email. I 'm not a politician, I haven't run for office before, and elected office wasn't really an endgame I'd ever thought about. But what Tim Walz, the far-Left, and the career politicians have done to our state forced me to reconsider, including when they ... - STORMED our churches to intimidate worshippers - SQUANDERED our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares- DEMONIZED our brave cops and border agents- ALLOWED men into women's locker rooms - TAXED us into oblivion with zero tangible benefits - SUED the Trump Admin to allow boys in girls' sports- OPENED our borders to millions of illegal immigrants- FORCED divisive propaganda into our classrooms As a sports professional, patriot, Catholic, granddaughter of legal immigrants, wife, and mama bear, they've come after just about everything I care about most. So I had a choice to make: 1) let my state and country descend into ruin, or 2) take a leap of faith to fix it. Experts and consultants told me running for Senate in Minnesota was a fool 's errand. After all, we have a far-Left Governor and two far-Left Senators, Minnesota has been a blue state since Nixon, and it 's the ONLY STATE Ronald Reagan didn't win. But blazing my own trail has never scared me. I made history on TV and won four Emmys for my sports coverage. I 've taken on longer odds than this - and I beat them. I'm taking on Tim Walz's inner circle, the DC power brokers, and the political class who have sold us out for too long. Luckily, there are a lot more of us than there are of them! Now that I have made my decision, my path to winning this Senate race is in your hands. The ONLY way we can flip this seat is by out-organizing, out-working, and out-raising our opponents. That last part is important - because if we can't get our message out far and wide, this race is over and the far-Left wins. | | ---|--- This just became one of the biggest Senate races in the entire country. I mean it. I'm already hearing that the career politicians are terrified of my campaign. They 're scared because 120+ million people saw a viral video showcasing rampant fraud happening under Tim Walz's watch. They 're scared because folks know who I am and they know I don't take BS from anyone - not from players on the field and certainly not from some empty suits in DC. And they 're scared because they know that if the American people have to choose between fraud, incompetence, special interests, and powerful party bosses... And honesty, common sense, and plain talk - the political class is in for a reckoning. Are you with me? I can 't do this without you! Thanks for taking the time to read this email! Together, we 're going to make history - I can feel it in my bones. Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele Tafoya Republican for Senate, Minnesota It's official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:** | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

name: AZ Dems
subject: Gallego warns: ICE could target Phoenix
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE ARIZONA DEMOCRATIC PARTY
body:
Sen. Gallego is warning Arizonans to prepare as ICE could increase its presence in Phoenix. We need your support to fight back. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124081214/597488281/-1397648958?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260126_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFiZjFlODMtZWNmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b60FkP0UlwQWPzUbgCyRRCcUx-sW6XNpE17Kx1HKdCE=)
---
Team, Senator Ruben Gallego is warning Arizonans to be prepared: ICE could be increasing its presence in Phoenix. After reports that ICE could surge enforcement agents to Phoenix as it has in Chicago and Los Angeles, Gallego called out the agency's overreach and racial profiling. "How ICE is being used is not to go after criminals," Gallego said. "It's to do racial profiling. It's to intimidate the local population." This comes after ICE agents shot and killed Renée Nicole Good and Alex Pretti, both U.S. citizens, in Minneapolis. The Trump administration is defending the agents. Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz accused the administration of tainting both investigations. The FBI is no longer working with state-level law enforcement. **[If you want to flip the state blue so we can fight back against ICE overreach across all 15 counties, we need your help.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124081215/597488282/1861397980?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260126_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFiZjFlODMtZWNmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b60FkP0UlwQWPzUbgCyRRCcUx-sW6XNpE17Kx1HKdCE=)** | [CHIP IN NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124081216/597488283/1861397980?refcode=AU_AZD_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260126_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS8xMDU1MTYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGFiZjFlODMtZWNmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=b60FkP0UlwQWPzUbgCyRRCcUx-sW6XNpE17Kx1HKdCE=)
---
Gallego called on Arizonans to protect themselves — including carrying IDs or passports, "because they are not afraid to detain U.S. citizens for as long as they can."
He's supporting legislation to reform DHS, including requiring warrants for arrests and stopping agents from wearing masks during operations.
"We're gonna do everything we can to hold them accountable, to stop their goonish natures and to protect the people of Arizona," Gallego said.
While Arizona Republicans rush to defend ICE and push legislation to criminalize protesters, Gallego is demanding accountability and standing with Arizonans facing intimidation and racial profiling.
We need to flip competitive seats so we have more Democrats fighting back against ICE overreach. We need to organize in all 15 counties.
Thanks for standing with us,
AZ Dems

We’ve done **SO** much, and it’s truly been a**HELL OF A RIDE**.

clean_body: I just stepped out of the Oval Office to send you this | | | | Forget the middle man. I wanted you to hear this DIRECTLY from me! Thanks to YOU , a year ago I was inaugurated as the 47th President of the United States. We’ve done SO much, and it’s truly been aHELL OF A RIDE. Our border is SHUT , gas prices have hit a FIVE-YEAR LOW , inflation is UNDER CONTROL , the economy is BOOMING , and the USA is finally RESPECTED again. The Democrats CAN’T STAND that the American people are winning again, and they’ll USE EVERY DIRTY TACTIC possible to destroy our progress. And make no mistake, Patriot: when they come after me, they’re really coming after YOU! I’m just standing in their way. We’ve been through HELL together, andNOTHING has torn our bond apart. Unlike the Democrats, I UNDERSTAND how much you love our country and how hard you work every day to live the American dream. And I NEVER forget who I’m fighting for: YOU, John! Together, we will finish what we started. Together, we will keep MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN. — President Donald J. name: Mark Kelly
subject: I’m suing Pete Hegseth.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to silence me because they don’t like what I have to say.

Team, it's Mark.

**I am suing the Secretary of Defense.**

After 25 years in uniform and another 5 in the United States Senate, I never imagined I’d have to do something like this. Hegseth has left me no choice.

Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to punish me because they don’t like what I have to say. Their attacks are directed at me right now, but they’re trying to send a message to every retired member of the military:

Speak out against us and we will come after you with every tool we have at our disposal. We’ll censure you, we’ll threaten your rank and retirement, and we might even court-martial you.

It’s unconstitutional, so I’m suing them. Beyond this lawsuit, it’s important we send a message to Trump and Hegseth to show them just how many people are on this team to defend constitutional rights. That’s where you come in.

I’ve been truly humbled by the support people have sent my way over the past couple of months. It means the world to me that so many of you care about what Trump and Hegseth are trying to do.

That’s how we’ve made it this far, and it’s how we’ll get to the other side of this chapter in our nation’s history. Together.

If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a stand and join the fight, this is it.

[**_Please, if you can spare a quick donation, can I count on you to chip in a contribution, split between my campaign and Maggie Hassan?_**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124081885/597490253/-2000534896?amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.26_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTEwNTk2My1lZWZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2Kba_aV0hdBY6F2a0pDDmdzqDFw3tJ8A6E3W1XLve0=) _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately:_ | | [ DONATE $10 NOW >> ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124081886/597490254/-2000534896?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=LOC_EM_FR_2026.01.26_Mark-Kelly-Split_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP-NC_RS-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MTEwNTk2My1lZWZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=B2Kba_aV0hdBY6F2a0pDDmdzqDFw3tJ8A6E3W1XLve0=)

clean_body: Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to silence me because they don’t like what I have to say. Team, it's Mark. I am suing the Secretary of Defense. After 25 years in uniform and another 5 in the United States Senate, I never imagined I’d have to do something like this. Hegseth has left me no choice. Donald Trump and Pete Hegseth want to use the power of the White House and the Department of Defense to punish me because they don’t like what I have to say. Their attacks are directed at me right now, but they’re trying to send a message to every retired member of the military: Speak out against us and we will come after you with every tool we have at our disposal. We’ll censure you, we’ll threaten your rank and retirement, and we might even court-martial you. It’s unconstitutional, so I’m suing them. Beyond this lawsuit, it’s important we send a message to Trump and Hegseth to show them just how many people are on this team to defend constitutional rights. That’s where you come in. I’ve been truly humbled by the support people have sent my way over the past couple of months. It means the world to me that so many of you care about what Trump and Hegseth are trying to do. That’s how we’ve made it this far, and it’s how we’ll get to the other side of this chapter in our nation’s history. Together. If you’ve been waiting for the right time to make a stand and join the fight, this is it. = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Mark Kelly and Maggie Hassan will go through immediately: | | = | = | = | = | = | = Don’t give up the ship. body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/salinas-email?refcode=email-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/salinas-email?refcode=email-header] Can we have one minute of your attention?
Only 13% of people open emails like these, and even fewer take the time to read the entire message. So thank you for taking the time to hear us out — it matters more than you know. [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/salinas-email-q12026?amount=15]
Especially during times like this.

Here’s the hard truth: November’s election will be the most consequential election of our lifetimes.
The outcomes of November’s elections are not something we can just sit back and witness. We have to play an active role in shaping them, and that starts right now.

Republicans hold a terrifying trifecta in Washington and have used their power to attack our economy, gut our freedoms, and advance the MAGA agenda.
Things we took for granted just one year ago (healthcare access, grocery prices, even our own safety) are now uncertain, and to be frank, make the future feel intimidating and scary.
In less than a year, we have a chance to dismantle the far-right House majority and undo the damage Trump and Republicans have caused.
But we won’t make any progress if we sit back and stay silent. That's where you come in: [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/salinas-email-q12026?amount=15]

Defeating extremism and flipping the House blue starts with supporters like you stepping up and defending Democrats in MUST-WIN races like Andrea’s.
Andrea is ready to FIGHT BACK against Republican extremists’ disastrous agenda, but doing so takes resources.
That’s why we need your help today. Our mission is powered by people like YOU, and as Andrea works to defend her seat, reach out to OR-06 voters, and put an end to Trump’s MAGA agenda, your support has never been more important. So we’re asking: Can you spare a few dollars to help Andrea flip the House blue? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/salinas-email-q12026?amount=15]

name: Justice Democrats
subject: ICE murdered another Minnesotan.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

Over the weekend, ICE executed another civilian in the streets of
Minneapolis.

This time, it was 37-year-old Alex Pretti, an intensive care nurse for
veterans. He was pepper-sprayed, beaten, and shot ten times by ICE agents
after filming them with his cell phone and trying to help a woman who
agents violently shoved to the ground.

Once again, the Trump regime immediately lied and told a different story
to try to justify this unnecessary, deadly use of force. Once again, video
evidence from multiple angles revealed the truth and debunked their
blatant lies.

Trump’s murderous secret police force is completely out of control, and
DHS leadership like Kristi Noem and Greg Bovino have repeatedly proven
that their word cannot be trusted.

In light of yet another state-sanctioned murder, we firmly agree with
Minneapolis Rep. Ilhan Omar:

[2]Tweet from Ilhan Omar: Voting NO on the DHS funding bill is the bare
minimum. Backing Kristi Noem’s impeachment is the bare minimum. Holding
law-breaking ICE agents legally accountable is the bare minimum. ICE is
beyond reform. Abolish it.

As we ramp up the pressure on Democratic Party leaders to do their jobs in
Congress and stop ICE from killing more people and terrorizing our
communities, if you’re able, please consider contributing to:

* [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140998?t=1002&akid=37401%2E1203867%2EJKFCAd ]Support the Pretti family in the aftermath of this horrific
tragedy.

* [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140999?t=1003&akid=37401%2E1203867%2EJKFCAd ]Fuel one or more of the many organizations and mutual aid funds
fighting back on the frontlines in Minnesota.

It’s up to us — everyday people in every part of the country — to come
together and stand united against ICE and its fascist violence.

We’ll be in touch with more ways to take action soon. As Justice
Democrats’ Rep. Delia Ramirez said, “We brought DHS into this world, and
we WILL build a world without it.”

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20260126-37401-footer&t=1004&refcode2=37401_1203867_JKFCAd&akid=37401%2E1203867%2EJKFCAd

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1005&akid=37401%2E1203867%2EJKFCAd

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Nancy Northup
subject: CRR v. U.S. Department of Justice
body:
Trump is shielding violence at abortion clinics | | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124082323/597491772/-883891047?sourceid=1151117&utm_campaign=26emrge-0115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhMDZkMS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv_2ZEcXTEbztQ4LjnyRorlJGRNWzz4wJ60uH1IILcI=&emci=c0b458ca-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=7d6a06d1-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=954237)
---
|
---
Dear Peter,

We're suing the U.S. Department of Justice (DOJ) for ignoring our attempts to find out why it is selectively enforcing the Freedom of Access to Clinic Entrances (FACE) Act—the only federal law protecting reproductive health care providers and patients from violence.

[Right now, you can help power this lawsuit and your gift will be matched 2X, dollar for dollar, up to $15,000 through February 17.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124082324/597491773/-883891047?sourceid=1151117&utm_campaign=26emrge-0115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhMDZkMS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv_2ZEcXTEbztQ4LjnyRorlJGRNWzz4wJ60uH1IILcI=&emci=c0b458ca-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=7d6a06d1-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=954237) | [FUND OUR LAWSUIT](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124082325/597491774/-883891047?sourceid=1151117&utm_campaign=26emrge-0115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhMDZkMS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv_2ZEcXTEbztQ4LjnyRorlJGRNWzz4wJ60uH1IILcI=&emci=c0b458ca-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=7d6a06d1-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=954237)
---
Days after taking office in 2025, Trump pardoned 23 people convicted under the FACE Act, many of whom were convicted for physically blocking patients from seeing their doctors and accessing needed care. Trump also directed the DOJ to stop prioritizing enforcement of the FACE Act—but only at abortion clinics.

The DOJ continues to selectively and politically enforce the FACE Act. [Just last week, federal authorities arrested multiple people in connection with an anti-ICE protest at a Minnesota church, and are allegedly pursuing FACE Act charges—while refusing to do the same to protect abortion clinics.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124082326/597491775/-883891047?sourceid=1151117&utm_campaign=26emrge-0115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhMDZkMS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv_2ZEcXTEbztQ4LjnyRorlJGRNWzz4wJ60uH1IILcI=&emci=c0b458ca-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=7d6a06d1-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=954237)

We tried to get answers:
* August 2025: We filed FACE Act FOIA #1.
* October 2025: Documents were due; none were produced.
* November 2025: We filed FACE Act FOIA #2.
* January 2026: The DOJ missed its deadline _again._
* _NOW:_ [We're taking them to court.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124082327/597491776/-883891047?sourceid=1151117&utm_campaign=26emrge-0115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhMDZkMS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv_2ZEcXTEbztQ4LjnyRorlJGRNWzz4wJ60uH1IILcI=&emci=c0b458ca-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=7d6a06d1-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=954237)

[FIGHT BACK 2X](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124082328/597491777/-883891047?sourceid=1151117&utm_campaign=26emrge-0115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhMDZkMS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv_2ZEcXTEbztQ4LjnyRorlJGRNWzz4wJ60uH1IILcI=&emci=c0b458ca-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=7d6a06d1-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=954237)
---
The stakes are real. [In 2023 and 2024 alone, abortion providers and patients nationwide faced 296 death threats or threats of harm, and 777 clinic obstruction incidents.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/124082329/597491778/-883891047?sourceid=1151117&utm_campaign=26emrge-0115aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=foia&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZDZhMDZkMS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gv_2ZEcXTEbztQ4LjnyRorlJGRNWzz4wJ60uH1IILcI=&emci=c0b458ca-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=7d6a06d1-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=954237)

That's why our FOIA litigation is so urgent. We’re suing to uncover why abortion clinics are being excluded from protection, who made these decisions, and whose interests are driving DOJ policy.

Thank you for fighting with us,

Nancy Northup
President & CEO

name: Phil Weiser
subject: Channelling Anger Into Action
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Phil Weiser for Colorado
body:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124082366/597491958/1239926708?refcode=ea.8577d3e5-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.8577d3e5-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTc3ZDNlNS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iW1AFXJI284hMfw-15CJqDdC-b3wsB2I5xaitYydNC8=&emci=dc09a075-e8fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=8577d3e5-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=51844520) Friend, I am angry about what is happening in Minnesota. It is not only unconstitutional and illegal, it’s immoral and un-American. Yesterday, as we marched together in the ICE Out protest in Denver, you shared your anger, hurt, and fears with me. I stood with you. And I will continue to fight back. The killings of Renee Good and Alex Pretti remain open wounds for our nation. Renee Good was a veteran and mom. Alex Pretti was an ICU nurse who cared for veterans and whose last words were “are you OK?” We all need to remember who they were and ensure that their memories live on as a blessing and a call to action. Both of them have connections to Colorado. They were among the best of us, and could have been any of us. They were senselessly killed by ICE agents, and their character is being attacked by federal government officials lying about them and their killings. Their families, and all of us, deserve answers and accountability. As your Attorney General, my job is to protect our constitutional rights — our First Amendment right to protest and record government agents engaged in misconduct, our Fourth Amendment right to be free from illegal searches and seizures, and our Fifth Amendment right to due process of law. I will continue to take that work seriously — and not hesitate to challenge this administration’s lawlessness. When I was at the ICE Out protest yesterday, the question I received again and again was how will we respond in Colorado. Here’s what we must do. **First, protest peacefully.** We must use our voices in peaceful protest like the rally I joined yesterday, calling out the injustice, calling out the lies, and calling for the America we believe in — one that honors liberty and justice for all. We must come together united in community. **Second, impartially investigate and prosecute all acts that violate the law.** We must prosecute wrongdoers, including ICE agents who are given a badge and a firearm and who wrongfully and brazenly shoot and kill people senselessly. As your AG, I have set up a [complaint system](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124082367/597491959/1947057458?varCFT=7&refcode=ea.8577d3e5-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.8577d3e5-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTM2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NTc3ZDNlNS1mMGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iW1AFXJI284hMfw-15CJqDdC-b3wsB2I5xaitYydNC8=&emci=dc09a075-e8fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=8577d3e5-f0fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=51844520) for Coloradans to report misconduct by federal agents. The purpose is to make sure any questionable incidents are promptly investigated, any illegal acts are stopped, and people committing them are held accountable. We will not tolerate lawbreakers in Colorado. **Third, hold leaders accountable.** Those who lie, defend, or otherwise fail to call out illegal, indefensible, and dangerous ICE operations must be held to account. Elected leaders who are not standing up for the rule of law, for our Constitution, and for the safety of our communities must be voted out of office. I will stay vigilant and committed to defending our constitutional rights, the rule of law, and Coloradans. In this moment, we must stand together to fight for what is right, to call out what is wrong, and to be there for one another. My time standing in community with you this weekend was what I needed, and I witnessed how we gained strength from each other. Thank you to all who were able to come out and stand in unity. Together, we can, and we will, overcome lies, hate, and injustice as we defend the America we believe in. Phil
---

clean_body: Friend, I am angry about what is happening in Minnesota. It is not only unconstitutional and illegal, it’s immoral and un-American. Yesterday, as we marched together in the ICE Out protest in Denver, you shared your anger, hurt, and fears with me. I stood with you. And I will continue to fight back. The killings of Renee Good and Alex Pretti remain open wounds for our nation. Renee Good was a veteran and mom. Alex Pretti was an ICU nurse who cared for veterans and whose last words were “are you OK?” We all need to remember who they were and ensure that their memories live on as a blessing and a call to action. Both of them have connections to Colorado. They were among the best of us, and could have been any of us. They were senselessly killed by ICE agents, and their character is being attacked by federal government officials lying about them and their killings. Their families, and all of us, deserve answers and accountability. As your Attorney General, my job is to protect our constitutional rights — our First Amendment right to protest and record government agents engaged in misconduct, our Fourth Amendment right to be free from illegal searches and seizures, and our Fifth Amendment right to due process of law. I will continue to take that work seriously — and not hesitate to challenge this administration’s lawlessness. When I was at the ICE Out protest yesterday, the question I received again and again was how will we respond in Colorado. Here’s what we must do. First, protest peacefully. We must use our voices in peaceful protest like the rally I joined yesterday, calling out the injustice, calling out the lies, and calling for the America we believe in — one that honors liberty and justice for all. We must come together united in community. Second, impartially investigate and prosecute all acts that violate the law. We must prosecute wrongdoers, including ICE agents who are given a badge and a firearm and who wrongfully and brazenly shoot and kill people senselessly. As your AG, I have set up a for Coloradans to report misconduct by federal agents. The purpose is to make sure any questionable incidents are promptly investigated, any illegal acts are stopped, and people committing them are held accountable. We will not tolerate lawbreakers in Colorado. Third, hold leaders accountable. Those who lie, defend, or otherwise fail to call out illegal, indefensible, and dangerous ICE operations must be held to account. Elected leaders who are not standing up for the rule of law, for our Constitution, and for the safety of our communities must be voted out of office. I will stay vigilant and committed to defending our constitutional rights, the rule of law, and Coloradans. In this moment, we must stand together to fight for what is right, to call out what is wrong, and to be there for one another. My time standing in community with you this weekend was what I needed, and I witnessed how we gained strength from each other. Thank you to all who were able to come out and stand in unity. Together, we can, and we will, overcome lies, hate, and injustice as we defend the America we believe in. Phil | Make sure this email goes to your inbox.
