name: Jasmine Clark
subject: Does David Scott think Kristi Noem is doing a good job?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jasmine Clark for Georgia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260126em [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260126em]
While families and students in our district are protesting in the streets, while communities are reeling from ICE raids and detentions, and while Congress is demanding accountability — our congressman is doing nothing.
That silence is a choice.
More than 50 House Democrats, including members of the Congressional Black Caucus, have signed on to articles of impeachment against Kristi Noem for overseeing a Department of Homeland Security where Immigration and Customs Enforcement operates with cruelty and impunity.
But David Scott refuses to sign on.
Not after massive protests here in Georgia’s 13th District...
Not after families in Gwinnett County were torn apart...
Not after disabled neighbors were detained in horrific conditions without proper medical care.
In fact, just months ago, he voted to show gratitude to ICE.
That is not leadership. And that is exactly why I’m running to unseat him.
Congress has a constitutional duty to be a check on the executive branch — especially when power is abused. Our district deserves a representative who will stand up to recklessness, not look the other way.
I will not stay silent when our communities are harmed. I will not protect incumbency over people. And I will not back down from demanding accountability.
But taking on a well-funded incumbent requires real grassroots support. If you believe Georgia’s 13th District deserves bold, responsive leadership — please chip in today to help power this campaign: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260126em]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc_dsg-em?refcode=260126em]
Silence is a choice. I’m choosing to fight.
— Jasmine

name: David Hogg
subject: Just 26 days into the new year, three people have been killed by ICE.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE
body:
This is what impunity looks like when it is paid for with billions and protected by those in power.
# [](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/go/852?refcode=em20260126-1&t=1&akid=3086%2E587540%2E_vkpkp)
Peter,
We’re just 26 days into the new year, and three people have been killed by ICE.
Keith Porter Jr., a 43-year-old father of two, was shot and murdered by an off-duty ICE officer outside his home. Then, ICE murdered Renee Good, a 39-year-old mother, and just two days ago they murdered Alex Pretti, a 37-year-old registered nurse in Minneapolis.
**Alex Pretti was a patriot.** He was described by his friends and family as a kindhearted soul who cared deeply for his community and the veterans he cared for as an ICU nurse at the Minneapolis VA hospital.
**He was executed by our government for protecting his neighbors from masked government agents** — he was not the first to be killed, and until we shut down Trump’s secret police, he will not be the last.
**And every single time, like clockwork, Kristi Noem and Trump’s allies immediately smear the victims and spin up a story to make them look like the villain.** They call people “terrorists.” They claim “self-defense.” They rewrite reality before the deceased victim's family even has a chance to see their loved ones. And too many politicians are falling in line and treating government violence like it’s something these people deserved. DHS is not prioritizing the “worst of the worst.” It is running up its arrest numbers and then using a relatively small number of serious criminals to smear everyone else and justify their horrific and unconstitutional behavior.
**This is not normal. It is not inevitable. And there is absolutely no excuse for the harm that Kristi Noem’s DHS has caused.**
ICE is not some neutral “public safety” agency. It is being used as a political weapon. And it is being flooded with over _**70 billion dollars**_ , while basic accountability and oversight are essentially nonexistent. They are recruiting at an alarming rate and lowering standards, sending untrained agents into communities with a gun and unchecked power to detain, raid, and use lethal force, all while hiding behind masks.
ICE has been killing immigrants and escalating brutality across the country. More than 30 people died in ICE custody last year. And in the first weeks of this year alone, 6 people have already died in their custody.
What’s happening right now in Minneapolis is becoming the symbol of how far our government has gone and how much further it’s willing to go. How many people they can detain. How many doors they can kick in. How many lies they can tell. How many children they can rip from their parents. How many rights they can violate. How many patriots they can murder in broad daylight. And whether anyone will stop them.
**We refuse to accept this. And we are not going to stay quiet. We need to demand that Congress take action to impeach Kristi Noem, fire Gregory Bovino, and defund ICE NOW.**
In solidarity,
David
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=2&akid=3086%2E587540%2E_vkpkp)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/signup/update-your-information/)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.leaderswedeserve.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=3086%2E587540%2E_vkpkp)

To give by check:
Leaders We Deserve
611 Pennsylvania Ave SE
#192
Washington, DC 20003
Email us: [info@leaderswedeserve.com](mailto:info@leaderswedeserve.com)
PAID FOR BY LEADERS WE DESERVE, LEADERSWEDESERVE.COM, NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE

name: Tobias Read
subject: Pam Bondi: Don’t try this in Oregon.
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260126em-bondi-FR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260126em-bondi-FR]
Pam Bondi just sent Minnesota officials a letter threatening to pull ICE out of the state unless Minnesota turns over its voter files to the Trump Administration.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260126em-bondi-FR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260126em-bondi-FR]
Make no mistake: That is a direct attempt to use federal enforcement and lawless chaos as leverage to gain access to election infrastructure.
This is an escalation in the Trump Administration’s ongoing attack on our democracy — and it should alarm every American. But I have one message for Pam Bondi: Don’t try this junk in Oregon.
As I’ve done since day one, I will fight to protect Oregon’s voter data and reject any attempts by the Trump Administration to act as if the law doesn’t apply to them.
And now, as they escalate these threats to our democracy, I am prepared to meet them as I’ve always done: with Oregonian values rooted in democracy, transparency, accountability, and the rule of law.
As Oregonians, we stand with Minneapolis. And we will fight to make sure this kind of pressure never succeeds here or anywhere else.
But at this pivotal moment, I need you to join this fight. If you believe that our democracy should never be used as a bargaining chip in a federal government pressure campaign, please follow my campaign updates today. This is urgent, and the work ahead of us needs your support. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260126em-bondi-FR]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/read-em-24?refcode=260126em-bondi-FR]
Thanks for making your voice heard and taking a stand,
Tobias Read

name: Justin Streiff, Turning Point USA
subject: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics — it was about peace
body:
Before Charlie was taken... he wrote this...| | | [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=c1cee000964e45a48dfde41319dc2d4a&_e=-33U2W4lrWQaFW6F9CrcQeXJMzrXv4JQ6CTizKBr59KHp4k5TKvzhFim647-75UrwKquDUYaigjxb09x-LZ3WFF5R0Hc_iIaUCn-J6KkzZ0VPFfKMKw6pQvtW7TWB96LN50ZNpoLEYIRejqMobc2d9Y4P66uDxO0vUcSdmWrG49c4R58r0_J4-Cul2TbcL225xjnRhbmtC20Vy8qHFuCDAMPqABmRSWJeTrug4U-Q_o56NOqOzdmQGsa_3xEqmZq0taEjDJ516x40FSuOMmrmFNeAe1DJrmA3gpo3KCcudHptaA4fzHFmd5PV9x6cTkEKN8FaDrgMCVTD1o4VUH8IQEfWnZ0M19H9GXsymVZ9iHnJLjijwwRj11yosmuR6LsWR4kKy9NolhAzOCN5zFsxnmD_CprNyofIFP-mQqjn6kQUmJidRpuP-Ikjp0XlSgUv1fHDa-2Cu7gCOBOh7DEIk6T4NVXFXjGX_MapXU4N3T297y3CZ7Y-hjrPXUvUoMb-CfSRJdctY2DsEvFSBTiMRm32KvbpkY_jGdcIANOvx3tlQNjyRR1SqJ8EEobzfeKaKXRjw8x2eXvfupeOh2oTnewFmyRiG77B9966PakIcOmAgre_q-j78ChekPPwpa32cc1nUnLBdVBKh-L5TSXBiL2YmiuSBMdfogOfBpuhBMzjZiqr7i_SsoDQS1WpyuT)
---
| | Fellow Patriot,
---
| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

name: Adam Schiff
subject: Wanted to share some thoughts with you
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
# [](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/61?t=1&akid=9454%2E5257348%2E7rp0d2)
Derek, another weekend, another horrific tragedy at the hands of Donald Trump’s ICE and CBP agents, who have been terrorizing people across the country, and most recently in Minnesota.
This has to stop.
Another person shot and killed.
Another senseless loss of life.
We need these poorly trained agents out of our cities. They should never have been ordered in to communities and states over the objections of state and local law enforcement. They are not improving public safety — they are jeopardizing it.
There is no reason to trust the Trump Administration or the Department of Homeland Security to keep people safe, to tell the truth, or to investigate these terrible shootings.
The head of the agency, Kristi Noem, is baselessly calling victims like Renee Good and Alex Pretti “domestic terrorists” while ICE agents tear gas protesters.
**This cannot go on. It just cannot. It’s tearing this country apart.**
I will use my position in the Senate to do everything possible to end this chaos and corruption.
_Derek, I will not vote to give another cent to Trump’s ICE or CBP with them operating in this lawless way._
Republicans may shut down the government if they don’t get the additional money for these lawless agencies, but that will be their decision. Do not ask me to be part of it.
These agencies need to be overhauled from top to bottom. And we can start by prohibiting them from mass deployment to any city or state that has not requested their presence. They need to leave Minneapolis, Chicago, Portland, Los Angeles, and anywhere else where their presence is contributing to the chaos and danger to residents.
We have to put an end to this chaos and violence. And while people in Minnesota and around the nation are using their voices in the streets, we need to use our voices and our votes.
We need to withhold any additional funding for the DHS. We need oversight over the department. We need real guardrails on this out-of-control agency.
And when Democrats take over the Congress — and we will — we will investigate and expose the waste, fraud, and abuse that is rife in a department flush with billions. Money is being spent with no oversight — and come November, that will change.
More soon from me, Derek. I know this is a scary time, I appreciate everything you’re doing, and I will do all I can to make sure you know what is happening and what the Senate can do to stop this mayhem.
— Adam
P.S. If I’m not your Senator, you can make your voice heard by calling your Senator and telling them to oppose funding Trump’s ICE. You can reach them by calling 202-224-3121.
135 E. Olive Ave., #750 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=2&akid=9454%2E5257348%2E7rp0d2) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=3&akid=9454%2E5257348%2E7rp0d2)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE

body:
We in Congress took an oath to serve our constituents and uphold our Constitution.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124084062/597497845/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwMmViZTI2MC1mNGZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WgSBBNunO_mI1SZok14V8H1vC2oIg7yejHzlpO8U2mE=&emci=6d4ae426-eefa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=02ebe260-f4fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Just weeks after an ICE agent killed Renee Nicole Good, we saw another senseless killing of 37-year-old ICU nurse Alex Pretti. Here in Oregon — in Portland's Adventist Health parking lot — we saw ICE detain an entire family, including a 7-year-old child, as they were seeking medical care for a nosebleed. And in Minneapolis, a 5-year-old boy, Liam Ramos, was kidnapped by ICE. **What's happening with Trump's federal immigration enforcement right now is nothing short of horrific.** These incidents reflect a broader pattern of ICE agents operating with little transparency or accountability. Families shouldn't have to fear seeking basic medical care. Children shouldn't be afraid to leave their homes. And Americans shouldn't be shot and killed for filming federal agents. **We in Congress took an oath to serve our constituents and uphold our Constitution. That means taking decisive action to rein in ICE.** I am calling for full transparency, independent investigations, and serious reforms to ensure federal agents clearly identify themselves and respect due process. **Kristi Noem must go. And Congress must say clearly:****_not one more penny for ICE._** I will continue fighting in the Senate and demanding real accountability from Trump's authoritarian administration. Onward, _Jeff_ | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly:

clean_body: We in Congress took an oath to serve our constituents and uphold our Constitution. | | | | Just weeks after an ICE agent killed Renee Nicole Good, we saw another senseless killing of 37-year-old ICU nurse Alex Pretti. Here in Oregon — in Portland's Adventist Health parking lot — we saw ICE detain an entire family, including a 7-year-old child, as they were seeking medical care for a nosebleed. And in Minneapolis, a 5-year-old boy, Liam Ramos, was kidnapped by ICE. What's happening with Trump's federal immigration enforcement right now is nothing short of horrific. These incidents reflect a broader pattern of ICE agents operating with little transparency or accountability. Families shouldn't have to fear seeking basic medical care. Children shouldn't be afraid to leave their homes. And Americans shouldn't be shot and killed for filming federal agents. We in Congress took an oath to serve our constituents and uphold our Constitution. That means taking decisive action to rein in ICE. I am calling for full transparency, independent investigations, and serious reforms to ensure federal agents clearly identify themselves and respect due process. Kristi Noem must go. And Congress must say clearly:not one more penny for ICE. I will continue fighting in the Senate and demanding real accountability from Trump's authoritarian administration. Onward, Jeff | Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution to Jeff Merkley instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- | | Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon. | This email was sent by Jeff Merkley for Oregon PO Box 14172 Portland, OR 97293 United States Email is an important way for Jeff Merkley to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. Your steadfast commitment to the America First movement has placed you among the very few who truly qualify for this elite honor. Out of millions, only 2,500 spots are being opened to the public, reserved strictly for those whose dedication has earned them this distinction. This is your chance to stand among the most committed guardians of our movement as we charge into 2026 and beyond. Urgent: These 2,500 spots are disappearing fast. Once they're claimed, the doors close forever – no exceptions, no second chances. This opportunity will only be available for you UNTIL MIDNIGHT. After that, I will have to move on to the queue of Patriots who are eagerly waiting to activate their MAGA Elite Membership for 2026! Thank you, Donald J. name: Kathryn Harvey
subject: 📣TAKE ACTION NOW!
body:
View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/f37cbd1c0f53/kathryn-harvey-for-congresscampaign-kickoff-6423954?e=edbde6c9b1)
Logo

** We are at an inflection point
------------------------------------------------------------

This weekend brought two ice storms. One we have power over and one we do not. This is not about left or right, Republican or Democrat, it is about basic human decency and the moral compass of this country. What is happening in Minneapolis will happen in every state in this nation if we do not collectively take a stand. It was never about immigration reform, it is about power at all cost. This administration does not concern themselves with the law. It's time to stand up and take action.

Do not let a good snow day go to waste. Call Governor McMaster, Lindsey Graham & Tim Scott tell them no more funding for ICE.

The most important thing to do is to call your reps.

Here is a link to an excellent explainer and script (https://emilyinyourphone.substack.com/p/explainer-ice-funding-battle?r=mxxmy&utm_medium=ios&triedRedirect=true&fbclid=IwZXh0bgNhZW0CMTAAYnJpZBExQXVxNkdJQVU4anRZdjZuUHNydGMGYXBwX2lkEDIyMjAzOTE3ODgyMDA4OTIAAR5EsQB7rJsHTHMRB2PCBr5nv7dQCH8bmvxiI47zC-Hdp-DMLYTba-Xn_j5-Rg_aem_nuaWprZrbXk2SFXjw8KoRA)

-Post on your own social media, asking your friends to call their reps

-Join us February 2nd at our next SPCDP meeting 6pm 650 Howard Street

-Save the date for a President’s Day protest in Greenville on February 16

AND MOST IMPORTANTLY: Get involved locally! State legislatures are on the line all over the country, Governorships, State Attorneys General - these positions all matter. Midterms will be here before we know it so RUN FOR SOMETHING. Filing is March 16-30, every seat needs to be challenged.

** Wofford to host ‘The Rule of Law’ A candid conversation with Adair Ford Boroughs & The Honorable Sherri Lydon February 5 at 6pm
------------------------------------------------------------

Wofford will host Adair Ford Bouroughs, who served as the US Attorney for South Carolina during the Biden Administration and The Honorable Sherri Lydon who served as the US Attorney for South Carolina during the first Trump Administration.

The third installment of A Candid Conversation will take place Thursday, February 5, at 6 p.m. in the Jerome Johnson Richardson Theater on the Wofford College campus. Doors will open at 5:30 p.m.

A Candid Conversation is a moderated discussion series featuring perspectives from both sides of the political spectrum in an effort to foster civil discourse and share critical information in the current political landscape.

There is no ticketing or pre-registration process. Seating is general admission. For questions about accessible seating and entrance to the building, contact Amanda Gilman, special assistant to the president and campus events management coordinator, at gilmanaf@wofford.edu (mailto:gilmanaf@wofford.edu) .

** Speak out at upcoming meetings
------------------------------------------------------------

* February 2 Spartanburg Delegation Meeting- January 19 sign up for Delegation Meeting by 5pm. Email your written request, you may do so to: dculbreth@spartanburgcounty.org (mailto:dculbreth@spartanburgcounty.org) . Spartanburg County Administration Building, located at 366 North Church Street.

** McMaster’s final State of the State address + Democrats Respond Wednesday at 7pm
------------------------------------------------------------

On Wednesday evening, Governor McMaster will deliver his final State of the State address to the General Assembly. Immediately following his remarks, state Representative and Democratic Candidate for Governor, Jermaine Johnson will lead the Democratic response to the governor’s speech.

You'll be able to watch the Democratic response to the State of the State live on SCETV (https://c8uafteab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wi1osrpOYn_TlS7TWWmxC_K_eObfoIAywQBIXGtiYFMVW5lgQ47pTk_n_a-WqhLXVEJMJQDJfOAi96fI1XkizEi7f_D3bhl27aNG1okIyfTyUmiJQuheZ2_Zey0D00uW3pPRb5xCdD3yLylgMDHsmm-8lvpHX1QYhZ8N-PCQOao=&c=SL6A_oILH3tkeihLHqAD3ZqCk2pXb_if1r4sR9RPM2a3OQ7NhccNyQ==&ch=mJNOvZt1leX1QC9kdQGxSjGxeVzFfwQGkSFCA7PsB2p36i2oiPs-7g==) as well as our SC House Democrats (https://c8uafteab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wi1osrpOYn_TlS7TWWmxC_K_eObfoIAywQBIXGtiYFMVW5lgQ47pTpxto2DD4_CvlKhzwAUMlIh988j8zBFtWipev6VgYNt_9GtALcmVIPBTHSqJqpNxvrosuAlIHBeoTZFBgdntGTj7amjP6ayETvcpd69ntulKnu2SeOgd_UPyi3YV46TCKw==&c=SL6A_oILH3tkeihLHqAD3ZqCk2pXb_if1r4sR9RPM2a3OQ7NhccNyQ==&ch=mJNOvZt1leX1QC9kdQGxSjGxeVzFfwQGkSFCA7PsB2p36i2oiPs-7g==) social media pages.

This past week, there were hearings for top priorities of the Republican supermajority, including:

H. 4756 (https://c8uafteab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wi1osrpOYn_TlS7TWWmxC_K_eObfoIAywQBIXGtiYFMVW5lgQ47pTk_n_a-WqhLXRWdCfCeQNmXy_1o_vMPC1pAqfgnde71pSHXZEpRKuJJxAuCznVeEhnSg4MUCe7K7qhWaJOlSl7v4RBnAbCD6WfmDezPCcwhdD4_avoUS1cFpm0Qftgg2JdmrcmWPcrD1oK-_IZsaio4=&c=SL6A_oILH3tkeihLHqAD3ZqCk2pXb_if1r4sR9RPM2a3OQ7NhccNyQ==&ch=mJNOvZt1leX1QC9kdQGxSjGxeVzFfwQGkSFCA7PsB2p36i2oiPs-7g==) , “the bathroom bill.” Republicans are very concerned about who can use which bathroom. This bill requires a person to use the restroom of the gender they were assigned at birth. The consequence of this bill: you’ll have people who have undergone gender transition in the wrong bathroom – that is, grown men with big beards in the same bathroom as little girls. How will this bill be enforced? Will someone inspect your private parts before you can go to the bathroom? Maybe TSA can set up security checkpoints outside every toilet stall
(https://c8uafteab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wi1osrpOYn_TlS7TWWmxC_K_eObfoIAywQBIXGtiYFMVW5lgQ47pTk_n_a-WqhLXthLr-Pkuh__cG8IKDRetbtmAV6kkMTZ-FjtXUhTiGYXOqpRT3CiK2GiD9vN0qVSGcWRebOHf8-PCNBkes3WfkDilahOe5bOca4Z2EsnpRc8B-3RTqOYQuw==&c=SL6A_oILH3tkeihLHqAD3ZqCk2pXb_if1r4sR9RPM2a3OQ7NhccNyQ==&ch=mJNOvZt1leX1QC9kdQGxSjGxeVzFfwQGkSFCA7PsB2p36i2oiPs-7g==) .

This bill was passed by the Judiciary Committee on Tuesday, so you can expect the debate on the House floor as soon as next week for the first “Wicked Wednesday” of the year.

H. 3643 (https://c8uafteab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wi1osrpOYn_TlS7TWWmxC_K_eObfoIAywQBIXGtiYFMVW5lgQ47pTk_n_a-WqhLXSQBgFyxhLcEmLxO-2Rk333dlCiLhpHsYlbycb1MfqT7WScjJgPKvlPACw6kMIPJdEKOnB3ReRuBHTzw39KvdEJaarAVHIJxGFsVIPlDfVQr9hPVkSN2rfeDE0YPcaAUWR-EkwNhr9SM=&c=SL6A_oILH3tkeihLHqAD3ZqCk2pXb_if1r4sR9RPM2a3OQ7NhccNyQ==&ch=mJNOvZt1leX1QC9kdQGxSjGxeVzFfwQGkSFCA7PsB2p36i2oiPs-7g==) and H. 3310 (https://c8uafteab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wi1osrpOYn_TlS7TWWmxC_K_eObfoIAywQBIXGtiYFMVW5lgQ47pTk_n_a-WqhLXDMzywIxY7m89WKHrkf1BHs-CVH0q1ZFOvbYt6UitwbfbmbDDSopAyGmIVeGVzTis2Dt0A8NOvKmM7EDYaWdzXOXd9Yt9Vvej1SxCx1My9XOptGtkuNntqU6Fx1vM6ic5qwBYoXAoGU0=&c=SL6A_oILH3tkeihLHqAD3ZqCk2pXb_if1r4sR9RPM2a3OQ7NhccNyQ==&ch=mJNOvZt1leX1QC9kdQGxSjGxeVzFfwQGkSFCA7PsB2p36i2oiPs-7g==) , which are two competing versions of the same idea: establishing closed primary elections by requiring you to register as a member of a political party in order to vote in that party’s primary. Under current South Carolina law, voters do not register
with a party, so voters can choose to participate in either party’s primary elections. Voter turnout in primaries is already very low – and these proposals would further reduce the number of people who participate. With fewer moderates and independents voting, that means more and more extreme candidates will win Republican primary elections... Have I mentioned that you should run for office? (https://c8uafteab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wi1osrpOYn_TlS7TWWmxC_K_eObfoIAywQBIXGtiYFMVW5lgQ47pTsVQzbMhmAF7Ddx3BKWckgyssa8_gjy0_6-IOboQKT_GcOG-EeXl-q1aLV0safS5fTUtziBUUM4ikh8JIrC0Ghjr6ka-LjlAFiLTI6f2ZCQXaKdqi-5Vs9HT_7Cn7qR56A==&c=SL6A_oILH3tkeihLHqAD3ZqCk2pXb_if1r4sR9RPM2a3OQ7NhccNyQ==&ch=mJNOvZt1leX1QC9kdQGxSjGxeVzFfwQGkSFCA7PsB2p36i2oiPs-7g==)

These bills were not passed out of subcommittee on Wednesday. As one bill is backed by the Republican establishment and the other bill is backed by the far right “Freedom” Caucus, I’ll be sure to keep you updated on their infighting.

H. 4760 (https://c8uafteab.cc.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001Wi1osrpOYn_TlS7TWWmxC_K_eObfoIAywQBIXGtiYFMVW5lgQ47pTsVQzbMhmAF7ZLjTH_LTRs8enDIf-inBjU1KbnkBaEYv27LbuA5PmRtvyE0FdPhxOVJGXs9c-qQ5G_icymSIYEDJsIXHSTflSAUMTMyog9WyK50GAeZ3F5JyoaNAKbki0t7Dwj3Gor6WsWPzPRSDTKk=&c=SL6A_oILH3tkeihLHqAD3ZqCk2pXb_if1r4sR9RPM2a3OQ7NhccNyQ==&ch=mJNOvZt1leX1QC9kdQGxSjGxeVzFfwQGkSFCA7PsB2p36i2oiPs-7g==) , a ban on medication abortion. If it’s January at the South Carolina State House, that means Republicans are pushing yet another abortion ban – even though our abortion ban law is one of the strictest in the country. This is an attack on women’s freedom to make their own medical decisions and this bill is especially egregious because it will prevent survivors of rape and incest – who have up to 12 weeks to get an abortion under current law – from getting the safe, discrete care that they need. Additionally, it will restrict access to medications that are prescribed to treat conditions like high blood sugar, stomach
ulcers, arthritis and more.

The new abortion ban was passed Wednesday evening by the Judiciary Committee, so expect to see it on the House floor soon – and you can count on House Democrats to fight back. - From the desk of Nick Sottile, SC House Democrats

** With limited political power, Minnesota Democrats navigate resistance to Trump
------------------------------------------------------------
https://www.npr.org/2026/01/16/nx-s1-5678565/immigration-minnesota-democrats-navigate-resistance-to-trump

When President Trump took office last year for a second term, he vowed to curb (https://www.npr.org/2025/01/20/g-s1-43650/trump-inauguration-day-one-immigration) legal migration and deport those who are in the U.S. without legal status.

Now, after nearly one year in office, Minnesota offers a prime example of how his administration is enforcing immigration policies in a blue state.

The fatal shooting (https://www.mprnews.org/story/2026/01/14/questions-about-the-ice-surge-and-renee-macklin-good-answered) of Renee Macklin Good by an Immigration and Customs Enforcement agent last week became a flashpoint for the simmering opposition to federal agents operating within the state.

More than 2,000 federal immigration agents are in Minnesota, and that number is expected to increase.

Read More (https://www.npr.org/2026/01/16/nx-s1-5678565/immigration-minnesota-democrats-navigate-resistance-to-trump)

https://open.spotify.com/episode/6weXFBBZbMzKSEE6EqkirF?si=X46smqpwSUyBRG0-koh2oQ

This past week we were back at the state house for hearings on a bill that would close our primaries and a bill that would ban abortion medication from being mailed to women in South Carolina who need it the most. This week the main bill is on bathrooms. If you want change at the state house then run for something, because we deserve better than this.

We were inspired by words from Revered Barber of the Poor People’s Campaign during MLK Weekend, hosted Rep Ro Khana in Spartanburg and knocked 200 doors to get voters energized ahead of the June 9 primaries.

Stay with me y’all, democracy is a participatory sport.

name: Michele Tafoya
subject: It’s true: I am running for Senate here in Minnesota
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tafoya for Senate
body:
Folks – Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever.

**I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be.**
**But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy:**
**
* Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares
* Failing to condemn the activists storming churches
* Raising prices on hardworking families
* Sabotaging anything the President wants to do
* Forcing men into women's spaces
* Pitting Americans against each other

**
**I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate!
[Is there ANYTHING I can say to convince you to become one of my first donors? The far is already racing to destroy my campaign before it even gets off the ground. I can’t shock the political world and flip this seat without your help.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=93eb81ee7e184e3882bc1b8c1b514624&_e=fvOvaVl5e_8QvdxRPdqOYKbhVCf9B5KdiaeCOJw9XIfUbq5_9kynFuDnL1szY0-PIIVKJ43sHmWqwal5PBIEmPiwA_V91xPHROWQXgY5_EQuj6rod_Kz5Qc9yhXPPczFZYZF4uVvYrnZV8zefVva7jAWt0AjyhNCDpU-aAMhB1PtaOTn8Jv9t5TgAee7R2PSdJ8VK9x6IaWrXT1dxyTsabqN6lM0IEvFKHYXF8b2Sp4wgexrSSFO1TVbjCNiJPK5Jz0zMG0E_B7U2bWGMJEnVAvj0iA_rmHZlD6l98hM6aS5rhy4DLCKkqlD3jcjOxnrb8OAJuqhXGpS3sFnSHKy-PdgK9z0V3IY3w7q9it2MzqS4tkYu4EWQyJ8S8xBxKKuS658cdQsdl29xnHVA1uPhmMox06oLx3cONr0wnwj6JRA9p1ct6xLHu-CucK8EraIdlV-ALSgdBs_UsfPNJv6jhwwQHtX1xEn8-nglFC53Ow5GswQlH50ebXa8_DYVr0IQnIX6QODbtFEI8VPrDEf1mcVqaO1r_72NWMVTgTj4kUutCQmA48LlmVif-U1Bp1K4Q_odEfpXneFSXhQnqs8wse2aiTYD0AxT9APpR0RkzXdyMccuXImVMclYgK5rspGLTfV3DVhKskyzZsrP63LaXlslX-isH6JxGTCDHwNhcPr58JDzhH6dk-WYfAdUxbBKsK3YdjbaTz9CdmBgRsubT9WsHJdA5Z5BLnG5b0NOgp5ZUGdKerqDTIB4YLhzqLss9wo35hFCkI-b_0S_TsZyQt7F1jtqzTr0XrZv4NLPDl9i7u-GxSDqgDF5ExcaeTy9rb1DqakP-AgHmmfKI7-_w%3D%3D)[BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR

**Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. **
**But this year is going to be different for three key reasons:**
**FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. **
**SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. **
**THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said.**
**In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. **
**The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history.
[But only with your help. Will you be one of the first-ever donors to my new campaign? This is going to be one of the MOST IMPORTANT races in the entire country. clean_body: Folks – Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. - Michele Tafoya here! I never really considered running for office. Ever. I was too focused on raising my family, and being the best football sideline reporter I could be. But even in the last few weeks, Minnesota has become the embodiment of everything wrong with politics today. Tim Walz, his inner circle, and the corrupt political class are too busy: Wasting billions of our tax dollars on fraudulent daycares Failing to condemn the activists storming churches Raising prices on hardworking families Sabotaging anything the President wants to do Forcing men into women's spaces Pitting Americans against each other I can 't sit on the sidelines anymore. That's why I'm throwing my hat in the ring and announcing my candidacy for U.S. Senate! thought long and hard about the dynamics of this race before jumping in. Minnesota has long been considered simply out of reach for Republicans. The last time it voted for a GOP President was Nixon. The pundits and political experts say a Republican could never win here. But this year is going to be different for three key reasons: FIRST - I'm running against Tim Walz's right hand. All the rampant fraud that took place here happened under Peggy Flanagan's nose as much as it did under his. We will remind voters about that fact every single day. SECOND - The President has increased his voter share each time he has run. He nearly flipped this state in the last election, and Kamala Harris' running mate was our sitting Governor! Momentum is on our side. THIRD - I'm a different kind of candidate, and I know how to win. I didn't reach the top of my industry by pulling my punches. I put in the work. I never backed down. And I kept fighting, no matter what the naysayers said. In my years on the sidelines, I 've seen a LOT of underdogs win football games that the "experts" said were impossible. The Minnesota Senate race will be another chapter in that storied history. | | ---|--- Thanks in advance for your support. I'll never forget the good folks who stepped up in the opening days of this campaign. You and I are going to do great things together. I can feel it. Be brave. Do good. - Michele Michele Tafoya Republican for Senate, Minnesota It's official - Michele Tafoya is running for U.S. Senate in Minnesota! Endorse her here:** | Paid for by Tafoya for Senate 3500 Vicksburg LN N, STE 267, Plymouth, MN 55447

Trump accused Soros of:

* **BANKROLLING** left-wing agitators

And here's the kicker:

**_The media is burying the story.

And that's exactly why this race in Georgia matters.

**weareiowa.com: President Trump set to visit Iowa Tuesday**
Trump will be in Iowa tomorrow to prop up Republicans up and down the ballot — including Mariannette Miller-Meeks. We all know he endorsed her because he knows she will continue to be a voice to party bosses, not Iowa. But now, he and his buddies in D.C. are showing they will do _anything_ to make sure she wins and keeps the status quo come November.

Between money being funneled in by Mike Johnson, Trump jumping into the race himself, and corporate donors pouring cash into Mariannette's campaign, it's pretty clear what's happening. They're nervous. _And they should be._

clean_body: weareiowa.com: President Trump set to visit Iowa Tuesday | = Peter, you know when someone gets reaaaaally desperate, and they pull out all the stops? weareiowa.com: President Trump set to visit Iowa Tuesday Trump will be in Iowa tomorrow to prop up Republicans up and down the ballot — including Mariannette Miller-Meeks. We all know he endorsed her because he knows she will continue to be a voice to party bosses, not Iowa. But now, he and his buddies in D.C. are showing they will do anything to make sure she wins and keeps the status quo come November. Between money being funneled in by Mike Johnson, Trump jumping into the race himself, and corporate donors pouring cash into Mariannette's campaign, it's pretty clear what's happening. They're nervous. And they should be. Christina isn't running for party approval or establishment support; she is running to be a leader who will only work in the best interests of the people of IA-01. No matter how many big names they send in or how much outside money they dump into this race, we're going to keep building a campaign for the people. = If you've saved your payment information with body:
I’m going to spend every waking hour making sure your concerns aren’t ignored in Congress

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124084968/597500635/-240735101?refcode=email-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGE4NjRlNC1mN2ZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpOT3E8a3g-r9JIp3UFAC3t1Q5tOFxNmZ3yyEx5xiR4=) Some say that Congress grinds to a halt once an election year officially kicks off. Although, it’s not as if Washington was accomplishing much of anything helpful last year either... In an election year, the conventional wisdom in Congress is to hunker down and hold off on actual legislating until after the election. **But that’s not how I do things.** I’m in this job to get things done and make life easier for Kansas families — even when there are countless obstacles in front of us. Yes, passing good legislation is difficult right now. But that doesn’t mean we shouldn’t try. It doesn’t mean we should just sit on our hands, stay quiet, and allow National Republicans to dictate what Congress is focused on. I’m going to spend every waking hour making sure _your_ concerns aren’t ignored in Congress. And in order to do that, I need to know what issues are top-of-mind for you and your family. **_[Will you take just a moment to fill out our new 2026 Priorities Survey, so my team and I know what’s most important to you? I promise, it’ll take less than 60 seconds to complete.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124084969/597500636/-2039018517?refcode=email_012626_minute&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGE4NjRlNC1mN2ZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpOT3E8a3g-r9JIp3UFAC3t1Q5tOFxNmZ3yyEx5xiR4=&emci=19e10fed-97f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=18a864e4-f7fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=22117458)_** | | [Take The Survey](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124084970/597500637/-2039018517?refcode=email_012626_minute&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDIvMS82NTc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOGE4NjRlNC1mN2ZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=bpOT3E8a3g-r9JIp3UFAC3t1Q5tOFxNmZ3yyEx5xiR4=&emci=19e10fed-97f8-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=18a864e4-f7fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=22117458)

-Sharice

name: Joe Jaworski
subject: We are all Minnesota
disclaimer_text: paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign
body:
What we’re seeing right now should alarm every American. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/jaworskifortexas.com/last-night-14192346?e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | [ ](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=82b9801107&e=5d8d80652b)
---
| | , What we’re seeing right now should alarm every American. Federal immigration enforcement has crossed a dangerous line. Federal agents are shooting and killing U.S. citizens and trampling the Bill of Rights in the process. This isn’t happening in secret. It’s happening in broad daylight, leaving communities shocked and afraid. **We are all Minnesota now.** What’s happening there can happen anywhere when unchecked power becomes normalized. There must be real consequences for the killing and brutalization of American citizens and legally present immigrants. **Accountability begins at the ballot box, and that starts in 2026.** Once elected, Democratic leaders must act quickly to stop whatever abuses the courts have not already blocked and demand real oversight, transparency, and consequences. What we’re seeing is dangerous, unconstitutional, and un-American. But not everyone agrees on how to respond. My opponent, Nathan Johnson, says more training is the answer. I disagree. This isn’t a training problem. It’s a power problem. And I will never compromise when the Constitution is being violated. I will fiercely stand with Texans and fight federal overreach when it turns into tyranny. I will stand with families and communities who deserve safety and accountability, not fear and chaos. Like you, I love this country. I’m proud to be an American. And like you, I’m staying right here, fighting to make things right. [**If you believe in this fight, I’m asking you to help me continue it by making a contribution today.**](https://jaworskifortexas.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=2e1f50319ad85f5f9e5c11ac9&id=2494b7b873&e=5d8d80652b) Thank you for standing with me. Onward!

**
**

clean_body: What we’re seeing right now should alarm every American. | | | | | | | , What we’re seeing right now should alarm every American. Federal immigration enforcement has crossed a dangerous line. Federal agents are shooting and killing U.S. citizens and trampling the Bill of Rights in the process. This isn’t happening in secret. It’s happening in broad daylight, leaving communities shocked and afraid. We are all Minnesota now. What’s happening there can happen anywhere when unchecked power becomes normalized. There must be real consequences for the killing and brutalization of American citizens and legally present immigrants. Accountability begins at the ballot box, and that starts in 2026. Once elected, Democratic leaders must act quickly to stop whatever abuses the courts have not already blocked and demand real oversight, transparency, and consequences. What we’re seeing is dangerous, unconstitutional, and un-American. But not everyone agrees on how to respond. My opponent, Nathan Johnson, says more training is the answer. I disagree. This isn’t a training problem. It’s a power problem. And I will never compromise when the Constitution is being violated. I will fiercely stand with Texans and fight federal overreach when it turns into tyranny. I will stand with families and communities who deserve safety and accountability, not fear and chaos. Like you, I love this country. I’m proud to be an American. And like you, I’m staying right here, fighting to make things right. Thank you for standing with me. Onward! | "DONATE" | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | mailto:info@jaworskifortexas.com | | Pol adv. paid for by Joe Jaworski Campaign Our mailing address is: Jaworski for Texas 2228 Mechanic St Ste 307 Galveston, TX 77550-1881 Want to change how you receive these emails? name: Janelle Bynum
subject: ICE needs transparency, accountability, and to follow the law.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Janelle Bynum for Congress
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bynum-email?refcode=email-header [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/bynum-email?refcode=email-header] Friend,

There is unrest all across our country. Another life has tragically been lost at the hands of our government in Minneapolis. My prayers are with the families who have lost loved ones.

But let’s be clear: this tragedy — this terror — is a policy choice by this Administration.

We’ve all seen how DHS Secretary Kristi Noem lies and has led ICE to stray from its original mission. Instead of following the Constitution and using best practices in law enforcement, ICE is terrorizing American citizens, demanding citizenship ‘papers,’ and destroying property families have worked hard for.

ICE needs transparency, accountability, and to follow the law. Full stop. That’s why I voted against ICE funding last week. It’s why I voted against $75 billion in ICE funding over the summer. And that’s why I believe Kristi Noem deserves to be impeached, have her budget scrutinized, and be sent packing back to South Dakota.

We’re at a critical moment for our values and for our country. We must put a stop to this president and his reign of terror and chaos.

-Janelle Bynum

null, do you know what’s happening in Michigan?
**First,** _The Hill_ reported Michigan’s Senate seat is one of the MOST LIKELY to flip red next year.
**Then,** just two weeks ago, Donald Trump himself visited Michigan – he knows his Senate majority hinges on _this_ race.
**And now,** a new poll shows me in a statistical tie (44.1 - 43.7%) with my MAGA opponent (and Trump’s handpicked candidate), Mike Rogers.
If you’ve been waiting for the right time to donate, **now is the time.** This poll comes on the heels of a right-wing Texas billionaire pouring $5 MILLION into this race to support Rogers. Republicans are going ALL IN on this race, and we need to fight back immediately.
**[We set a critical $15,000 daily fundraising goal so we can continue gaining ground. Will you pitch in $5 now to help us reach our goal, keep MI blue, and flip the Senate?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/12855?t=3&akid=2046%2E49239%2EiA8BAC)**

name: Tim Walz
subject: Honoring Alex Pretti
disclaimer_text: paid for by Walz for Governor
body:
#
Peter,
On Saturday, we witnessed yet another tragedy in Minnesota. Alex Pretti, an intensive care nurse for the Department of Veterans Affairs, was killed in a horrifying shooting by federal agents.
I have seen the video. It is sickening. But Minnesota’s justice system will have the last word. It must have the last word.
I told President Trump in no uncertain terms that the state must lead the investigation. The federal government cannot be trusted to do so.
The federal occupation of Minnesota long ago stopped being a matter of immigration enforcement. It is a campaign of organized brutality against the people of our state. And now, that campaign has claimed yet another life.
Minnesotans and our local law enforcement have done everything we can to deescalate. The President must end this operation and pull the thousands of violent, untrained officers sowing chaos and violence out of Minnesota. Now.
Despite these horrific acts by the federal government, Minnesotans are still standing up for the rule of law and the dignity of all people. Minnesotans are witnessing, creating a log of evidence for future prosecution of ICE agents and officials. They are helping their neighbors, walking their kids to school, and feeding their families. I salute their courage — and their restraint.
They think they can provoke us into abandoning their own values. They are wrong.
We will keep the peace. We will secure justice for our neighbors. And we will see this occupation end.
With gratitude and resolve,
Tim Walz

Email us: [info@walzforgovernor.org](mailto:info@walzforgovernor.org)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end.

Prepared and paid for by Walz for Governor
Tim Walz for Governor
P.O. Box 4337
St. Paul MN 55104

name: JB Pritzker
subject: The stakes in New Hampshire could not be higher...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
#
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99524?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt)
Peter, it’s Governor JB Pritzker.
I’m emailing you today about New Hampshire’s Senate race because this is serious: **Senate Republicans’ hand-picked candidate, John Sununu, jumped in to defeat Chris Pappas and flip this open Senate seat red.**
**[Before I go any further, I have to ask: Will you split $15 or more between Chris Pappas and State Democrats Committee to keep New Hampshire blue?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99524?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt)**
_Without Chris Pappas winning in New Hampshire, Democrats won’t have a chance at taking back a majority in the Senate._ That’s why this race is being targeted by GOP super PACs and Republicans across the country.
The NRSC — which pours millions into electing Republicans to the Senate — said they’re “all-in” on John Sununu. And polling shows: This race is a _statistical dead heat_ between Chris Pappas and John Sununu.
This means New Hampshire will see historic levels of outside spending, and we have to be ready to fight back.
Chris is a proven fighter for working families — and he’s seen tough campaigns like this before. He knows it takes grassroots support to win a race like this. That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, Peter.
**[If you’re with me and ready to send Chris Pappas to the Senate, will you split $15 between Chris’s campaign and State Democrats Committee today to help him defend New Hampshire’s seat?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99524?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $5](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99525?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=5&t=4&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt) [Contribute $15](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99525?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=15&t=5&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99525?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99525?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99525?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99525?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99524?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt)
---
I know Chris is the type of leader we need in the Senate — **[so thank you for supporting his campaign today.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/99524?refcode=em20260126-9993&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9993%2E614464%2EySlbKt)**
With gratitude,
JB Pritzker
Governor of Illinois

subject: It’s important that I get your opinion

name: Team Demand Justice PAC
subject: The Court has picked a side — and it’s not yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Demand Justice PAC
body:
[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260126-61117&t=1001&akid=61117%2E1407376%2EA_B2IN ]Demand Justice PAC[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/54940?refcode=em20260126-61117&t=1002&akid=61117%2E1407376%2EA_B2IN ]Demand Justice PAC

The Supreme Court has picked a side — and it’s not yours.

This conservative majority is handing win after win to billionaires and
corporate elites, while working people are left paying the price. Fewer
protections. Fewer rights. Less power to fight back.

This is a dangerous pattern.

Case after case, the Court is dismantling rules that keep corporations in
check and shielding the ultra-wealthy from accountability. The message
couldn’t be clearer: if you’re rich enough, the law bends for you.

New research confirms what Americans already feel in their bones — this
Court is accelerating inequality and eroding democracy. Justice isn’t
blind. It’s bought.

When billionaires win, families lose. When corporations are protected,
communities are sacrificed. And every ruling like this chips away at
public trust in the rule of law.

Demand Justice PAC is fighting back against a Supreme Court captured by
wealth and power — but we can’t do it without you.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260126.sUHRiD&refcode=em20260126-61117&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=1003&akid=61117%2E1407376%2EA_B2IN ]Chip in $5 today to Demand Justice PAC and help us
confront a Court that’s rigging the system for billionaires and leaving
the rest of us behind.

[ https://act.demandjustice.org/go/55459?c0=dj-em-20260126.sUHRiD&amount=5&refcode=em20260126-61117&t=1022&akid=61117%2E1407376%2EA_B2IN ]Donate $5 ››

Thank you,

Team Demand Justice PAC

What if I told you that not one, but _two_ polls show me with a slight lead in this race?
What if I told you that experts at _MSNBC_ say the Senate is “in play,” and that Ohio is one of the states we must win?
What if I told you that _The Cook Political Report_ has increased our odds of flipping this seat – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions to defeat me?
**The momentum is behind our grassroots movement.****But misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves, and whether we’re able to counter the smears and reach voters with the truth depends on folks like you.**
****[**So please, will you chip in $10 – or even $20 – split with Able Dems to fuel our campaign, protect our lead in the polls, and win in Ohio?**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfqtHtWNDtXR0WReOmqZcCOXOzlTtz-Osg_YPdrY6QhRg_FeO_aLfc868_iH8xjcZTVHLbnm5i5ssSfEOckGIb8T7hXJ7OeDhoWduEtVtrzYG5MsHPPJnUpqVu0QT1awjhZHluIgT1S_6M47ZQVuBHcPB5ilOJhLMHRVeU_413UymJyjRk6q2aK2e_Ufdt6418OwjHxyTG6lP27qnP749Xq_P3aGRCjySjOGGN1d788HXOothtBzYv7Hs7F9gVTweriXpI96_vp59SDnHAQ8uvin4WtK1pRlHaVrgvItpbJmlulX5hgxqfc60MlE_M1OoMpNtjnFIJ-NYenhVrhUfZULC/4nm/wURNRsaiRGid0cemJXFA8w/h2/h001.u9GI7eegthkhoPG-ygHlNrWEkQvKoHzJekFsqUkktO0)****

clean_body: I’ll just take a minute of your time. | | | Friend – is there anything I can say to convince you to chip in $10 split between Able Dems and my Senate campaign today? | What if I told you that not one, but two polls show me with a slight lead in this race? What if I told you that experts at MSNBC say the Senate is “in play,” and that Ohio is one of the states we must win? What if I told you that The Cook Political Report has increased our odds of flipping this seat – but that corporate special interests are gearing up to spend millions to defeat me? The momentum is behind our grassroots movement.But misleading attack ads have already hit the airwaves, and whether we’re able to counter the smears and reach voters with the truth depends on folks like you. ** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation to Sherrod Brown and Able Dems will go through immediately. ** Thank you for all that you do. Sherrod elects Democrats with disabilities. We fight to protect accessible voting, expand health care and Social Security, and equality for all. name: Movement 4 Freedom
subject: This week’s M4F Dispatch
body:
| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/ac2b53bdbc2e/welcome-to-the-m4f-dispatch-253?e=81ab29c4d2)
---
[|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=4f6d092e76&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | | | | |
# _The Tragic Killing of Alex Pretti, and Why We Must Act_
---
| | Last weekend, tens of thousands of people gathered in Minneapolis to protest the continued presence of DHS agents in their streets. An event that should have been about solidarity instead became another example of why ICE must be abolished and Kristi Noem must be impeached NOW!
Alex Pretti was shot by federal agents after stopping to help a woman they had pushed to the ground. Alex was not a threat. He wasn’t committing a crime. And yet he was murdered on the streets of Minneapolis.
The Trump Administration is doing what it always does: lying to try and blame the victim instead of holding their agents accountable.
This wasn’t law enforcement.**This was an execution carried out by a deputized force that operated with zero accountability and total impunity.**
ICE has become a state-sanctioned terror squad.
They storm communities. They terrorize children and families. They detain people without due process. And now **they’re killing Americans in broad daylight,** releasing statements full of lies trying to convince us to not believe our own eyes when faced with the truth.
We cannot reform this. **We must dismantle it.**
We demand accountability. We demand the truth. And **we demand the abolition of ICE. It is the most humanity centered action we can take.**
We pray for the families of all who have lost their lives and been terrorized at the hands of ICE agents. Our communities deserve safety, dignity, and justice. Nothing less.
---
| |
# _Which Candidates are Prioritizing Humanity?_
---
|
---
| | The Prioritize Humanity Pledge is our line in the sand. It’s a commitment from candidates and voters alike to demand justice, accountability, and leaders who consistently prioritize and defend our shared humanity. Full stop.
This pledge is another step we can take to make it clear which candidates are ready to govern with humanity at the center of their values.
Want to know where candidates stand? You can search our pledge database to see which have already committed.
👉 [Search the Humanity Pledge.](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=ee564b28ca&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| [DONATE TODAY](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=a80d8e78b2&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
|
---
|
---
| | What does real political power look like beyond Election Day?
_Building Black and Brown Political Power: Beyond the Ballot Box_ is an upcoming event focused on the critical, and often misunderstood, structures that make sustained civic power possible. The conversation will break down the distinct roles of nonprofits and PACs, and how each contributes to the long-term Black and Brown political empowerment.
While voting efforts are essential, they are only the starting point. Lasting influence requires year-round organizing, strategic infrastructure, and a clear understanding of how different entities can be used together to protect communities and advance equality.
This event will demystify these tools, clarify their legal boundaries, and show why 501(c)(3)s, 501(c)(4)s, and Political Action Committees work best in coordination, not isolation.
📅 **January 29th****⏰ 12:30 PM****📍 Howard University Law School** | 2900 Van Ness St, NW, Room HH2, Washington, DC 20008
Building power doesn’t stop at the ballot box. It starts with knowledge and grows with action.
---
|
---
|
---
| | Several states have voter registration deadlines coming up in February, and missing them could mean losing your voice in critical primary elections this year.Whether you’ve moved, changed your name, or just haven’t checked your status recently, now is the moment to make sure you’re registered and ready. These deadlines come fast, and once they pass, they’re no do-overs.
This year’s mid-terms will be decided in the primaries! Who are the candidates speaking up for Gaza, for immigrants, for affordability, for child safety, for humanity? We can’t wait to just vote in November.
Taking a few minutes today can make the difference between sitting out and being stuck with whatever candidate scrapes by on name recognition alone, or truly having a say in who represents your community.
👉 Check your voter registration status now at [Vote.org](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=0605749835&e=81ab29c4d2) or using your state’s official election website.
Democracy only works when we participate. Don’t wait—make sure your voice is counted.
---
| [JOIN THE MOVEMENT](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=fcaff27ab1&e=81ab29c4d2)
---
| |
_**The Movement for Freedom Team**_
---
| | | | | | | [|
---](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=a702e1f1fa&e=81ab29c4d2)
| | _Copyright (C) 2026 Movement 4 Freedom. All rights reserved._
You are receiving this email because you opted in via our website.

Our mailing address is:
Movement 4 Freedom PO Box 33079 Washington, DC 20033 USA

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/profile?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&e=81ab29c4d2&c=6ce96ce85b) or [unsubscribe](https://movement4freedom.us16.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=c20cdecc59106d39c65725a01&id=6276f39f53&t=b&e=81ab29c4d2&c=6ce96ce85b)
---
|

| | 2026 is here, Friend. It’s an election year—and big things are coming, no doubt. But before we get too far down the road—as Eric Church would say—I think we had ourselves a **RECORD YEAR** , my friends:
---
* Secured the border
* Passed the One Big, Beautiful Bill
* Delivered No Tax on Tips
* Delivered No Tax on Social Security

Hi friend, I’m proud to share that our campaign has been endorsed by SEIU 32BJ and the Communication Workers of America (CWA). [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124085899/597504547/-200729754?refcode=260126_np_32bj_img2&ms=260126_np_32bj&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjEvMS8xMTU0MDYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNjVmOTMwYWMtZmFmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=nRVJ1Owc0UU9GYM8LKiQhCdUKXSRduzOGTlrJwRrYnY=) These endorsements are meaningful because they come from the people who actually keep our communities running. Workers who are fighting every day for fair pay, good benefits, and dignity on the job. Unions know what’s at stake in this election. If we lose here, MAGA Republicans will come after workers’ rights, slash benefits, weaken unions, and make life even more unaffordable for working families. I will always stand with working people. I will fight to protect our rights, for good-paying jobs, and to build an economy that rewards work, not wealth. But to do that, we have to win. And experts are saying this race will be one of the toughest and most expensive in the country. **[Please, friend, stand with my friends in the labor movement. ### About Nellie Pou
Nellie Pou is the first Latina to represent New Jersey in Congress, and will be a target for the NRCC in 2026. As a mother and grandmother, Nellie knows what New Jersey families are facing and will continue to bring down costs while creating good-paying jobs. clean_body: I’m proud to share that our campaign has been endorsed by... | | Hi friend, I’m proud to share that our campaign has been endorsed by SEIU 32BJ and the Communication Workers of America (CWA). = These endorsements are meaningful because they come from the people who actually keep our communities running. Workers who are fighting every day for fair pay, good benefits, and dignity on the job. Unions know what’s at stake in this election. If we lose here, MAGA Republicans will come after workers’ rights, slash benefits, weaken unions, and make life even more unaffordable for working families. I will always stand with working people. I will fight to protect our rights, for good-paying jobs, and to build an economy that rewards work, not wealth. But to do that, we have to win. And experts are saying this race will be one of the toughest and most expensive in the country. = | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately. Let me be clear about this: I’m not ONLY supporting Sean because his election is absolutely critical for electing a Democratic House majority this year.
And I’m not ONLY supporting him because the House Republicans currently in charge of our country voted to throw people off Medicaid, gut the Affordable Care Act, and take health care away from hundreds of thousands of people all across Michigan.
**I’m supporting Sean because he is exactly the kind of leader we need to change how things get done in Washington.**
Instead of cutting health care for people who need it, Sean has spent his career working to expand access to care for families all across Michigan.
Instead of cutting taxes for corporate interests, Sean worked across the aisle as a State Senator to cut taxes for seniors and working families.
And instead of getting his funding from a bunch of billionaires and their GOP dark-money machine, Sean’s campaign is by people like you, donating what they can, when they can.
**_[Polling shows that Sean’s race is already one of the closest in the entire country. It’s shaping up to be one of the toughest, hardest-fought, and most competitive districts anywhere in 2026 — and we need to help him win it if we want to build a Democratic House majority through Michigan this year. So will you join me today in standing with Sean by splitting a contribution between Sean’s campaign and mine?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124086144/597505309/-24360905?amount=15&refcode=email_012626_scholtensplit&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MTIzMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTMxZmE1Yy1mYmZhLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1fSQGzK3sOQ5iyNKgGa77RvgmcnJWMAJWARnMDHxC34=)_**

name: Abolish ICE
subject: Sign the petition: Congress must act
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori For Us
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260126_AbolishICE3_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260126_AbolishICE3_act]
Peter,
Instead of demanding that ICE be abolished, too many Democrats are falling back on the same tired excuse: “improper training.” Abolition is the only solution . Will you join our petition and sign on demanding we abolish ICE NOW? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4qRlc8gFxUy7i7fuM0mE1w2]
Look, we’ve seen this playbook before. When the headlines fade, those same politicians quietly vote with Republicans to pour more money into ICE and Border Patrol, claiming that more training and more resources will prevent killings.
It won’t.
No amount of new tech, training, or “reform” will stop an agency designed to harm from doing exactly that.
ICE wasn’t created to protect our communities. It’s only 22 years old, and it was built to protect powerful interests, not everyday people. The only solution is abolition. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4qRlc8gFxUy7i7fuM0mE1w2]
IT'S TIME TO ABOLISH ICE [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4qRlc8gFxUy7i7fuM0mE1w2]
Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are out of control. We must be the real opposition party and stand up to fascism – not allow it to flourish.
Add your name to my petition right now to demand that Congress vote NO on DHS funding and take immediate action to abolish ICE. [https://secure.ngpvan.com/4qRlc8gFxUy7i7fuM0mE1w2]
And if you’re able, I need you with me in this fight. Chip in today to help us build the grassroots power it takes to defeat extremist forces like ICE, AIPAC, and their corporate allies, and to re-elect leaders who will actually stand up for our communities. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260126_AbolishICE3_act]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260126_AbolishICE3_act]
In solidarity,
Cori
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260126_AbolishICE3_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_cab_email-26q1?refcode=X_260126_AbolishICE3_act] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise .
As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities.
Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [https://www.coribush.org] to learn more.

clean_body: [] Peter, Instead of demanding that ICE be abolished, too many Democrats are falling back on the same tired excuse: “improper training.” Abolition is the only solution . Will you join our petition and sign on demanding we abolish ICE NOW? [] Look, we’ve seen this playbook before. When the headlines fade, those same politicians quietly vote with Republicans to pour more money into ICE and Border Patrol, claiming that more training and more resources will prevent killings. It won’t. No amount of new tech, training, or “reform” will stop an agency designed to harm from doing exactly that. ICE wasn’t created to protect our communities. It’s only 22 years old, and it was built to protect powerful interests, not everyday people. The only solution is abolition. [] IT'S TIME TO ABOLISH ICE [] Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans are out of control. We must be the real opposition party and stand up to fascism – not allow it to flourish. Add your name to my petition right now to demand that Congress vote NO on DHS funding and take immediate action to abolish ICE. [] And if you’re able, I need you with me in this fight. Chip in today to help us build the grassroots power it takes to defeat extremist forces like ICE, AIPAC, and their corporate allies, and to re-elect leaders who will actually stand up for our communities. [] DONATE NOW [] In solidarity, Cori [] Cori Bush is a pastor, nurse, survivor, and formerly unhoused single mother of two who knows what it means to struggle and what it means to rise . As a Congresswoman, she has always shown up when it’s hardest: securing disaster relief, lowering insulin costs, and delivering millions for our communities. Across St. Louis, families are being priced out and pushed out. Cori Bush is fighting back for affordable housing, fair wages, and utilities as a human right. Be part of this people-first movement. Visit CoriBush.org [] to learn more. DONATE TODAY [] DONATE MONTHLY [] Paid for by Cori For Us Cori For Us PO Box 12404 St. Louis, MO 63132 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: .

body:
Updated Meeting Time for the Much Anticipated Magic Circle Forum

| | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/5cc570eb6275/warren-howell-the-only-candidate-with-a-real-plan-for-harris-county-17460482?e=7c92d84deb)

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | |
# _Join Me at the Magic Circle Forum!_
---
| | | | | | | | | | [|
---](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=a9a0841011&e=7c92d84deb)
| | | | | | | | | | | |

_Above is a teaser from my presentation at the_ _Republican Women of Katy Forum_
**The Magic Circle Republican Women moved today’s****County Judge Forum to the evening of February 10th, due to inclement weather. Folks, that is just** _**a week before early voting**_**.**

This will be one of the final opportunities for you to join me in my fight to bring a new kind of 21st-century leadership to Harris County: systems that will revolutionize the way the county operates. A system that will root out waste, fraud and abuse and provide real-time accounting of every contract and every tax-dollar - live from the County website.
_**It’s time to bring DOGE to Harris County and finally prioritize fiscal responsibility over backroom deals and pork-filled budgets.**_
_**We CAN lower taxes. We CAN eliminate property taxes for our seniors. **_ _**And we CAN have a surplus again!**_
**The**[**Magic Circle Republican Women’s Club**](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=d27ce6d0e5&e=7c92d84deb)**had to postpone today’s County Judge Forum out of an abundance of caution in light of our frigid weather.****If you prepaid for the January General Meeting/Forum previously planned for today, your payment will automatically be applied to the February 10th forum.****NOTE that this will be an evening event - $35**[**https://www.magiccircleclub.com**](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=db0c9d44e1&e=7c92d84deb)
**Meeting details:****• Date: Tuesday, February 10th****• Location: Maggiano’s Little Italy (Post Oak)****• Social: 5:00 PM****• Program Begins: 5:30 PM**
I’m so I’m honored to have this opportunity to serve once again as I did in the Air Force, and to continue to fight for a stronger, safer, and **more accountable** Harris County.
**Remember that no government has EVER taxed ****their people into PROSPERITY!**. See My full plan to _MAKE HARRIS COUNTY GREAT AGAIN_ on the campaign website. [ _**👉 www.howellforharriscounty.com.**_](https://howellforharriscounty.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ab8c3a643a45a6e2b06d8f050&id=1d4fe3dba9&e=7c92d84deb)
Join our winning team and help lead Harris County to a brighter future with leadership that **WORKS FOR THE PEOPLE!**
---

name: Rachel Wallace
subject: I’m Holding a Town Hall on the ICE Facility Planned for Our Part of PA
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wallace for Congress
body:
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124087249/597508354/-653362279?amount=25&refcode=b26_em_msg_2026.01.26_b1_rw_event&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA3MDNlZGQtZmVmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YJkFPxHNMytB6h2FXu6O91q4nYtw9xKIA1b00pZE-0o=)

---
Hi there, ICE is planning to open a detention facility with a potential capacity to hold 1,500 people or more in Tremont, Pennsylvania, just minutes away from downtown Tremont and steps from a local daycare center. Our congressman, Dan Meuser, has been absolutely silent on what’s happening, leaving local and county officials to try and fill in the blanks. It's the responsibility of our elected officials to listen to the community, advocate for us, and share information about what’s going on. And if Dan Meuser won’t show up, won’t listen, and won’t advocate for us, then I will. **That’s why I am holding a town hall this Thursday, January 29 at 6:00 PM in the Tremont area. We all deserve the chance to share our views on what this facility means for our part of the state.** **Please[RSVP here](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124087251/597508356/1993568173?usp=header&refcode=b26_em_msg_2026.01.26_b1_rw_event&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA5NjQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTA3MDNlZGQtZmVmYS1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=YJkFPxHNMytB6h2FXu6O91q4nYtw9xKIA1b00pZE-0o=&emci=20921040-f8fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=10703edd-fefa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=18681717) to join us and please forward this to 5 of your friends from NEPA and Pennsylvania to ask them to do the same!** I’ve heard from many people in our community who have deep concerns about this facility, including public safety, the impact on local businesses and utilities, and the chaos and division this is sure to bring to our doorsteps. They feel like they didn’t get a say. That no one consulted them. That they don’t have a choice or a voice. One theme I’ve heard from people is that they already feel like Schuylkill County is a dumping ground for things no community wants in their backyards. That’s not how this is supposed to work. In these moments – when our elected officials are MIA, and when social media algorithms seem designed to drive us further apart – it’s important that we can come together in the same room and in person to talk as a community. Let’s sit down and talk together about what’s happening. I hope you can make it on Thursday.
| |
---
Paid for by Wallace for Congress
---
Wallace for Congress
PO Box 15
New Ringgold, PA 17960
United States
---

name: Team Benson
subject: We’ll win this
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOCELYN BENSON FOR GOVERNOR
body:
We knew this would be a close race, but check this out.
# [](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/203?t=1&akid=1430%2E181023%2EqHeq-_)
In case you missed it, friend, the Detroit News dropped a new poll this month, and **it is officially deadlocked.**
This governor’s race is set to be the closest in the country, with three contenders:
1. A MAGA Republican backed by the DeVos family.
2. A third-party spoiler funded by MAGA donors.
3. **And Jocelyn Benson, the only candidate with a proven record of standing up to Donald Trump and fighting for Michigan families.**

We knew it was close — that’s what makes Michigan a battleground state every election. But the smallest of margins will decide this race.
We also know that John James and Mike Duggan have Republican billionaires and dark money groups spending millions — and they’ll do whatever Trump and his donors want to keep the money pouring in.
**But we’ve got something more important as we work to elect Jocelyn: you. It’s the people power that will make the difference in this election.**
That includes you.
**[Will you rush in a donation today to help Jocelyn pull ahead in this deadlocked race?](https://act.jocelynbenson.com/go/239?c0=jmb-em-q12026.Dfun4A&refcode=AU_JMB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20260126_PM1_V1_S1&t=2&akid=1430%2E181023%2EqHeq-_)**

body:
#

**🙏🙏 Please, before you click away, hear us out 🍑🍑
— Team Ossoff for Georgia**
Peter, we are humbly asking you to make a contribution to support Jon Ossoff’s reelection campaign here in Georgia.
If everyone reading this email donated just $10 or even $20, we would not only hit our January fundraising goal, but we’d also have what it takes to respond to the millions of dollars worth of attack ads from the GOP and their super PACs.
Unfortunately, not everyone gives. And the fact that this seat is Republicans’ TOP target is not going to make things easier. So Jon is counting on people who understand how important these donations are to chip in to his campaign today.
[**If reelecting Jon Ossoff — and keeping MAGA out of the Senate — seems worth it to you, we’re asking you to contribute what you can today. name: Judicial Watch Tipsheet
subject: Judicial Watch Sues Justice Depart for FBI Communications Celebrating Prosecution of Trump Adviser Peter Navarro
body:
Judicial Watch announced it filed a Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) lawsuit against the U.S. Department of Justice for communications of Federal Bureau of Investigation (FBI) agents regarding the prosecution of former Trump trade advisor Peter Navarro (Judicial Watch Inc. v. U.S. Department of Justice (No.1:26-cv-00079)).
