name: Lizzie Fletcher
subject: Land of the Free, Home of the Brave
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
We have so many ways we think about and talk about our country and what it means to be an American. Today, I keep thinking about what it means to live in the land of the free and home of the brave. And I am grateful for the brave Americans in Minnesota who are fighting today for freedom for all Americans.
As you no doubt know, on Saturday, a Border Patrol agent shot and killed Alex Pretti—an American citizen and VA ICU nurse—in Minneapolis, Minnesota while he was exercising his rights to speak, assemble, and petition the government guaranteed in the Constitution (as well as his right to bear arms). If you haven’t watched the video, I understand. It is hard to do. But all Americans must know that our government executed our fellow citizen on Saturday. And that, as soon as it happened, federal government officials lied about the events, slandered a good man, and worked to cover it up. We also must know that it was not an isolated incident. It was the second killing by federal agents in Minneapolis in less than three weeks. Since September, Department of Homeland Security (DHS) agents have shot 12 people.
It is unacceptable. It is unconscionable. And it is un-American.
My heart is with Alex Pretti’s family and friends and with the brave people of Minnesota who are grieving while continuing to stand up for their community, for our country, and for our Constitution. They show us what “the home of the brave” really means.
The rights and freedoms our founders enshrined in the Constitution, the ones that generations of Americans have fought and died to secure, are under assault from an administration that believes it will not be held to account.
Americans can prove them wrong. The Congress must act. The courts must act. The citizens must act. That is what American democracy is all about. It is what this moment calls for. And it is what we stand to lose if we do not.
It is time for all of us to stand with and for Minnesota. It is time for all of us to be brave .
We cannot just hope it will not happen again. We cannot wait for the Trump administration to change course on its own. We must use every tool we have to stop the killing of Americans in our streets—especially by those claiming to act in our names and with our authority.
We must use our voices. We must use our votes.
I will use every tool available to me as a member of Congress. I have already added my name to the resolution to impeach Secretary of Homeland Security Kristi Noem. I also voted last week against funding for the Department of Homeland Security. I am calling on the Senate—Democrats and Republicans alike—to do the same. I will continue to sponsor and work on legislation to bring real reform, transparency, and accountability. And I will do all I can to ensure that we live in the land of the free.
Congressional action, while essential, will not be enough. This is a moment for all citizens. Let’s meet it together .
Together we can do anything,
Lizzie Signature [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/lizzie_signature-1.png]

Hey,
Before we can fully launch our voter education program across the Commonwealth, we have an immediate goal to hit, and we need your help.
[**Virginians for Fair Elections must raise $50,000 by midnight on January 31 to kick off our work.****Can you chip in $25 to help us reach that goal?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260126_1.EN8Qa5&amount=3&refcode=20260126-64&t=2&akid=64%2E12592%2ENCn2e0)

This first fundraising push of a campaign matters. It determines how strong we start and how quickly we can move. These funds will lay the groundwork for our success and help send a clear message that we’re ready for the fight ahead.
MAGA Republicans already know this amendment threatens their grip on power in DC. That’s why they will spend the next three months trying to confuse voters and distort the truth.
_Virginia cannot afford to wait to fight back, it has to lead._
We need to lay a strong foundation before February begins so we’re ready to sprint through this campaign. What happens here in Virginia will have national implications, which is why we’re asking you to step up now.
Every day between now and January 31 matters.
[**Can you chip in right now to help us reach our $50,000 goal and start our work strong?**](https://act.virginiansforfairelections.com/go/41?c0=em_ms_vafe_20260126_1.EN8Qa5&amount=3&refcode=20260126-64&t=22&akid=64%2E12592%2ENCn2e0)
Thank you for standing with us at this critical moment,
Virginians for Fair Elections

Hey folks,
I went live with **Pat Dennis** in the middle of a brutal few days. We talked about Minnesota, ICE, Trump's response, and the cracks finally starting to show inside MAGA. This conversation hit deep -- politically _and_ personally.
**Here are a few moments to jump to if you 're watching the replay:**
* [**00:01:07**] We check in emotionally -- why this weekend felt different, heavier, and harder than most
* [**00:04:00**] Trump sends Tom Homan to Minnesota -- and why treating this like a PR problem won't work
* [**00:08:02**] Why Kristi Noem is likely getting thrown under the bus as MAGA starts to panic
* [**00:13:18**] The polling reality Republicans don't want to face -- and the fear starting to creep in
* [**00:26:18**] A pause from politics: protecting your mental health in a country flooded with violence

We get into the execution of Alex Pretti, the lie that this is "about optics," the terrifying lack of accountability, and why extremism always collapses under its own weight. We also talk honestly about burnout, grief, and why stepping away -- even briefly -- is sometimes an act of survival. If you value honest, unfiltered conversations like this -- the kind that don't flinch when things get ugly -- help me keep them going.

With urgency,
--Mike

We talked about Minnesota, ICE, Trump's response, and the cracks finally starting to show inside MAGA. This conversation hit deep -- politically and personally. Here are a few moments to jump to if you 're watching the replay: [00:01:07] We check in emotionally -- why this weekend felt different, heavier, and harder than most [00:04:00] Trump sends Tom Homan to Minnesota -- and why treating this like a PR problem won't work [00:08:02] Why Kristi Noem is likely getting thrown under the bus as MAGA starts to panic [00:13:18] The polling reality Republicans don't want to face -- and the fear starting to creep in [00:26:18] A pause from politics: protecting your mental health in a country flooded with violence We get into the execution of Alex Pretti, the lie that this is "about optics," the terrifying lack of accountability, and why extremism always collapses under its own weight. body:
Here’s why I’m so excited to support Sean:

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124088810/597513898/30495591?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2026-01-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGYyZjE1ZC0wMmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngo70KR8F3pITi655UaaoXYGjcMCAtpFJ4KPbyIpSQM=)

| Team, my good friend Sean McCann is running for Congress in Michigan’s 4th District.

It’s one of the most competitive races in the country — an absolute must-win if we want to flip the House blue — and today, I am proud to officially endorse Sean in his campaign.

[_**In a moment, I’m going to tell you more about why I’m going to do everything I can to help Sean win this race. But if you’re with me, can I count on you to split a donation between Sean’s campaign and mine today to help him win this pivotal election?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124088811/597513899/-891116474?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2026-01-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGYyZjE1ZC0wMmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngo70KR8F3pITi655UaaoXYGjcMCAtpFJ4KPbyIpSQM=)

---
Let me be clear about this: I’m not ONLY supporting Sean because his election is absolutely critical for electing a Democratic House majority this year.

And I’m not ONLY supporting him because the House Republicans currently in charge of our country voted to throw people off Medicaid, gut the Affordable Care Act, and take health care away from hundreds of thousands of people all across Michigan.

**I’m supporting Sean because he is exactly the kind of leader we need to change how things get done in Washington.**

Instead of cutting health care for people who need it, Sean has spent his career working to expand access to care for families all across Michigan.

Instead of cutting taxes for corporate interests, Sean worked across the aisle as a State Senator to cut taxes for seniors and working families.

And instead of getting his funding from a bunch of billionaires and their GOP dark-money machine, Sean’s campaign is by people like you, donating what they can, when they can.

[_**Team, polling shows that Sean’s race is already one of the closest in the entire country. It’s shaping up to be one of the toughest, hardest-fought, and most competitive districts anywhere in 2026 — and we need to help him win it if we want to build a Democratic House majority through Michigan this year. So will you join me today in standing with Sean by splitting a contribution between Sean’s campaign and mine?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124088817/597513903/-891116474?refcode=BLU_EM_HSC_2026-01-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NTY0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZGYyZjE1ZC0wMmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ngo70KR8F3pITi655UaaoXYGjcMCAtpFJ4KPbyIpSQM=)

name: DEMAND Noem Resign (via VPP)
subject: We cannot allow this abuse of power to continue.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Democrats just SLAMMED Kristi Noem >>
| **BREAKING:
Democrats demand Kristi Noem resign for instigating “purposeful chaos and violence”** [](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/noem-resign//?source=VPP_20260126_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=6&akid=22726%2E878179%2E52nPqQ) Between Kristi Noem militarizing our cities and backing Trump’s horrific violence, _one thing is clear:_ _**We CANNOT allow this blatant abuse of power to continue:**_ [Add your name to join the MILLIONS of BRAVE Democrats calling on MAGA minion Kristi Noem to RESIGN, _effective immediately »_](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/noem-resign//?source=VPP_20260126_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=22726%2E878179%2E52nPqQ) | [EMERGENCY PETITION: CALL ON SECRETARY OF HOMELAND SECURITY KRISTI NOEM TO RESIGN »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/noem-resign//?source=VPP_20260126_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=22726%2E878179%2E52nPqQ)
---
**FIRST** Kristi Noem had a Democratic Senator FORCIBLY REMOVED from a press conference for speaking out.

**THEN** she defended Trump’s vile calls to ARREST Democratic lawmakers.

**NOW** protests are erupting across the country to STAND UP to the injustices in Minnesota and DEMAND her resignation.

[We all need to step up and say: ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. That’s why we’re calling on EVERY Democrat in your area: Add your name to demand Kristi Noem RESIGN, NOW! »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/noem-resign//?source=VPP_20260126_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=22726%2E878179%2E52nPqQ)

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22726%2E878179%2E52nPqQ). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22726%2E878179%2E52nPqQ).**

name: Gina Hinojosa
body:
After 12 years of Greg Abbott, Texans have to ask, “are we really better off?”
# [](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)[](https://ginafortexas.com/?refcode=em_ms_gh_header)
Peter,
Working hard used to mean something in the United States, especially in Texas. You worked, you saved, you built a life. And **owning a home was part of the deal.**
**Today, that promise is slipping away.** Housing prices are out of reach, mortgage rates are sky-high, and private equity firms like Blackstone are buying up homes, driving up costs, and turning neighborhoods meant for families into profits.
After 12 years of Greg Abbott, Texans have to ask, _**“Are we really better off?”_**
The short answer? No, we’re far from it.
**[Can you chip in $5 to my campaign right now to help me take on Greg Abbott and make the American Dream a reality again?](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260126_1_homeownership.dXVusS&refcode=em20260126-479&amount=5&t=1&akid=479%2E299639%2EMpHIKv)**
Under Abbott’s watch, median home prices jumped 40% in just four years, and Texas is now short more than 300,000 homes. First-time buyers and working families are getting locked out, while big investors cash in.
**When I’m governor, I will fight to restore the freedom to build responsibly, cut red tape that drives up costs, and put working Texans back in the driver’s seat.**
**[If you’re ready for leadership that makes it possible to buy a home again, chip in $5 today.](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260126_1_homeownership.dXVusS&refcode=em20260126-479&amount=5&t=2&akid=479%2E299639%2EMpHIKv)**
[Donate $5 »](https://act.ginafortexas.com/go/625?c0=em_ms_gh_20260126_1_homeownership.dXVusS&amount=5&refcode=em20260126-479&t=21&akid=479%2E299639%2EMpHIKv)
Thank you,
— Gina

[ Donate » ](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_gh_footer?refcode=em20260126-1&t=22&refcode2=479_299639_MpHIKv&akid=479%2E299639%2EMpHIKv)

name: Elissa Slotkin
subject: When democracies flicker out...
body:
As a former CIA officer, I've seen democracies flicker out. |
---
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124088949/597514273/2053923391?refcode=WUEFHM62_20260126_SlotkinSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057650&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YyZjE1ZC0wMmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKUThaORzq0KlYU27zSw6OETLyWeDd9q-Pm6CZYIFHI=) Peter,

Several weeks ago, myself and five other members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds made a video directly quoting the Uniform Code of Military Justice about the military's responsibility to reject illegal orders.

In response, President Trump called for my arrest, trial and death by hanging.

**Then, I learned that former _Fox News_ host Jeanine Pirro, U.S. attorney for the District of Columbia, asked to interview me.**

This is on top of the FBI's Counterterrorism Division's inquiry at the end of last year.

As a former CIA officer, I've seen democracies flicker out. I've seen what life is like when a government is rigged. I've studied this kind of political authoritarianism in other countries where you can't criticize the guys in charge without getting a knock at the door in the middle of the night.

It's hard to believe I am talking about it in my own country, and the knock is happening on my door.

I've always tried to be straight with you in these emails. When these threats happen, it requires a strategy — because no American wants to live in a country where the president can weaponize the government against his perceived enemies. [**So please: split a contribution between EMILYs List and my campaign today. Your support will help defend me from these attacks and allow me to keep fighting to defend our democracy.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124088950/597514274/2053923391?refcode=WUEFHM62_20260126_SlotkinSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057650&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YyZjE1ZC0wMmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKUThaORzq0KlYU27zSw6OETLyWeDd9q-Pm6CZYIFHI=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your split contribution will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $15](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124088951/597514275/2053923391?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=WUEFHM62_20260126_SlotkinSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057650&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YyZjE1ZC0wMmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKUThaORzq0KlYU27zSw6OETLyWeDd9q-Pm6CZYIFHI=) | [DONATE $35](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124088952/597514276/2053923391?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=WUEFHM62_20260126_SlotkinSplitRS_PL&sourceid=1057650&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhY2YyZjE1ZC0wMmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=VKUThaORzq0KlYU27zSw6OETLyWeDd9q-Pm6CZYIFHI=)

clean_body: As a former CIA officer, I've seen democracies flicker out. | = Peter, Several weeks ago, myself and five other members of Congress with service and veteran backgrounds made a video directly quoting the Uniform Code of Military Justice about the military's responsibility to reject illegal orders. In response, President Trump called for my arrest, trial and death by hanging. Then, I learned that former Fox News host Jeanine Pirro, U.S. attorney for the District of Columbia, asked to interview me. This is on top of the FBI's Counterterrorism Division's inquiry at the end of last year. As a former CIA officer, I've seen democracies flicker out. I've seen what life is like when a government is rigged. I've studied this kind of political authoritarianism in other countries where you can't criticize the guys in charge without getting a knock at the door in the middle of the night. It's hard to believe I am talking about it in my own country, and the knock is happening on my door. I've always tried to be straight with you in these emails. When these threats happen, it requires a strategy — because no American wants to live in a country where the president can weaponize the government against his perceived enemies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue, your split contribution will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = More soon, Elissa = | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you for being a supporter of EMILYs List. subject: We’ve had enough.

body:
Resistance is built by everyday people like you and me.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124089122/597514963/1328794144?refcode=ea.3e68a633-03fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.3e68a633-03fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNjhhNjMzLTAzZmItZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Grtitx9iRPA4zMEujRx8jZFhpLr4hImYt2pMyAuxK_U=&emci=c7e1c458-d3fa-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=3e68a633-03fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=4823105)
---
I need to be direct with you. Authoritarianism has made its way into every nook and cranny of our government. This administration wants us to be overwhelmed and exhausted. They flood our communities with chaos and cruelty, they cut vital healthcare programs in favor of handouts to Big Oil, and they’re relentlessly attacking our most fundamental freedoms, hoping we’ll burn out before we fight back. That’s exactly why we can’t afford to give in. I believe – with every bone in my body – in the power of people coming together. **We must resist.** And we must do it collectively. As I’ve always said: **_if you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together. Right now, going far is the _only_ option._** That’s what JanePAC is building every day — an organized, united movement that can out-organize Trump’s authoritarian agenda and break Big Oil’s grip on our politics by electing bold leaders who refuse to stay silent. And that’s why I’m reaching out to you today. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124089123/597514964/1281732346?amount=25&refcode=ea.3e68a633-03fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.3e68a633-03fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNjhhNjMzLTAzZmItZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Grtitx9iRPA4zMEujRx8jZFhpLr4hImYt2pMyAuxK_U=) **[JanePAC has set a goal of reaching 1,500 grassroots donations before the end of the month — our first end-of-month deadline of the year. These donations will power our work to elect climate champions who will serve as a firewall in their communities against fossil fuel giveaways and Trump's authoritarian overreach. Can I count on you to be one of those 1,500 grassroots donors today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124089124/597514965/2105508926?amount=25&refcode=ea.3e68a633-03fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ms=ea.3e68a633-03fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjNlNjhhNjMzLTAzZmItZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Grtitx9iRPA4zMEujRx8jZFhpLr4hImYt2pMyAuxK_U=)**

clean_body: Resistance is built by everyday people like you and me. | I need to be direct with you. Authoritarianism has made its way into every nook and cranny of our government. This administration wants us to be overwhelmed and exhausted. They flood our communities with chaos and cruelty, they cut vital healthcare programs in favor of handouts to Big Oil, and they’re relentlessly attacking our most fundamental freedoms, hoping we’ll burn out before we fight back. That’s exactly why we can’t afford to give in. I believe – with every bone in my body – in the power of people coming together. We must resist. And we must do it collectively. As I’ve always said: if you want to go fast, go alone. If you want to go far, go together. Right now, going far is the only option. That’s what JanePAC is building every day — an organized, united movement that can out-organize Trump’s authoritarian agenda and break Big Oil’s grip on our politics by electing bold leaders who refuse to stay silent. And that’s why I’m reaching out to you today. | = = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = ---|--- = | = = | = In solidarity, xx Jane | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Send donations via check to: Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: Voter Action Project HQ
subject: It's never funny, but it's always a "joke"
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www
body:
We know the drill with Trump at this point, Team. Everything he says is a "joke" until it's suddenly real. That's why we have to take him at his word, whether it is his attacks on mail-in ballots, his threat to prosecute political opponents over an old election, or his jokes about canceling the upcoming midterm election.
RUSH $35 or more today to defend mail-in ballots, protect early voting, and make every voice heard in our elections in November and beyond >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=012626_2&amount=35]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
Politico: Trump says individuals will soon be prosecuted for 2020 election [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=012626_2&amount=25]
Donald Trump flew to Davos, Switzerland this week, Team, to meet with and give a speech to our European allies. So, of course, President Trump spent his time talking about the 2020 election as he threatens not to hold elections in 2026 . In his own words:
“ It's a war [Ukraine] that should have never started and it wouldn't have started if the 2020 US presidential election weren't rigged. It was a rigged election. Everybody now knows that. They found out. People will soon be prosecuted for what they did. ”
Again, millions of taxpayer dollars have been spent by MAGA elected officials across multiple states looking for evidence of election fraud in 2020, and nothing has been found. Despite years of effort by opponents of voting rights, no valid proof of any misdeeds relating to the 2020 election has been brought to light, even as wave after wave of suppressive legislation has been made law.
Now, Trump is also threatening prosecutions. Who is he targeting? We don't know, even though his MAGA Department of Justice has sued Fulton County, Georgia (home to Atlanta) for ballots and other election materials from 2020. What we do know is that Trump has already weaponized the federal government against his perceived political opponents, like former FBI Director James Comey and New York Attorney General Letitia James. Is his 2024 opponent, Kamala Harris, next? 2020 campaign staff? Or Joe Biden himself?
What we do know is that this is all wrong, and we have to defend our fundamental right to vote before it's too late . The fate of mail-in ballots, early voting programs, voter outreach initiatives, and voter registration drives depends on our work right now, ahead of November.
Pitch in $35 or whatever you can today to help us protect voting rights, defend the use of vote-by-mail, and increase voter participation nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=012626_2&amount=35]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_2&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_2&amount=25] GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_2&amount=50]
GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_2&amount=100] GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_2&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?express_lane=true&refcode=012626_2&amount=35]
This isn't the first time during this term that Trump has claimed 2020 was "stolen". He's continued to push the claim that Dominion voting machines had been rigged against him on social media, and he's issued executive orders targeting the use of vote-by-mail. He pushed his MAGA staff at DOJ to sue dozens of largely Democratic-controlled states for access to their voter rolls. Trump has also repeatedly sought to assert federal control over elections, which are run by the states.
This is a big red warning sign for our elections coming up and our fight for voting rights in general. If the sitting president still can't accept defeat years later after winning another election and returning to power, what makes us think he'll accept election losses by his party in November?
We have to do the work, right now, to fight back. We can't wait until this summer, or even the primaries this spring, to start caring about our elections. We have to stand up in this moment to make sure we have elections in November and that the results will be respected, even by opponents of voting rights if they lose.
Help us fight the vote suppressors with $35 or whatever you can and make every vote count this November around the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-democracy?refcode=012626_2&amount=35]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=012626_2&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=012626_2&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

name: Sarah McBride
subject: Yes, I built the U.S. Capitol out of Legos 😅
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McBride for Delaware
body:
I geek out about government.
#
Let’s just get this out of the way: I’m a nerd.
I’ve been called it enough in my life that I’ve just got to embrace it — _I’m the built-the-Capitol-out-of-Legos, can’t-resist-a-random-history-fact kind of nerd._
[__](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260126-1.R05YFJ&refcode=em20260126-2722&%3Bamount=5&t=1&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)
(I’ve also built the White House out of Legos. It’s a whole thing.)
Did you know that the ballroom at the Hotel du Pont in Wilmington is where Joe Biden celebrated his first Senate win in 1972? Because I did. And I will absolutely tell you about it at length if you let me.
But here’s the thing: I’ve always been this way. I’ve always been fascinated by how our democracy works — how ordinary people, through public service, can actually make lives better.
And now, I get to take that lifelong love of history and turn it into action in Congress — fighting for unions and teachers, fighting for paid leave and an economy that works for working families.
The nerd is in the building, and I’m rolling up my sleeves and working hard every day, but I’m counting on your support to stay focused on advocating and legislating.
[**Will you pitch in $5 now to fuel my work in Congress?**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260126-1.R05YFJ&refcode=em20260126-2722&amount=5&t=2&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260126-1.R05YFJ&amount=5&refcode=em20260126-2722&t=3&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)**
We’re facing real challenges. You know it and I know it.
Donald Trump and Republicans are pushing extreme policies that hurt the very people they’re supposed to represent. They’re trying to distract, divide, and derail progress, but I’m pushing back and I’m working on delivering results.
So yes, I geek out about government. And yes, I still have Lego sets at home. But what fuels me is our shared belief that public service can be a force for good — and that we can build something better, together.
[**If you believe in the work I’m doing, I could use your help. Please chip in $5 or whatever you can now.**](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260126-1.R05YFJ&refcode=em20260126-2722&amount=5&t=4&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)
**[Donate $5 »](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/go/1184?c0=mcb-em-20260126-1.R05YFJ&amount=5&refcode=em20260126-2722&t=23&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)**
Thank you!
— Sarah
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-footer?refcode=em20260126-1&t=24&refcode2=2722_21716_M22xwR&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/receive_fewer_emails/?t=25&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/signup/update_your_information/?t=26&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.sarahmcbride.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=27&akid=2722%2E21716%2EM22xwR)

Email us: [info@sarahmcbride.com](mailto:info@sarahmcbride.com)
Paid for by McBride for Delaware

# [](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/126?t=1&akid=4788%2E582294%2Ex3I6Mf)
Here’s a reminder for you:
**New Hampshire’s Senate race will be one of the most competitive in the country this year.**
This is a deeply purple state. In 2016 Maggie Hassan won her Senate race by just 1,017 votes, and now New Hampshire Republicans control the Governor’s office, the State Senate, and the State House.
I know our race won’t be an easy win — _not even close._ The NRSC has already said they’re all-in for my right-wing opponent, and this could be one of the most expensive races in the country.
**New Hampshire is a purple state** — but I’m no stranger to tough fights. I know that with you on this grassroots team, we can keep this Senate seat blue.
**[So, what do you say? Can you chip in any amount today to help power our campaign?](https://act.chrispappas.org/go/181?c0=em_ms_cp_20260126_2.cRTbij&refcode=em20260126-1&t=2&akid=4788%2E582294%2Ex3I6Mf)**

Chris

# [The Cold Is Brutal. FEMA's Failure Will Be Worse.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=185588464&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NTg4NDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3Njk0NjgyOTQsImV4cCI6MTc3MjA2MDI5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.SbCKaKlc652Ywj5CwPQv9ohHZVIP-h8EuhHNV0r-UE0)
### As millions face record lows, Trump and Kristi Noem's "efficiency" experiment leaves Americans to freeze
| | [David Shuster](https://substack.com/@davidshuster) and [Blue Amp Media](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---
| Jan 26
---
| [](https://substack.com/@davidshuster)| | [](https://substack.com/@blueamp)
---|---|---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=185588464&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NTg4NDY0LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2OTQ2ODI5NCwiZXhwIjoxNzcyMDYwMjk0LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzcyMjUzMiIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.NFHcsn_5nlAmqxI1EnAnY62IQA0vuXCq4esh7wN4fnk&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=185588464&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NTg4NDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3Njk0NjgyOTQsImV4cCI6MTc3MjA2MDI5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.SbCKaKlc652Ywj5CwPQv9ohHZVIP-h8EuhHNV0r-UE0&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3722532&post_id=185588464&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTg1NTg4NDY0LCJpYXQiOjE3Njk0NjgyOTQsImV4cCI6MTc3MjA2MDI5NCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTM3MjI1MzIiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.SbCKaKlc652Ywj5CwPQv9ohHZVIP-h8EuhHNV0r-UE0)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9vcGVuLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9wdWIvYmx1ZWFtcC9wL2ZlbWEtZmxvdW5kZXJzLWFzLXRoZS13aW50ZXItc3Rvcm0_.UPsABhgo0TS-5N_IAu53yHJzbWkcl79RLS17rM0hU4o?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/blueamp/p/fema-flounders-as-the-winter-storm?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
_**By David Shuster**_
The United States is now facing a winter storm of almost biblical proportions: ten days of iron-cold temperatures in some areas flirting with minus 50, trees exploding like artillery shells, power lines collapsing in frozen tangles, and deep snow burying more than a dozen states, including large swaths of the South that regard sleet as a theological mystery.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Some 180 million Americans may feel the bite. Nature, never daunted by our civic arrangements or emergency stockpiles, is coming to collect.
But the storm itself is only the opening act. The real horror will arrive when we witness the machinery of government supposedly designed to respond.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
State and local governments--already worn down by years of overlapping calamities, hollow budgets, and chronic exhaustion--are stretched thin. And looming above this brittle structure is FEMA, the Federal Emergency Management Agency, that great alphabet relic Americans are supposed to trust when the lights go out and the heat dies.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Today, under Donald Trump and DHS Secretary Kristi Noem, FEMA resembles less a rescue agency than a badly managed charity raffle staffed by ghosts.
Once upon a time, FEMA's purpose was clear: coordinate disaster response, marshal federal resources, and prevent citizens from freezing to death in the rubble of their own bad luck.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Now, FEMA is an agency that has been gutted by Trump/DOGE budget cuts, staff purges, and administrative malpractice--presided over by political leadership that regards emergency preparedness as an optional hobby.
Consider North Carolina, where the wounds from 2024's Hurricane Helene remain fresh. According to multiple local reports, FEMA evicted residents from temporary housing earlier than promised--some as recently as this week--despite these residents having nowhere else to go.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
This, mind you, as snow, ice, and freezing rain threaten prolonged power outages. If the goal was to demonstrate a talent for cruelty at precisely the wrong moment, the agency succeeded.
Across the country, the story is the same. Over the past year, the Trump administration closed dozens of FEMA offices and dismissed hundreds of staff.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Trump, Elon Musk, and Kristi Noem did this in the name of "efficiency," that beloved corporate euphemism that actually means, "fewer people doing more work until nothing functions." The very employees who would normally be planning, staging, and coordinating disaster response were sent packing, leaving entire regions to face catastrophe with little more than crossed fingers.
Now, at the last possible moment, Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem has ordered a halt to the termination of disaster workers, extending contracts that were allowed to expire in the first place.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
The headlines are unintentionally comic: _FEMA halts termination of disaster workers as agency prepares for massive winter storm._
An internal email obtained by CNN instructed staff to "cease offboarding" disaster workers whose contracts were expiring--a process that had been cheerfully underway since early January. But reality, that rude intruder, refuses to cooperate. Roughly 300 disaster workers have already been let go this month, with only a handful rehired. Current and former FEMA employees confirm what common sense already knows: the agency is not prepared.
This sudden reversal is not leadership. It is panic.
Disasters, unfortunately, are not mitigated by ideological experiments, management theories, or last-minute political theater. Responding to a massive storm requires competence, people power, and foresight--qualities in short supply in the Trump administration, where agencies are run as if government itself is the enemy. When Americans are left shivering in the dark, Trump and Noem's explanations about budget discipline will not provide warmth or comfort.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
So, as the cold descends and the power grid groans, our nation is once again confronting an uncomfortable truth: the deep snow, unrelenting ice, and subzero temperatures may be ferocious, but the failure to adequately prepare and respond will be almost entirely the fault of the Trump administration.
And when FEMA falters--as it surely will--the blame will not belong to the blizzards, the wind, or the indifferent laws of physics.
It will belong to the Trump team idiots who mistook destruction for efficiency, ideology for governance, and last-minute reversals for competence--and who will now force the suffering public to pay the price, one frozen night at a time.
* * *
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/ae6e36ac-f8bd-4c3c-99bd-9599ae3f361b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---

clean_body: As millions face record lows, Trump and Kristi Noem's "efficiency" experiment leaves Americans to freeze | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? As millions face record lows, Trump and Kristi Noem's "efficiency" experiment leaves Americans to freeze | | and | Jan 26 | | | ---|---|--- | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- | | ---|---|--- By David Shuster The United States is now facing a winter storm of almost biblical proportions: ten days of iron-cold temperatures in some areas flirting with minus 50, trees exploding like artillery shells, power lines collapsing in frozen tangles, and deep snow burying more than a dozen states, including large swaths of the South that regard sleet as a theological mystery. | | ---|---|--- Some 180 million Americans may feel the bite. Nature, never daunted by our civic arrangements or emergency stockpiles, is coming to collect. But the storm itself is only the opening act. The real horror will arrive when we witness the machinery of government supposedly designed to respond. | | ---|---|--- State and local governments--already worn down by years of overlapping calamities, hollow budgets, and chronic exhaustion--are stretched thin. And looming above this brittle structure is FEMA, the Federal Emergency Management Agency, that great alphabet relic Americans are supposed to trust when the lights go out and the heat dies. | | ---|---|--- Today, under Donald Trump and DHS Secretary Kristi Noem, FEMA resembles less a rescue agency than a badly managed charity raffle staffed by ghosts. Once upon a time, FEMA's purpose was clear: coordinate disaster response, marshal federal resources, and prevent citizens from freezing to death in the rubble of their own bad luck. | | ---|---|--- Now, FEMA is an agency that has been gutted by Trump/DOGE budget cuts, staff purges, and administrative malpractice--presided over by political leadership that regards emergency preparedness as an optional hobby. Consider North Carolina, where the wounds from 2024's Hurricane Helene remain fresh. According to multiple local reports, FEMA evicted residents from temporary housing earlier than promised--some as recently as this week--despite these residents having nowhere else to go. | | ---|---|--- This, mind you, as snow, ice, and freezing rain threaten prolonged power outages. If the goal was to demonstrate a talent for cruelty at precisely the wrong moment, the agency succeeded. Across the country, the story is the same. Over the past year, the Trump administration closed dozens of FEMA offices and dismissed hundreds of staff. | | ---|---|--- Trump, Elon Musk, and Kristi Noem did this in the name of "efficiency," that beloved corporate euphemism that actually means, "fewer people doing more work until nothing functions." The very employees who would normally be planning, staging, and coordinating disaster response were sent packing, leaving entire regions to face catastrophe with little more than crossed fingers. Now, at the last possible moment, Department of Homeland Security Secretary Kristi Noem has ordered a halt to the termination of disaster workers, extending contracts that were allowed to expire in the first place. | | ---|---|--- The headlines are unintentionally comic: FEMA halts termination of disaster workers as agency prepares for massive winter storm. An internal email obtained by CNN instructed staff to "cease offboarding" disaster workers whose contracts were expiring--a process that had been cheerfully underway since early January. But reality, that rude intruder, refuses to cooperate. Roughly 300 disaster workers have already been let go this month, with only a handful rehired. Current and former FEMA employees confirm what common sense already knows: the agency is not prepared. This sudden reversal is not leadership. It is panic. Disasters, unfortunately, are not mitigated by ideological experiments, management theories, or last-minute political theater. Responding to a massive storm requires competence, people power, and foresight--qualities in short supply in the Trump administration, where agencies are run as if government itself is the enemy. When Americans are left shivering in the dark, Trump and Noem's explanations about budget discipline will not provide warmth or comfort. | | ---|---|--- So, as the cold descends and the power grid groans, our nation is once again confronting an uncomfortable truth: the deep snow, unrelenting ice, and subzero temperatures may be ferocious, but the failure to adequately prepare and respond will be almost entirely the fault of the Trump administration. And when FEMA falters--as it surely will--the blame will not belong to the blizzards, the wind, or the indifferent laws of physics. It will belong to the Trump team idiots who mistook destruction for efficiency, ideology for governance, and last-minute reversals for competence--and who will now force the suffering public to pay the price, one frozen night at a time. | | ---|---|--- Read More Blue Amp Media Dive into our latest coverage -- from the killing of Alex Pretti and what actionable steps we can take now, to a sharp comparison of Mark Carney and Donald Trump's contrasting visions at Davos. | | and | | ---|---|--- | Jan 25 | * You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2026 Cliff Schecter PO Box 8384, Cincinnati, OH 45208 ? ?

name: Defund ICE via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Tell Senate Democrats to Stop ICE terrorizing our communities

body:
[ stdin# ]Our Revolution Logo

Peter Willis,

It happened again. Alex Pretti was just murdered in cold blood by ICE
agents in Minnesota – and the Trump administration immediately rushed to
spread lies directly contradicting what we all can see with our own eyes.

One thing is clear: ICE, acting as Trump’s private police force, will only
escalate its violence and terror unless we do something to stop it. And
here’s our chance: this week, the Senate is preparing to vote on whether
to send ICE $10 BILLION more as part of the government funding package.

After many Senate Democrats indicated last week they’d support the bill,
the dam is breaking and now they’re vowing to oppose it. But we have to
keep up the pressure RIGHT NOW to make sure they don’t cave.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35005?source=email-20260126&t=1011&akid=10126%2E5885482%2EKfs8aq ]Headline: Funding deal begins to unravel as Senate Democrats vow to
oppose DHS bill over Alex Pretti shooting in Minnesota

Let’s make it clear that anyone who votes to rubber-stamp ICE’s budget
will be complicit in this unchecked machinery of terror.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35005?source=email-20260126&t=1012&akid=10126%2E5885482%2EKfs8aq ]Together let’s overwhelm them with public pressure to stand firm. Take
action right now and tell Senate Democrats – defund ICE. End the violence.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35005?source=email-20260126&t=1013&akid=10126%2E5885482%2EKfs8aq ]ADD YOUR NAME

Federal agents are brutalizing protestors, communities are living in
constant fear, and a government agency has been unleashed on anyone who
dares to dissent. But Congress keeps writing the checks – using OUR
taxpayer dollars.

Just last week, seven Democrats in the House broke ranks and voted to send
ICE BILLIONS more to terrorize us. Now, the Senate will vote to fund the
government this week, and Democrats are FINALLY speaking out, vowing to
oppose the DHS part of the funding bill.

But now it’s up to all of us to force them to stand strong as lobbyists
and Republicans launch an all out assault to keep the money flowing to
ICE.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35005?source=email-20260126&t=1014&akid=10126%2E5885482%2EKfs8aq ]Take a stand. Demand your senator defund ICE and reject another penny
for DHS’s machinery of terror.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/35005?source=email-20260126&t=1015&akid=10126%2E5885482%2EKfs8aq ]ADD YOUR NAME

We cannot allow Congress to keep fueling ICE’s reign of terror with our
tax dollars.

When we organize, we win,

Our Revolution

## Commonsense Corner:
---
Where do we even start?

This weekend, as chaos spiraled out of control in Minneapolis, many of us were forced to slow down due to an arctic blast—and it was probably for the best.
It’s okay to feel exhausted by the news cycle. The outrage is nonstop, the virtue signaling is relentless, and the pressure to react to everything is overwhelming.

We’re not here to add to the noise.

You’re getting plenty of hot takes on social media, cable news, and probably from people in your own life. That’s where our country is right now. The Left will find you in church, on the street, at the grocery store—they don’t care.

There’s no escaping the tension.
So, here’s our message today:

Enjoy a home-cooked meal.Play a board game. Bake a cake with your kids. Put your phone down and love on your family. It’s never been harder to drown out the noise, but it’s never been more important that we try.
---

clean_body: Burchett Bulletin will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | Commonsense Corner: Where do we even start? This weekend, as chaos spiraled out of control in Minneapolis, many of us were forced to slow down due to an arctic blast—and it was probably for the best. It’s okay to feel exhausted by the news cycle. The outrage is nonstop, the virtue signaling is relentless, and the pressure to react to everything is overwhelming. We’re not here to add to the noise. You’re getting plenty of hot takes on social media, cable news, and probably from people in your own life. That’s where our country is right now. The Left will find you in church, on the street, at the grocery store—they don’t care. There’s no escaping the tension. So, here’s our message today: Enjoy a home-cooked meal.Play a board game. Bake a cake with your kids. Put your phone down and love on your family. It’s never been harder to drown out the noise, but it’s never been more important that we try. | Boots on the Ground Poll: Do you feel like the rising political tension in America is having an impact on your overall health and/or well-being? Last Week’s Poll Results | This Week in Tim’s Feed: | What The Media Won’t Tell You: A little cold won’t stop the pro-life movement in America. Last week, tens of thousands of pro-life patriots attended the annual March for Life in Washington, D.C. We’re proud to share that Tim received an A+ on SBA Pro-Life America for voting to protect the lives of the unborn. You can trust that he won’t give up on this fight. | Sport Your Support: | | | | | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress

Dear Friend,

C.S. Lewis is one of my favorite authors, full stop.

His writings were essential in deepening my faith in God and my understanding of the Bible. Maybe, since you opened my email, he has helped you, too.

Why are Lewis's words so powerful?

It's because he was a master at addressing life's most important questions. His vivid language is delightful and captivating to read.

Lewis's signature ability to communicate the truth about Christianity has inspired so many skeptics to **become** believers and even more Christians to renew and deepen their faith. He is certainly the greatest Christian apologist of the twentieth century.

To help you learn more about Lewis's works related to Christianity, we produced a powerful, free course, "**C.S. Lewis on Christianity** ," which you can now own on DVD absolutely free.

**Claim your FREE DVD box set of "C.S. Lewis on Christianity" using this secure link:**

* Good and evil
* Conversion and faith
* Prayer and the Bible
* Suffering and death
* Heaven and Hell

The instructor, Michael Ward, is a distinguished visiting professor at Hillsdale College and a member of the Faculty of Theology and Religion at the University of Oxford. He wrote _Planet Narnia: The Seven Heavens in the Imagination of C.S. Lewis_ and _After Humanity: A Guide to C.S. Lewis 's The Abolition of Man_. He even spent three years living in Lewis's Oxford home as the resident Warden of The Kilns!

You'll find this course especially moving because it examines C.S. Lewis's beautiful writings about faith. You'll even trace Lewis's own journey from skeptic to believer. The combination provides an opportunity for you to grow in your knowledge and understanding of Christianity.

[So please join us in studying Christianity with C.S. Lewis and Michael Ward with this beautiful free DVD box set.](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/s/c/waYwl77uHmgIzh7mXFvZEf8PLhJ7N-m6oEyie4T0XYAPEhA2cUEorTBGl43cDM9qa-EsqvEQHnVBGYIfAOdkbQnWljJZfypa9t3WBBsT8A5WT4_EkPniZwETkijpGO0OVyCFs0udroB3lrs8u6OFw-kpQ7_1AlJaw5r0FrNjPIuoCoPfLJQG4iJokcPFnpvv2Kdmn9cKQmVvLh024xCb9tb0EgJMn9ywk33A-27NGO5HcTdIUBwtQ6ittOfTosPrV2NDuDH_DiKHC0vwYVmI39vuyKIlyvUwrAVzFOYm78JyVKVkarb1b6b7zyzBLZiIYCq9nnnRByigYRIAeh_I3rO6O3AYnN7UPw329BHLXy0sqEPFshL6vCMuvieoM6Wpr0O07iLUQG2bXoOn1KP4vnaAu4A0tLde4V276eO_a5VnQQ7rRNJ3rke-n6g6EJS96h9yWfraEXuKXn6n3XYoQqmIa6Ydu71froLdYBpCqykEu_gjxPcbCSsxyILU1TTofPlsYMFjdacdT_vwJbtJiCbu1eZzKV9RlHnlBSUmfE5wS1qfOvTgUgoV_gDQV6KzB-2-w27BqkS3YM0menVHw02TjZFYqjptyyyIW8FiWIP7zA_sqhwCtPk84iJoknxauI8iUTJBGSLNs2dHHiXrQauXgwCYjJLa4f4W3ovlgkgmTQMOvkxP_2uG-soZMVnDRrjMIlBZi_CCHg20gbSTz-x1YPV3jLZyDrw6Jp6uJlzuoqzMd4MevtVk3oJn_1WmmBZXjn4HI9seNC2jrkEv/eq-t2WS1oE2kwQMGZu8qiszhccQR_XvA/17)

name: Heidi Hall for Congress
subject: Our healthcare system is broken
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Friend,
With the beginning of 2026, the ACA subsidies that Republicans like our opponent failed to renew expired.
Residents in our district have seen their healthcare costs double or even triple—all while the stock prices of healthcare and insurance companies continue to rise.
Their profits skyrocket, and that's by design.
The healthcare system in America is made to benefit private companies and is focused on profit, not care.
Upholding this system and calling for band-aid solutions to this crisis hasn't worked.
I've spent over three decades working in public service, solving problems and helping others in any way that I could, and I've learned that the most important thing you can do is to try and tackle the root of an issue.
While pushing for ACA subsidies provides people with economic relief right now, our goal must be to pass Medicare for All.
Friend, I'm one of the only candidates in this race that's committed to co-sponsoring Medicare for All in Congress, and I need your help to gather the resources we need to spread this message throughout our district. Will you chip in any amount today to help? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
If you have saved your information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process instantly.DONATE $15 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=15&refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
DONATE $35 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=35&refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
DONATE $250 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/Hall-email?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
Another amount [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard_]
In solidarity,
Heidi Hall
Heidi Hall has spent her three-decade public service career working with others to solve problems, protect our land and water, improve health, and build opportunities for others, all while raising two boys primarily as a single mom.
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
Raised by parents who had persisted to make a middle-class life for their kids in Contra Costa County while lifting up others, Heidi was taught to push through and overcome challenges rather than complain about them. She learned to stick up for the vulnerable, to respect working people, and to value equal opportunity and justice.
After graduating from Pomona College and earning graduate degrees from Columbia and Rutgers, Heidi went to work for the Rockefeller Foundation promoting reproductive care and then began her career at the Environmental Protection Agency, stopping the dumping of toxic waste and holding corporate polluters accountable.
Today, Heidi chairs the Nevada County Board of Supervisors, where she’s taken on homelessness, expanded broadband access, and worked to reduce crime and illegal cannabis growth. Heidi flipped her seat from red to blue – and now she’s ready to do it again in Congress to take on toxic politics in Washington and put people first.
Prefer to donate via mail? Address a check to:
Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
SUPPORT HEIDI [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hall-email?refcode=20260126_em_fr_b1_HH_standard]
PAID FOR BY HEIDI HALL FOR CONGRESS

Heidi Hall for Congress
PO Box 729
Grass Valley, CA 95945
United States

body:
|
#
Friend, I recently sent out an email asking you to [**sign on as a grassroots endorser of my re-election campaign.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124090016/597518111/-814608335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjA2OWJhMi0wNmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWSK47CuMBt11H0e-5eL70feU9BB7DQBoU32tUuJN8w=&emci=ec069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=ef069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=27257697) **I’m so grateful to the hundreds of folks who've already put their trust in this campaign. But according to our records, we haven’t seen your signature come in yet.** We’re building this re-election campaign up with the help of our grassroots team, and every signature truly makes a difference. It sends a message that we’re strong, organized, and ready to protect this seat with everything we’ve got. [**Friend, knowing I can count on you to be a part of my re-election campaign would mean so much to me. Will you stand with me and sign your name today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124090017/597518112/-814608335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjA2OWJhMi0wNmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWSK47CuMBt11H0e-5eL70feU9BB7DQBoU32tUuJN8w=&emci=ec069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=ef069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=27257697) | [Sign your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124090018/597518113/-814608335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjA2OWJhMi0wNmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWSK47CuMBt11H0e-5eL70feU9BB7DQBoU32tUuJN8w=&emci=ec069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=ef069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=27257697)

Thank you,
Kristen
**P.S.** I’ve attached my original message below. I look forward to receiving [**your signature soon!**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124090019/597518114/-814608335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjA2OWJhMi0wNmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWSK47CuMBt11H0e-5eL70feU9BB7DQBoU32tUuJN8w=&emci=ec069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=ef069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=27257697)

\------ Forwarded Message ------
From: Kristen McDonald Rivet
Date: Tue, January 13, 2025 at 4:16 PM
Subject: quick request. (not asking for money)
Friend, this is a different kind of email than I usually send.
I’m not asking for a donation today.
**Instead, I’m asking you to personally endorse my re‐election campaign as we head into what’s shaping up to be the toughest race of my career.**
We’re officially in the election year, and MI‐08 is rated as one of the most competitive districts in the country. Your endorsement - today - sends a powerful message that we’ve got the grassroots strength to win and continue delivering for working families.
[**We’re aiming to add 500 names to our list of endorsers to kick off 2026 on strong footing -- and it would mean a lot if you were one of them. Will you endorse today?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124090020/597518115/-814608335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjA2OWJhMi0wNmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWSK47CuMBt11H0e-5eL70feU9BB7DQBoU32tUuJN8w=&emci=ec069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=ef069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=27257697)
[Add your name](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124090021/597518116/-814608335?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjAyNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZjA2OWJhMi0wNmZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pWSK47CuMBt11H0e-5eL70feU9BB7DQBoU32tUuJN8w=&emci=ec069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=ef069ba2-06fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=27257697)
---
Adding your name is quick -- but it carries real weight.
It shows the national GOP that this isn’t a seat they can take lightly. It shows our neighbors that we’re not just in this race -- we’re in it to win it. And it builds momentum for the fights ahead.
MAGA Republicans are pushing policies that would double health care costs for working families, slash critical programs like Medicaid and SNAP, and make it harder for people to afford basics like groceries, prescriptions, and rent. My job is to push back against those cuts, fight for an economy that works for everyone, and protect the progress we’ve already made.
And that’s exactly why this seat matters so much.
Nearly one million dollars in attack ads so far has already shown how far the national GOP is willing to go to flip this seat. But with a strong grassroots team standing shoulder‐to‐shoulder with me, I know we can win -- and keep delivering for mid‐Michigan.
[**So please -- will you add your name to endorse my re‐election campaign today? clean_body: | Friend, I recently sent out an email asking you to I’m so grateful to the hundreds of folks who've already put their trust in this campaign. But according to our records, we haven’t seen your signature come in yet. We’re building this re-election campaign up with the help of our grassroots team, and every signature truly makes a difference. It sends a message that we’re strong, organized, and ready to protect this seat with everything we’ve got. | Thank you, Kristen P.S. I’ve attached my original message below. I look forward to receiving \------ Forwarded Message ------ From: Kristen McDonald Rivet Date: Tue, January 13, 2025 at 4:16 PM Subject: quick request. (not asking for money) Friend, this is a different kind of email than I usually send. I’m not asking for a donation today. Instead, I’m asking you to personally endorse my re‐election campaign as we head into what’s shaping up to be the toughest race of my career. We’re officially in the election year, and MI‐08 is rated as one of the most competitive districts in the country. Your endorsement - today - sends a powerful message that we’ve got the grassroots strength to win and continue delivering for working families. Adding your name is quick -- but it carries real weight. It shows the national GOP that this isn’t a seat they can take lightly. It shows our neighbors that we’re not just in this race -- we’re in it to win it. And it builds momentum for the fights ahead. MAGA Republicans are pushing policies that would double health care costs for working families, slash critical programs like Medicaid and SNAP, and make it harder for people to afford basics like groceries, prescriptions, and rent. My job is to push back against those cuts, fight for an economy that works for everyone, and protect the progress we’ve already made. And that’s exactly why this seat matters so much. Nearly one million dollars in attack ads so far has already shown how far the national GOP is willing to go to flip this seat. But with a strong grassroots team standing shoulder‐to‐shoulder with me, I know we can win -- and keep delivering for mid‐Michigan. Thanks for being in this fight, Kristen | We'd hate to see you go, but you can click here if you'd like to . Thank you for supporting Kristen McDonald Rivet for Congress! Kristen for Michigan P.O. Box 854 Bay City, MI 48707 United States

| | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal.

It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war.

His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before...

**It was about the Sabbath. **

About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God.

Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself.

He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling...

_**The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. **_

To rest. To reflect. To return to God.

This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation.

🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops
🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength
🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America

I know he would've wanted you to have this book.

**When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. **

**[And we’ll ship you a copy of Charlie’s final book straight to your door.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=89e0938498f4486baaa0387df3ca08e4&_e=ifFQcL4vzKmEp6Uot8-xnqBHBoZDaVLIRGVeLzAul5veYT4_0B_lUDgCQuO5nnvfkcDi32EjPgEVLa2QsxNmra2XwVmIN-wd3f-zprrYqyN5YnEtskLPsShvu_TgFZ5ffAxiudDMFJhVzPhkRVJmv3G841Ry_nEGqqMG3XkLTjy4d4j6-poetf51yYaa8JXYohVp5yOZfdVEiJAP_w1p5efm2V3rQTiKxW8fpxQXifc7pWM9K1cquHX4AMqnKoOzM2OCFhOd2wbvUL9chtta7xYyP1jLVIHtq6IzPCM9d9zibE2JMnGk60dGqVT1qJzls4XyUItR_w_krgIetYlBigVYNLscbw_l9rzV2ED8cpUprr4mLUyziHsNR_rquX6C5Y21s-aL-sfRal0lsm7rIiDSUInsuJ_alnEs9r2UMlRm8VuAyB2h7nD-ewdosJSyOa7Vy70JnxKeLp7owhsQixNor2WIxTvgrTtRiOa2WtWIErKv-zJmVS_rGClENGz32RDx4d8n2WdGnhWyMG2R9lGIQwrOAOmHksxFrWoCAvxv2_ViO5uSmpinv9xP5QC8e72GIKltTI1hctEYzbtt8guCTAYbR15phvcvUWkegQtKqlhuaGWHfBzin8Fx2eDEgEVdOjYBYZiYw9Y8RsR1fVQFkLt1b9-9-MPlg9GqF_IxKOaBO-6ZAH5GDTmFjthW)**

clean_body: Charlie’s final book wasn’t about politics...| | | | | Peter, | | Charlie Kirk built a movement for truth -- but his final message pointed to something eternal. It wasn't about politics... or elections... or even about the culture war. His final book was deeply personal, and unlike anything Charlie had written before... It was about the Sabbath. About sacred rest. Reconnecting with God. Charlie wrote this book because he knew what America was missing... and what he nearly lost himself. He found that in a world addicted to busyness, noise, and scrolling... The most radical act of resistance is to STOP. To rest. To reflect. To return to God. This book is his blueprint for how we do that -- as individuals, as families, and as a nation. 🔥 You'll discover how Charlie learned to honor the Sabbath in a culture that never stops 🔥 How setting aside just one day a week gave him clarity, peace, and strength 🔥 Why he believed this message could spark a spiritual revival across America I know he would've wanted you to have this book. When you give today to Turning Point USA, you 're not just supporting the movement Charlie built -- you're helping pass on the message he felt most urgently in his final months. Peter, thank you, in advance, for helping reach the next generation with truth, faith, and moral courage -- the very things Charlie gave his life for. And as you do, may the message of this book lead you -- just as it led Charlie -- to a deeper trust in God, a stronger love for your family, and a renewed peace in your own soul. For Charlie, Justin Streiff Chief Operating Officer Turning Point USA P.S. Charlie Kirk's final book, Stop, in the Name of God, is a heartfelt call to slow down, remember what's eternal, and rest in God. 4940 East Beverly Road Phoenix, Arizona 85044

body:
We have the chance to elect a Democratic trifecta this November
| "Talk to any Wisconsin Democrat about their hopes for 2026 and it’s not long before the T-word comes up. No, not Trump. Trifecta." Friend, the AP has called it – there’s a real chance that we can build a Democratic trifecta here in Wisconsin. And when we do, we’ll be able to deliver on expanding Medicaid, increasing public education funding, providing relief for our farmers, and more. [If those sound like goals you can get behind, will you support our campaign with a contribution of any amount right now?](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=mb-em-fr-jan26.E30PSJ&amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_012626_B1_Trifecta&t=2&akid=5791%2E196590%2EMyOJlT) _If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now._ | | | [DONATE $15 »](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/6683?amount=15&refcode=MB_EM_FR_012626_B1_Trifecta&t=3&akid=5791%2E196590%2EMyOJlT)

Even Republicans acknowledge that a Democratic trifecta may be on the horizon this November. But we can’t take anything for granted – not when my Republican opponent Tom Tiffany has already raised $2 million, with more MAGA dark money on the way.
We already know that the far-right likes to pour eye-popping sums of money into Wisconsin elections. Less than a year ago, Elon Musk spent millions to try to sway our voters.
We have to be prepared for any tactics Republicans use to prevent a Democratic trifecta. Border Patrol Commander Greg Bovino **[set the record straight on CNN, debunking Dana Bash's claims](https://substack.com/redirect/ac08e80f-a2ed-4bfe-8e8d-41005d6e070d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that there was "no evidence" that Alex Pretti intended to attack law enforcement while armed before being shot by CBP agents.
"He injected himself where he did not need to be,... Don't socially engineer the topic Dana!" Bovino fired back at Bash.
## [Watch the clash here: ](https://substack.com/redirect/ac08e80f-a2ed-4bfe-8e8d-41005d6e070d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/ac08e80f-a2ed-4bfe-8e8d-41005d6e070d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/ac08e80f-a2ed-4bfe-8e8d-41005d6e070d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
