**[Together with Natural Health Response](https://substack.com/redirect/7020b52b-5f65-446c-b5a1-7a35d5a271d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Tucker Carlson: RFK Jr being BLACKMAILED by Deep State?](https://substack.com/redirect/7020b52b-5f65-446c-b5a1-7a35d5a271d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7020b52b-5f65-446c-b5a1-7a35d5a271d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Dear Reader,
Do Democrats have _**NO SHAME?**_
First they called RFK Jr a "conspiracy theorist"... Then they filed **FAKE** articles of impeachment...
Now liberal journalists have launched a phony RFK Jr affair scandal.
Even Tucker Carlson has called it a _**deep state HIT JOB to "destroy Trump by destroying Bobby."**_
It's all part of a left-wing conspiracy to _**STOP**_ Kennedy from revealing **[Big Pharma's biggest secret](https://substack.com/redirect/7020b52b-5f65-446c-b5a1-7a35d5a271d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**...
Hundreds-of-billions in ill-gotten profits and political donations are at stake... So Dems will stop at nothing to keep you from hearing **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/7020b52b-5f65-446c-b5a1-7a35d5a271d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
[Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/7020b52b-5f65-446c-b5a1-7a35d5a271d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
P.S. Even for Democrats this is a new low. But they'll sink even deeper if it means you never get to see **[THIS](https://substack.com/redirect/7020b52b-5f65-446c-b5a1-7a35d5a271d3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**.
* * *
# **Antifa militant calls for "armed men in the streets" to confront ICE in social media rants**
Kyle Wagner, a self-described "Antifa" member in Minneapolis who calls himself a "master-hate-baiter," made a series of Instagram videos **[calling for"armed" men to get their "boots on the ground" to stop immigration officials](https://substack.com/redirect/7e5433f6-a8a7-4e71-a8ab-9b964eb7de5b?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, whom he calls "mass murderers" and "fascist occupiers," saying "I need boots on the ground and I need them prepared to do what needs to be done so that this does not cost more innocent lives."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/95fadc9e-7cbc-4ba6-a391-a0128c1b1c96?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* **Wagner acknowledges he can 't legally own gun, urges others to "show up":** Wagner acknowledged in a separate video that he cannot legally possess a firearm and encouraged those who have guns to "show up," telling immigration officials "You are killing people in the streets for waving cameras in your faces and calling you little b----es like you are. So, gloves off then, right?" while The Daily Caller reported Wagner declared there's "actual guerrilla war in our streets" in a video taken off Instagram.
* **Former GOP chair blames "wannabe influencers" for escalating tensions:** Shawn Holster, former chair of the Minneapolis GOP, told Fox News Digital that Wagner's call to action shows "wannabe influencers" need to get out of Minneapolis, saying "You get rid of the influencers or the so-called influencers. 80% of the tensions in Minneapolis go away. They're the ones exacerbating this."
* **Comments follow two anti-ICE protester deaths this month:** The call to action came after two anti-ICE agitators--Renee Nicole Good and Alex Pretti--were killed by federal immigration agents this month, with Pretti shot and killed Saturday while recording federal officers on a Minneapolis street, as federal officials initially said he approached with a 9mm handgun and resisted disarmament, though eyewitness accounts and bystander video raise questions about the government's version, prompting President Trump to confirm Sunday his administration is "reviewing everything" regarding the shooting.

* * *
# **Minnesota AG Ellison argued against guns at "political rallies and protests"**
In 2024, Minnesota Attorney General Keith Ellison was among 17 AGs who contended there **[is no right to carry a gun at "political rallies and protests"](https://substack.com/redirect/aed553a4-0615-4b5c-ad12-ba904b897def?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** in a January 26, 2024, filing supporting California's gun controls for "sensitive places" in a Ninth Circuit case, arguing states need "the power to institute such restrictions" to "effectively prevent gun violence in crowded places."
* * *
# **Border Patrol chief and some agents ordered out of Minneapolis**
US Border Patrol's chief Greg Bovino and some agents **[have been ordered out of Minneapolis in a stunning turnaround](https://substack.com/redirect/fa372b6b-ff4a-4e17-9293-185c14da19fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** after a second US citizen was killed by federal agents this month, with Bovino--who has been criticized for his no-holds-barred approach to immigration enforcement--set to join the agents "imminently" marching out of the state, though the order does not extend to ICE or include all Border Patrol agents.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fa372b6b-ff4a-4e17-9293-185c14da19fa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Two Americans killed in Minneapolis this month spark chaos:** Chaos has reigned in Minneapolis since Jan. 7 when anti-ICE protester Renee Good, 37, was shot dead by an ICE agent after she accelerated her SUV at him, followed by the Saturday shooting of armed ICU nurse Alex Pretti, 37, who was carrying a pistol when he put himself between a protester and ICE agents before being tackled, disarmed, and shot dead in the scuffle, with authorities believing an errant shot from his pistol may have caused agents to open fire.
* **Trump dials back rhetoric after call with Gov. Walz:** Tensions reached a fever pitch after Pretti's death--with even some Republicans publicly suggesting DHS withdraw its agents--while Bovino spent the weekend calling Pretti a "domestic terrorist" planning to "massacre" officers and blaming Democrats for "inciting" chaos, but President Trump dialed back that rhetoric Monday, saying he and Gov. Tim Walz had "a very good call" and "seemed to be on a similar wavelength."

* * *

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Defund ICE. Prosecute ICE. Impeach Kristi Noem.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
Pathetic, untrained, and unprofessional cowards

| |
---
Friend, I did not mince my words this weekend: ICE is a group of pathetic, untrained, and unprofessional cowards. They not only need to be defunded, but they need to be prosecuted. They committed their second __**murder**__ of ICU Nurse Alex Pretti in Minneapolis this past weekend. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124090762/597520396/1650203502?refcode=260122_sm_green&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMGJiZmZmYi0wOGZiLWYwMTEtOGQ0Yy0wMDIyNDgyZDI3OWIiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1ZEz0hqnFaK6I063paQglQCRKlTzpY-LZ_Vm2Sk_zcc=&emci=78d483f5-08fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&emdi=c0bbfffb-08fb-f011-8d4c-0022482d279b&ceid=194769) It is time to defund, prosecute, and impeach. That's what I'm asking you to sign on to today, friend. **FIRST: Stop funding DHS**. I have already introduced the Healthcare Reinvestment Act to take $75B Trump pushed into ICE and reallocate it to Affordable Care Act subsidies. Families need health care, not violent, unaccountable federal agents murdering American citizens in their neighborhoods. **SECOND: Prosecute ICE.** I authored the NOEM Act at the end of 2025, before the two murders in Minneapolis. It allows victims of constitutional violations to sue federal immigration officers who violate their constitutional rights. **THIRD: Impeach Kristi Noem and get rid of Stephen Miller.** I’m cosponsoring Articles of Impeachment against Secretary Noem, and it's time we force the Trump Administration to get rid of the racist domestic terrorist Stephen Miller. From obstruction of justice, violation of public trust, and self-dealing, their reign of terror as heads of an American Gestapo-style agency must end. Leadership that undermines oversight and shields abuse cannot remain in power. clean_body: Pathetic, untrained, and unprofessional cowards | | Friend, I did not mince my words this weekend: ICE is a group of pathetic, untrained, and unprofessional cowards. They not only need to be defunded, but they need to be prosecuted. They committed their second murder of ICU Nurse Alex Pretti in Minneapolis this past weekend. It is time to defund, prosecute, and impeach. That's what I'm asking you to sign on to today, friend. FIRST: Stop funding DHS. I have already introduced the Healthcare Reinvestment Act to take $75B Trump pushed into ICE and reallocate it to Affordable Care Act subsidies. Families need health care, not violent, unaccountable federal agents murdering American citizens in their neighborhoods. SECOND: Prosecute ICE. I authored the NOEM Act at the end of 2025, before the two murders in Minneapolis. It allows victims of constitutional violations to sue federal immigration officers who violate their constitutional rights. THIRD: Impeach Kristi Noem and get rid of Stephen Miller. I’m cosponsoring Articles of Impeachment against Secretary Noem, and it's time we force the Trump Administration to get rid of the racist domestic terrorist Stephen Miller. From obstruction of justice, violation of public trust, and self-dealing, their reign of terror as heads of an American Gestapo-style agency must end. Leadership that undermines oversight and shields abuse cannot remain in power. This administration is the most morally and financially corrupt administration in American history, and we must act now to stop its heinous acts and behavior. | Thank you for standing with me, and Americans everywhere who are prepared to stand for our shared values. — Seth Moulton | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. clean_body: It’s nice to meet you. | | = Hi Peter, My name is Mana, and I’m thrilled to introduce myself today as Josh Harder’s new campaign manager! It’s nice to meet you. I want to share a bit about who I am and why I’m so fired up to lead this team.** = = I grew up in Josh’s district and started organizing in Stockton, CA when I was just 16 years old. Over the last nine years, I’ve worked on dozens of campaigns across the country, and bringing that experience back home is a true full-circle moment for me. As a Stockton native, I’ve seen firsthand the impact Josh has on our community — fighting to bring more doctors to our hospitals, protecting our Delta, and proving to our toss-up district that Democrats can actually get things done. On the national stage, Josh is a relentless fighter. He’s one of the most outspoken voices standing up to Donald Trump, fighting to protect abortion rights, and sponsoring new legislation to root out corruption in D.C. I also know that our district is on the front line. Republicans are spending millions to attack Democrats like Josh and stay in power. We must protect this seat if we want to take back the House. If there’s one thing I’ve learned, it’s that people are our greatest asset. Josh doesn't take a dime of corporate PAC money, which means we rely entirely on grassroots supporters like you to fund the organizing that wins elections. = If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- = | = ---|--- Thank you so much! I look forward to hitting the ground running with you. — Mana

It’s President Trump.
I was just in the Oval Office reviewing the MAGA Hall of Fame inductees, and I DIDN’T see your name.
I don’t know what happened.
_**Maybe it’s a glitch... maybe an error...**_

_**Or maybe, and I HOPE this isn’t true, you recently left MAGA and became a Democrat.**_

**_[Whatever happened, you’re SPECIAL, so I’m giving you a FEW EXTRA HOURS to ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP into the MAGA Hall of Fame. ACCEPT HERE.>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e160940/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtbWFnYS1oYWxsLW9mLWZhbWUtdjItc2I/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjY/LbmNsM0VLdU41OA/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIyMzQ3X2Z0ZDE/gaXfwOw/s4h9dd36888)_**

# **WHY?**

Because America is at a CROSSROADS.
I’ve seen your name on my list through THICK and THIN.

**THREE** impeachment hoaxes... **FOUR FAKE** witch-hunts...

And _**YOU **_never left my side.
Patriots like you held the line when the ENTIRE WORLD was against us.
**_[And right NOW, your country needs you again. STAND WITH TRUMP HERE.>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e160940/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtbWFnYS1oYWxsLW9mLWZhbWUtdjItc2I/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjY/LbmNsM0VLdU41OA/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIyMzQ3X2Z0ZDE/gaXfwOw/s4h9dd36888)_**
The Radical Left just launched ANOTHER hoax against me and are claiming they will impeach me by next week.

**__Their goal is simple:__**

## _DESTROY MAGA & PREVENT US FROM MAKING AMERICA GREAT AGAIN!_

They HATE everything we have accomplished and ENVY just how great the MAGA movement truly is.
I’m fighting like hell to save our country, and having you beside me EVERY step of the way means the WORLD.

That’s why I reached out. _**[TEXT TRUMP HERE.>](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e160940/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtbWFnYS1oYWxsLW9mLWZhbWUtdjItc2I/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjY/LbmNsM0VLdU41OA/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIyMzQ3X2Z0ZDE/gaXfwOw/s4h9dd36888)**_

**Because I can’t**** _STAND THE THOUGHT_****of your name missing from the MAGA Hall of Fame!**
_You’re too important._

_Too loyal._

_And simply, too special to lose now._

[RENEW YOUR STANDING IN THE MAGA HALL OF FAME](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e160940/VaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUud2lucmVkLmNvbS90cnVtcC1uYXRpb25hbC1jb21taXR0ZWUtamZjL2xwLXByc3AtZW1haWwtbWFnYS1oYWxsLW9mLWZhbWUtdjItc2I/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNjAxMjY/LbmNsM0VLdU41OA/qP3V0bV90ZXJtPTIyMzQ3X2Z0ZDE/gaXfwOw/s4h9dd36888)

name: Ilhan Omar for Congress
subject: We have to face this crisis head on.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N)
On Friday, Minneapolis came together for a massive protest against the ICE occupation and the murder of Renee Good:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/4815?t=2&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N)
Tens of thousands of people came together to reject the Trump administration’s brutality and stand in solidarity with their neighbors. Unions and workplaces organized to stage a huge walkout and economic boycott. 100 faith leaders blocked a key road in an act of peaceful civil disobedience. Kids in schools even staged organized protests. All of Minneapolis wants ICE to go.
**The immigration agents occupying our city responded to these protests by murdering Alex Pretti.**
When Renee Good was murdered and the administration immediately rushed to defend the killing and shield Jonathan Ross from accountability, they sent a very clear signal to the officers carrying out their immigration agenda: You have a license to kill with the President’s protection.
It was only a matter of time until this happened again. Because the goal for Trump, JD Vance, Stephen Miller, Kristi Noem, and the entire corrupt administration is to unleash ICE’s violence on Minnesota and hold hostage a state that did not vote for them and continues to stand up to them.
Just look at how they are trying to meddle in Minnesota’s elections:
[](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan26.B2OwkJ&refcode=em260126-2-180&t=3&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N)
This is a blatant attempt to undermine Minnesota’s democratic system under the threat of more violence from immigration enforcement.
That’s why Ilhan Omar voted against funding DHS and ICE and is leading the fight to block the funding package, impeach Kristi Noem, and abolish ICE for good.
In the meantime – Keep protesting, documenting, organizing, and showing up for your neighbors. We have to face this crisis head on.
In solidarity,
Team Ilhan

* * *

If you want to support Ilhan Omar as she stands up to ICE and Trump’s corrupt administration, [**chip in to her campaign today.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan26.B2OwkJ&refcode=em260126-2-180&t=4&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N) We are in a historic fight for our civil rights, and we are going to do everything we can to win justice, accountability, and an end to ICE’s reign of terror:
**[CHIP IN HERE](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-jan26.B2OwkJ&refcode=em260126-2-180&t=5&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N)**

PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can **[unsubscribe here](https://act.ilhanomar.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?source=em-footer&t=6&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N)**. You can also **[sign up to receive fewer emails](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=7&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N)**.
Submit this form to [**update your contact information**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/signup/update-contact-info/source=em-footer?t=8&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N)
Ilhan is counting on our people-powered grassroots movement to fund this campaign. If you can, stand with us by **[making a contribution today](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/io-em-footer/?refcode=em-footer&t=9&refcode2=2047_791427_67Ou0N&akid=2047%2E791427%2E67Ou0N)**.

Washington D.C., 20033

name: Katie Porter
subject: My son’s heartbreaking question
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
He was just a teenager already worrying that he wouldn’t be able to afford to live where he grew up.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=40757%2E3422442%2E3H5Qg4)
Peter,
A few years ago, my son Paul broke my heart with a question.
He asked, “Mom, will you come visit me when I grow up and live outside of California?”
“Why would you want to live somewhere else?” I asked.
It wasn’t that there’s somewhere else he’d rather be. **He was just a teenager already worrying that he wouldn’t be able to afford to live where he grew up.**
He’s right to be worried. California is in the middle of a cost-of-living crisis. Housing has become too expensive and homeownership is often out of reach—not to mention all the other ways families are getting nickel and dimed.
That’s why I’m running for governor.
As governor, I’ll make sure California is a state everyone can afford to live and thrive in, from young families to retirees. I’ll put everyday Californians first.
But I can’t do that if we lose this campaign. Right now, two MAGA Republicans are leading in the race, and a new poll shows that I’m the only Democrat who can beat them.
**[If you’re ready to support my campaign, can you chip in $5 today? Your donation will help us get our message out across California and make life more affordable for families like mine—and yours.](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260126_1_ak.ZveqsW&refcode=em20260126-40757&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=40757%2E3422442%2E3H5Qg4)**
[Donate ›››](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21531?c0=em_ms_kp_20260126_1_ak.ZveqsW&refcode=em20260126-40757&t=22&akid=40757%2E3422442%2E3H5Qg4)
Thank you,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20260126-40757&amounts=&t=23&refcode2=40757_3422442_3H5Qg4&akid=40757%2E3422442%2E3H5Qg4)**

name: Steve Simon
subject: I will not hand over your data

This was not the first time the Department of Justice has tried to pressure my office to turn over this data. We have repeatedly explained, in detail, how Minnesota securely manages voter registration files. We have even offered to share voter data that is already public.
The DOJ refused.

Thirty-one states have now said no to similar demands. Courts have already dismissed the DOJ’s claims in multiple cases.

It's hard to tell what's in the heart of another human being, but sometimes we do get a chance to see deep inside. This can be a great opportunity to see wondrous things like, kindness, love, friendship, and many other positive attributes of our fellow man. However, it can also be a moment in time to see despicable people whose only motivation in this life is selfishness and egotism.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack.com/redirect/2/eyJlIjoiaHR0cHM6Ly9oZWFydGxhbmRqb3VybmFsLnN1YnN0YWNrLmNvbS9zdWJzY3JpYmU_.xOGSi5yIBoySuj_10vB6PhvXGZoLnJRHa8iZvbnqoC4?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=185887435)
As the jury in the Jussie Smollett case provided guilty verdicts in every count except one, the once famous actor will now be infamous for another reason. Jussie's claim to fame at this point will be reserved for his appalling conduct and attempt to undermine civility in his own community. Any good he might have possibly done given his entitled circumstances, have been wiped away in one incredibly self-serving moment.
During a tumultuous time in our history, Jussie thought perhaps he should enter the fray and pour gasoline on a smoldering fire. It's hard to fathom what went through his head at the time, as he planned, plotted and executed a staged hate crime in Chicago, Illinois. The idea of hiring people within his circle to stage a racist and homophobic assault, on not just himself, but on civility in the community that had embraced him; makes his behavior especially offensive.
Even after being caught and confronted with the evidence that this fake hate crime never occurred, Jussie decided to double-down with his fabrications. Taking to the airwaves and news channels, spinning his same maniacal tale. At no time did this young man ever show remorse or shame. As a matter of fact, Jussie threatened to sue the city of Chicago and the police department in hopes of suppressing further inquiries.
The now disgraced actor stood outside the courthouse after his conviction and proclaimed, "I've been truthful and consistent on every single level since day one." "This has been an incredibly difficult time, honestly one of the worst of my entire life." His lack of remorse gives some dark insight into this narcissistic and disturbed individual.
I give tons of credit to then Chicago Mayor Rahm Emmanuel (D) for having the courage to demand a special investigator, after the George Soro's funded Cook County State's Attorney Kim Foxx attempted to dismiss all the charges against Smollett in a brazen attempt to subvert justice. I'm quite sure she will be rewarded with a cabinet appointment in the Biden administration.
The next question we all need to ask, is how many cases went without intervention while police chased Jussie's fake tale? How many people were victimized in the already violent city because police were utilizing precious resources to chase a fictitious villain? Chicago is no stranger to violence, and in many cases leads the United States in too many categories to recite. Yet, Jussie Smollett sought to add to the division in our society by further dividing racial lines.
I don't expect the fake news media to give too much coverage to Smollett; they would prefer he just go away at this point; it doesn't fit the woke mantra they continue to peddle. They sucked up the "MAGA hat-wearing Trump supporters at 2 AM" story like a brand-new Hoover deluxe vacuum. Egg on their faces is an everyday occurrence at this point, but that's not news to anyone.
A lengthy jail sentence is appropriate for the atrocious conduct committed by the disgraced Empire star. Mercy is for the repentant, not the repugnant.

name: JamesTalarico.com
subject: James fought for his life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Talarico for Texas
body:
#
Peter — We just released our second TV ad.
This one is personal to James, so we wanted you to see it.
It’s about how a near-death experience fueled his fight with Big Pharma in Texas. **[Take 30 seconds to watch it, and if you want to help us make sure more voters hear this story, chip in whatever you can to keep it on the air.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/678?c0=jt-em-second-ad.bpadhy&refcode=em260126-1-ak&t=1&akid=407%2E1347274%2EHkZTMz)**
[](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/678?c0=jt-em-second-ad.bpadhy&refcode=em260126-1-ak&t=2&akid=407%2E1347274%2EHkZTMz)
Texans deserve a fighter in the U.S. Senate who will deliver real results. We deserve somebody willing to take on the billionaire mega-donors and corporate interests who are rigging the system against us.
That’s been James’ promise since day one of this campaign — to go to the U.S. Senate, flip over the tables of injustice, and upend this broken status quo.
It’s why James is proud to be the only candidate in this race who has always rejected corporate PAC money.
This movement is fueled by people like you. And taking on this broken system has put a target on our backs — so James needs your help to fight back.
**Texas is a big state, and it’s expensive to reach the millions of voters we will need to win this race.[We stretched our budget by going on the air early, so your contribution today would go a long way toward winning this primary in 5 weeks.](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-second-ad.-v11ri&refcode=em260126-1-ak&t=3&akid=407%2E1347274%2EHkZTMz)**
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.jamestalarico.com/go/512?c0=jt-em-second-ad.-v11ri&refcode=em260126-1-ak&t=4&akid=407%2E1347274%2EHkZTMz)
Thank you!
Team Talarico

Austin, TX 78761

name: Redistricting Action
subject: The latest on redistricting in Missouri
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Help voters fight back against extreme gerrymanders in Missouri and nationwide.
|
---

Peter,
When the Missouri state legislature passed an extremely gerrymandered congressional map last year, many lawmakers believed it was a done deal — they’d just successfully helped D.C. politicians with a power grab by weakening the voting rights of communities of color.
**The people of Missouri said not so fast. **
**More than 300,000 voters signed petitions to force a statewide vote on this gerrymander. **
**Now, map manipulators are going out of their way to fight it. **
[**Redistricting Action has a clear-cut mission this year: refuse to let map manipulators silence the will of the people. Our monthly budget deadline is coming up fast — can you make a donation before the month ends to support grassroots organizing in Missouri and wherever democracy comes under attack?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124091475/597522893/742152064?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_MOBallotInitiative_email_20260126-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallotInitiative_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260126-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallotInitiative_&utm_campaign=MOBallotInitiative&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlNDc5NGMwLTBhZmItZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G1jGnE6OIQ0a1p-zQ26sc2qStgCp9g9nOHSp7ATKosE=)
Here’s the latest attempt to undermine democracy: Missouri’s secretary of state recently admitted to writing the summary for the voter-led ballot initiative in a way that was likely to bias them. This rejected language framed the new map passed last year as a replacement for “Missouri’s existing gerrymander”. This comes on the heels of the secretary of state arbitrarily refusing to count legally collected signatures on the initiative.
The anti-democracy movement in Missouri knows what they’re doing is unpopular. They know they need to sow confusion and bend the rules to win.
**The rejection of this extreme gerrymander in Missouri will be a massive victory for the fair maps movement.[Donate today to help empower the voters fighting back against our national redistricting crisis everywhere, and make sure the will of the people prevails this fall.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124091476/597522894/742152064?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_MOBallotInitiative_email_20260126-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallotInitiative_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20260126-AOTL-Tier1-MOBallotInitiative_&utm_campaign=MOBallotInitiative&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImJlNDc5NGMwLTBhZmItZjAxMS04ZDRjLTAwMjI0ODJkMjc5YiIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G1jGnE6OIQ0a1p-zQ26sc2qStgCp9g9nOHSp7ATKosE=)**

name: Pennsylvania Working Families Party
subject: Tell John Fetterman to Vote NO on ICE Funding
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party
body:
| | | Peter Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and Customs and Border Protection (CBP) agents are unleashing violence in our communities. On Saturday, another person who was defending their neighbors was murdered by federal agents in the streets. We have to stop this violence and overreach. And this week, the U.S. Senate has the power to do just that. [**CALL JOHN FETTERMAN’S OFFICE & TELL HIM TO VOTE NO ON ICE FUNDING.**](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.55EI9bPAezqXustgu-wQviZl1HNlkLxrGELsKKD28cPNlmhfytsFG3jGWAG4lB_usLCbIUKTeVNmMFnq3KxPhEzuvVgcuBGawStDZaQIw0Kkv_u6XHCNHX8eF_rSE49xm5D2P_pYa02U-3TpUeC5M7f0b4546m2o3TNTjtNluRBREvJ79C58zs_vVIUo4A-GhvJ4X05KodUOaE-ZfEeE5jVRYADU5iQFQdquEoumu0vsH-YugmMCFZorwzqLnXZZmeNQ99WNJfwfkKp66fyKicBbhszlj63YSb0xek6rEVGHnzvNQpkYLHBNBtp_Uf9Q/4nm/m2c-vL-0Rzq9qEQwP5Regg/h0/h001.hKNEBROTTPX30hBBPN1OA1BB_cmzfaCYScUO6-5VoTo) **[Make the call »](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtRZ8_wJ0Vaz40rlUJGNzmJUJjqr9h59wpwQDU0AFXQnHGpTwZ8sIHmR3B98H23fhUOv303V23JfA8_9q7QWsDDpXohbTkNN24wksi9ORx48tiNmtl242Md73jDxRRErIrWdFismLOMuU91TKAi6qBBpH0gwvDn90fqJUeKEYsZOWYR-6eq8Mx34HGSSobukcfZUME39Dy_o8YDqvC6Lxkn40qvQXDc0pAJQgT3PttkFasUlskXzWswvt8smdj6nqCIMGTUofsD-qHkxfbe1xFur0w15-D1uQN54noVl9Nnu0bUtJI9T0Kb6TXAbSeYDv0_IQEfNvHCIj9v84w4k-RdSB0L7iIt18kZbGUwiRYuFqT4-5LVp6b-V-At3iGflPPw/4nm/m2c-vL-0Rzq9qEQwP5Regg/h1/h001.l6BI8M1SqLQ523iwyZL2t46GgivltuFdBEDpaeUjI4g)** Due to the outrageous actions by federal forces, and the brave response by protestors to the occupation in Minneapolis, Minority Leader Chuck Schumer has promised that the Democrats will vote NO in order to strip the DHS funding from the budget. **But our Senator, John Fetterman, has not yet committed to voting the right way on the funding.** He must also vote NO on Tuesday in order to block cloture on the funding bill and remove the funding for DHS. Congress cannot give DHS more money without meaningful oversight over the agency terrorizing communities. Across Pennsylvania, tomorrow, Tuesday January 27th, we’re showing up at Fetterman’s offices to push him to vote NO on this bill. **PHILADELPHIA** _11:00am_ City Hall, North East Corner March to Fetterman’s office **PITTSBURGH** _****12:00pm_ 1000 Liberty Avenue Pittsburgh, PA 15222 ******WILKES-BARRE** _2:00pm_ 7 North Wilkes-Barre Boulevard Wilkes-Barre, PA 18702 **HARRISBURG** _2:00pm_ 320 Market Street Harrisburg, PA 17101 Stand with us to tell John Fetterman to vote NO on this disastrous bill. In solidarity, Pennsylvania Working Families Party [](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMctRoxlFO9O82fTB5zU1O8Ec90bsLdPJ-5icStcy7QL7_zOi9TjmgOGaD7CkvNRbZmplFFj0sFiBSz6jPDJ2cIlVxbwGt0NK46ilGulZWqN4Z4GhBeJ34d_ea1lMK4jDnznzjcgWPtSkMy1ZuTfoszHYO2ARpm97Ej6Tq6cnss-IbjCvlOU3UhjhD-x3Tm99vPP3HykJMs8LMl3pGzgUoSHjHuRG8WfQiFxP-TCjIU56z_oJMkAc-saMH1UkyBMt5oT-xK2UPbhBz8fDdmul1YC6GURBZsG4UgNV2RqbW1Qj-1iqmWC3F16ytPn6-9pfGZYhdHASpITZeMlnR_o3Yvs/4nm/m2c-vL-0Rzq9qEQwP5Regg/h2/h001.fSL6vKYvUYQI-0n5KGsCfnXLEsA-dtiznOlNsg8M554)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.SEgofQhSb9pGg8bz5XQG3bJqGAdAKVLMQA-bvNV7jQqQP70btnzd1-uGYzJzdq53Kac6ZOBg0FF2S9mNStidKkRVJrO1AuSaxhgtVdFN_aV7lsvaM7EQWOnabr8RT5NvmpDWFFdI4fWX6XWwVxRB2o_-swY92SBOiDWuSqY2m3_e677uJBwRwu3qYU7oJz4AFsWOCNKY0DaB1a5I_FwnxbJMRZ-l22q5rwEoqGYPphD70Wx65KwCQRhM2T0cOeJVUv9TsQbfMX1oslwkqEOMDrzT52fL4uztWN-FxzGaagMNIvEptYsdtyS0iAQ6F1RjcqyCgQ2r6YjEABzJlE3I3A/4nm/m2c-vL-0Rzq9qEQwP5Regg/h3/h001.mipbjP4s5t4fNkg6fMdtKnqnR8CpLO2O89JCtO1Y7So)[](https://an.workingfamilies.org/ss/c/u001.XaF8mXqsA6b2dSPmhsleMWn3R7U15hZOprFI75oZg47r0qlfETlonifpGUkk9zJW-1tF2LkPsVWOXujQgBXPjrPVZ99qQ_BSctbcUOEjsqAJmXtGAjChF9b6FX0RJQUQtA4hS30vnWKjNI6BLP7rpuY73CanEY7wZeIuNfgllmNVjnoL6QADM56L1zTJewzxsC1j9xwQgE3DS5tC0YF7ERjGJgBH5dXv1-0oCyBftmvyktxzlkc927DQM-rSDwF4PNbBZ6ztyusvCUya08ICasIkagskOg5UcTdQ6PqRM86jqcLnT8KiVlRwpPJtdxO-12v81avTIg2ZdlihaWoDgQ/4nm/m2c-vL-0Rzq9qEQwP5Regg/h4/h001.kQVG_5qkQrIWm8Dcc2ZMScp_Zq_FAJZd9oLThcRMiec) **Become a Working Families Party Member!** Other political groups have corporate donors. clean_body: | | | Peter Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) and Customs and Border Protection (CBP) agents are unleashing violence in our communities. On Saturday, another person who was defending their neighbors was murdered by federal agents in the streets. We have to stop this violence and overreach. And this week, the U.S. Senate has the power to do just that. Due to the outrageous actions by federal forces, and the brave response by protestors to the occupation in Minneapolis, Minority Leader Chuck Schumer has promised that the Democrats will vote NO in order to strip the DHS funding from the budget. But our Senator, John Fetterman, has not yet committed to voting the right way on the funding. He must also vote NO on Tuesday in order to block cloture on the funding bill and remove the funding for DHS. Congress cannot give DHS more money without meaningful oversight over the agency terrorizing communities. Across Pennsylvania, tomorrow, Tuesday January 27th, we’re showing up at Fetterman’s offices to push him to vote NO on this bill. PHILADELPHIA 11:00am City Hall, North East Corner March to Fetterman’s office PITTSBURGH **12:00pm 1000 Liberty Avenue Pittsburgh, PA 15222 **WILKES-BARRE 2:00pm 7 North Wilkes-Barre Boulevard Wilkes-Barre, PA 18702 HARRISBURG 2:00pm 320 Market Street Harrisburg, PA 17101 Stand with us to tell John Fetterman to vote NO on this disastrous bill. In solidarity, Pennsylvania Working Families Party Become a Working Families Party Member! Other political groups have corporate donors. We have you. . Paid for by Pennsylvania Working Families Party | | Sent via . name: Bobby Pulido
subject: ICE has taken another life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bobby Pulido for Texas
body:
This is not what we stand for. Our community is built on family, labor, faith, and hard work.

| _You may be receiving this email because of your support for Democrats in Texas and across the country. Bobby Pulido is a business owner, father of four, award-winning Tejano artist, and lifelong South Texan running for Congress in TX-15, one of the country’s most competitive districts. We need your support to elect Bobby, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/ormCsAhHw0Kbefg4Lr5kNw2?unsubscribedata=8kFLqCtyMTtBCINjq60OiSYHsNSFqdwLibrxpG3OXhChEUQlvuuzgVHS%2F3%2FI3VI06ALcmuSRdLSdZQhonYjxQH188A9pADSkqP1qyexTADWnm9Yt3r%2FRIO9Ij7ZDjIx6P1XSTnGe0QBo5i2z3W%2Fu5F0qk6dzg4jRTM1UkeUymvSDY2DtpXnX6ef6HSt3pRYTZdOf4%2FNANznKbwvEhT63Df4cPmQdPGH1PabOptDAosTv8UlUJHQ9SBVpWgWVeHpL%2FMs0LD5O28cn4wrOoTrj5JiawNoq%2FScP953h0QsI4sGUdizgs1Ku6fUEtxcCSk801qv1TEjET9IhQsDzzvjmWGAT4jRKcE3TQqOvX%2BI6GBgVbTxsxiJwivsMVY5dUDG5oehPFS%2BHQk8iWOaOzcqCttGDWZXAQ7Jf5Q6QDiFUqcc0t5SmUGOYZvhJxxOVDO3Q) here._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/124092020/597524856/-2068234379?refcode=BLU_EM_PULD_2026-01-26_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMjA2OTAiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMTYxMjVkZTUtMGNmYi1mMDExLThkNGMtMDAyMjQ4MmQyNzliIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2d0KASH5k4OsygdugjJAgs_-YVntMDkddURZk4zkyWk=)
---
| Peter,

Another life was taken by ICE this weekend.

This time, it was Alex Pretti, an ICU nurse for our vets. Earlier this month, it was Renee Good, a mom.

These weren’t people posing a threat. They weren’t criminals. They were members of their community.

Now, we’re seeing the same aggressive posture being brought to our communities in South Texas with job site raids, racial profiling, and families living in fear.

This is a direct result of the Trump administration politicizing law enforcement, and that puts people in danger.

This is not what we stand for. Our community is built on family, labor, faith, and hard work. We believe in dignity. We believe in accountability. And we believe that every person, citizen or not, deserves to be treated with humanity and respect.

My loyalty will always be to the people that I serve. It’s why I was against the original DHS funding bill and why I am against giving them more funding.

I will support any effort to make our communities safer. I will demand accountability and say firmly:

**Al Valle se le respeta.**

Con respeto,

Our community is built on family, labor, faith, and hard work. | You may be receiving this email because of your support for Democrats in Texas and across the country. Bobby Pulido is a business owner, father of four, award-winning Tejano artist, and lifelong South Texan running for Congress in TX-15, one of the country’s most competitive districts. We need your support to elect Bobby, but if you’d prefer not to receive emails from our campaign, you can here. = | Peter, Another life was taken by ICE this weekend. This time, it was Alex Pretti, an ICU nurse for our vets. Earlier this month, it was Renee Good, a mom. These weren’t people posing a threat. They weren’t criminals. They were members of their community. Now, we’re seeing the same aggressive posture being brought to our communities in South Texas with job site raids, racial profiling, and families living in fear. This is a direct result of the Trump administration politicizing law enforcement, and that puts people in danger. This is not what we stand for. Our community is built on family, labor, faith, and hard work. We believe in dignity. We believe in accountability. And we believe that every person, citizen or not, deserves to be treated with humanity and respect. My loyalty will always be to the people that I serve. It’s why I was against the original DHS funding bill and why I am against giving them more funding. I will support any effort to make our communities safer. I will demand accountability and say firmly: Al Valle se le respeta. Con respeto, Bobby Pulido | = * | | = Paid for by Bobby Pulido for Texas Bobby Pulido for Texas PO Box 1604 Edinburg, TX 78540 United States | = = If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please

name: Valerie Foushee
subject: Enough is enough
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Foushee for Congress
body:
If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/9_07fM1dnEmqdVR1wv8kcQ2?unsubscribedata=%2B4eSJTxvkpFmEdLU7EvSg%2F3tiefLVG0Z0wJp%2F2nB1WlN%2BeFKunRI1y4W5hvKl%2B%2BsDeJjdAE7kGBNhhB%2BUYBWSC0RYzTtx6jdQD4T2q7aU7DyvFb%2F%2BQhirleJkDvbTWgwHYbYt0KqmZnFmehlr2Id%2BVQQ%2B61QCXBE5SGjK6Mm6VH4v4LKLJK2WeAqs72wFprMdSn2yB3ZMVOyzbLha6epmtEk3CXZ4wRSggIbyy7TZmER8h9tkEtQw%2F1mDD8O8PvzeUbtTcrZUjJW5kqPmcQfvinXXt%2Fw%2Fvn%2BLRwVwvK9zZa3MAYUFW%2F9QvPJHm88B1Uyx1pfYLkNsAbWvcSVaai486JhiHkt06CX61XIbIdIwiK8wP00Dk3DJ34NFbdakIJnQ98eYOXViu1myJAhOHMrqWbDQ%2FIX7ij2qhX9PQJ7xuI%3D)
---
| |
---
Peter,

**I am heartbroken by the events that occurred this past weekend in Minnesota.** I am horrified and disgusted that ICE has been allowed to kill yet another person. My heart is with the victim’s loved ones and the entire Minneapolis community which continues to stand up to Trump and ICE’s tyranny. We’re no strangers to this tyranny here in North Carolina, with ICE conducting “operations” right here in NC-04. Federal immigration officers have been abusing their power and violating people's rights. **ICE puts every single one of us at risk.** Trump is allowing a federal agency to violate rights and take lives, and Congress' continued inaction is complicity. I understand how difficult it is to feel optimistic right now, Peter.With Republicans controlling both the House and the Senate and continuing to enable the President regardless of how illegal or immoral his actions may be, it’s an understandable concern. But I won’t stand by while this Administration terrorizes our communities and allows a federal agency to violate rights and take lives.
* I voted NO on the DHS appropriations bill that includes funding for ICE
* I’ve introduced impeachment legislation for Secretary Kristi Noem
* I've been proud to support legislation that forces transparency upon this rogue agency, and to have voted against further supporting ICE
* I've called on my colleagues in Congress to join me before more lives are lost

The fatal shootings in Minneapolis and other incidents across the country are devastating. This administrations' actions are a profound abuse of power, a violation of civil rights, and a stain on our democracy. Enough is enough. ICE needs to get out of our communities. — Valerie Foushee

| Paid for by Foushee for Congress
---
Valerie Foushee for Congress
PO Box 16446
Chapel Hill, NC 27516
United States
---

name: AOC
subject: Even if you don't see a way
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
It's still worth trying
#
I will always, always believe that it's worth trying, even if you don’t see a way — **because ways emerge**.
I was not supposed to get elected to Congress, by any stretch of the imagination.
**I was insane**.
It’s not just a cute story — I was wiping down a bar and asking people to vote for me. It wasn’t a summer job I had once. I was not supposed to win.
The guy I was running against spent $3 million against me, and I was making $2 in my paycheck once a week because I was working off tips and they take it all out.
**But things happen in America**. This is still a place of possibility.
In solidarity,
Alexandria
[Help us continue the fight with a grassroots contribution today.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20260126.LXvJD5&refcode=em20260126-10656-P_FND_EGR_GRM&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=10656%2E2526796%2EDbqByc)

subject: We can’t stop now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Second Amendment Foundation

body:
| Fight for Reform is dedicated to electing Democrats, transforming our broken campaign finance system, and ending _Citizens United_ state by state. If you would like to get fewer emails, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59469?t=1&akid=23865%2E4449941%2EqsKVOi) If you would like to unsubscribe, [**_click here._**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/59470?t=2&akid=23865%2E4449941%2EqsKVOi) **OFFICIAL FFR DONALD J. TRUMP LEGACY SURVEY** [](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72866?t=3&akid=23865%2E4449941%2EqsKVOi) We’re circulating an Official Donald J. Trump Legacy Survey, and you’ve been selected to participate.

[**You are one of only three Democrats from your area selected to participate, so please, submit your survey before midnight tonight >>**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72866?t=4&akid=23865%2E4449941%2EqsKVOi) | [BEGIN THE SURVEY >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72866?t=5&akid=23865%2E4449941%2EqsKVOi)
---
* * *
_This is an official Fight for Reform survey. All responses will be used to inform our strategy to defeat Trump and his MAGA majorities in Congress._
Donald Trump has officially been back in office for a year.

We knew it would be bad, but we had no idea what was to come...

[From the insane tariffs to out-of-control ICE raids to invading Venezuela to threatening Greenland... it’s **CHAOS** , team.](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72866?t=6&akid=23865%2E4449941%2EqsKVOi)

He’s THREATENING our democracy and TRAMPLING our Constitution!!

We were in UTTER SHOCK to discover that so many Americans STILL approve of Donald Trump and his legacy.

But we need to know what local Democrats like you think, so please, take our [**Official Donald J. Trump Legacy Survey**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72866?t=7&akid=23865%2E4449941%2EqsKVOi) now:
[BEGIN THE SURVEY >>](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/72866?t=8&akid=23865%2E4449941%2EqsKVOi)
---
Thanks for your input, team.

Fight for Reform

name: Roy Cooper
subject: I’m Roy Cooper, and I’m running to be the next Democratic Senator from North Carolina.
body:
Reintroducing myself.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=424%2E124072%2ED3X3iD)
Hi Peter, _I’m Roy Cooper. I'm running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina, the most-likely Senate seat to flip. And together, we’re going to win._ You may know this about me already, but before I ask for your financial support ahead of my January fundraising deadline, I want to take a moment to reintroduce myself and remind you why I’m in this race — and why I’m counting on you to be in it with me. _**[If you don’t need to read more, you can go ahead and donate now.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5030?t=7&akid=424%2E124072%2ED3X3iD)**_ [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5030?t=8&akid=424%2E124072%2ED3X3iD) I’m a proud father and husband. I’m a lifelong North Carolinian. The Carolina Hurricanes’ #1 fan. And I was honored to serve North Carolina as Governor, Attorney General, and a legislator. 🩺 During my time in office, I fought hard to expand Medicaid. It wasn’t easy — it took nearly a decade of advocacy, negotiation, and perseverance — but we got it done. And it brought 700,000 North Carolinians access to the care they need. ♻️ I helped build North Carolina’s clean energy economy, which brought good jobs to our communities while helping protect our environment for future generations. ♀️ Over and over, I used every power at my disposal to try to defend reproductive health care access from the far-right’s cruel, dangerous, anti-freedom abortion bans. Peter, this state is my home. I wanted to serve North Carolina and our communities from right here — I didn’t plan on trying to go to Washington. But when I look at what’s happening in this country today, I know I can’t leave things as they are for my children, or for yours. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I’m fed up with seeing extreme politicians strip away our rights, drive up the cost of living, tear apart our democracy and gut health care and SNAP benefits for folks in need. I’m ready for the fight, and I’m ready to deliver for the people. But I can’t get to Washington without your help. **[We have a $500,000 online fundraising goal to meet this month, and falling behind might give the GOP the momentum they need to surge ahead. Please donate anything you can before our January deadline to close the gap.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5030?t=9&akid=424%2E124072%2ED3X3iD)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $5](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5031?t=10&akid=424%2E124072%2ED3X3iD)

[](https://act.roycooper.com/go/5030?t=16&akid=424%2E124072%2ED3X3iD)

Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

clean_body: Reintroducing myself. | Hi Peter, I’m Roy Cooper. I'm running to be the next U.S. Senator from North Carolina, the most-likely Senate seat to flip. And together, we’re going to win. You may know this about me already, but before I ask for your financial support ahead of my January fundraising deadline, I want to take a moment to reintroduce myself and remind you why I’m in this race — and why I’m counting on you to be in it with me. I’m a proud father and husband. I’m a lifelong North Carolinian. The Carolina Hurricanes’ #1 fan. And I was honored to serve North Carolina as Governor, Attorney General, and a legislator. 🩺 During my time in office, I fought hard to expand Medicaid. It wasn’t easy — it took nearly a decade of advocacy, negotiation, and perseverance — but we got it done. And it brought 700,000 North Carolinians access to the care they need. ♻️ I helped build North Carolina’s clean energy economy, which brought good jobs to our communities while helping protect our environment for future generations. ♀️ Over and over, I used every power at my disposal to try to defend reproductive health care access from the far-right’s cruel, dangerous, anti-freedom abortion bans. Peter, this state is my home. I wanted to serve North Carolina and our communities from right here — I didn’t plan on trying to go to Washington. But when I look at what’s happening in this country today, I know I can’t leave things as they are for my children, or for yours. I’m running for the U.S. Senate because I’m fed up with seeing extreme politicians strip away our rights, drive up the cost of living, tear apart our democracy and gut health care and SNAP benefits for folks in need. I’m ready for the fight, and I’m ready to deliver for the people. But I can’t get to Washington without your help. name: Ro Khanna
subject: Democrats must unite to defend the rule of law against ICE
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
I just arrived in Minneapolis to thank protestors for standing up for our freedoms and to learn more about what’s happening firsthand.
ICE has become a rogue, militarized police force on behalf of the Trump administration. They are coming after all of us—immigrants and American citizens alike—terrorizing our communities through physical assault, kidnapping, and even murder.
Congress has the power to stop this. Democrats must do everything they can to restore and defend the rule of law. That’s why I’m introducing a 10-point resolution to hold ICE accountable and reform immigration enforcement:
✅ Vote no on the DHS funding bill.
✅ Repeal the multi-year $75 billion funding for ICE.
✅ Impeach Noem and Bondi.
✅ End qualified immunity for ICE agents.
✅ Investigate and prosecute every single ICE agent who broke the law.
✅ End the Kavanaugh stops with racial profiling and the militarization of ICE.
✅ Codify a use-of-force standard so courts can enforce the law against rogue ICE agents.
✅ Tear down and replace ICE with an agency that has oversight.
✅ Prohibit masks and mandate body cameras and visible identification for immigration officers.
✅ Establish human rights standards at immigration detention facilities.
ADD YOUR NAME: Support my 10-point plan to address ICE’s abuse of power. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ice-reform-plan-petition?contactdata=VMBk3sK0PB7awsdZ3xy3bnsQALNR+yLwr+mGfmWP8lD/wKeWIxRyf8qvN9D490UyuJIv1HZY1C69PZDSu2ebwdgkMZIkq0oDXfO3miUwAio0OVuxlQ9BT6YYT0nh5hEnNgqPleZ87AA9TuRVOIuuz70YcH/684xbUHjfPc7HGmOE7tQpiW66jHGgjir2MCDp]
SIGN THE PETITION [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/ice-reform-plan-petition?contactdata=VMBk3sK0PB7awsdZ3xy3bnsQALNR+yLwr+mGfmWP8lD/wKeWIxRyf8qvN9D490UyuJIv1HZY1C69PZDSu2ebwdgkMZIkq0oDXfO3miUwAio0OVuxlQ9BT6YYT0nh5hEnNgqPleZ87AA9TuRVOIuuz70YcH/684xbUHjfPc7HGmOE7tQpiW66jHGgjir2MCDp]
The time for talking is over—we need action. Democrats must unite around this plan and stand up to Trump’s lawless administration.
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!
DONATE $3 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20260126-ice-reform-plan&amount=3]
DONATE MORE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/email-footer-donate?refcode=20260126-ice-reform-plan]

Fellow Conservative,

This is one of the worst developments we could imagine...

Chuck Schumer has just secured a star recruit in a CRUCIAL 2026 swing state, and surveys indicate our GOP incumbent is trailing by a SINGLE POINT - in the traditional Republican-leaning state of Alaska.

_**“Democrats Eye Major Gains in Bid to Reclaim Senate Control” -Politico**_

It's a key element of Schumer’s scheme to regain the Senate by attracting elite Democrat challengers who can flood the airwaves with funds to win tight contests in Republican states.

**How is Schumer recruiting top-tier names into Senate races that would ordinarily fly under the radar?**

He’s leveraging fears of additional conservative Supreme Court picks to lure prominent Democrats into launching 2026 Senate bids.

And quite frankly, Fellow Conservative, **[he’s got a very valid argument that I’ll deploy right now to ask you for a few dollars to help us hold the line.

](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ada997c4191d4ba3991638dcf5eff26e&_e=fCu018J_nnpqlmfk8zv92WAJref3XaVbsyzHRIJvq1PAf_3Dx7BlggiOJmbCiJPBEOTpVOnF-QveNMwjyOUlxCBGslShiAfaEYs39FC3C59h2BW-U-DOGLzhMUJUkYnbiF_uMKGH0acus6a1oY7CNuK6IUUGpjxOb0TxrkB2efBhzyIjnf6cPL1hOW4EGxh3HzTTM7gmFDFCXlv_2WI0NKbwUIwGOoR2n1z4X43kGcWum324tH0_77ntt0QXt4bNGJQqEWinSGcwWNH_MTRkMkj4wAX4CnLi66KkymXwAOsEFk-nQjx7q8To4WLv9EkKt7P4D60BV0RBvVWtkOJliYbRER2ymc2HC29ly5hQnqGkd_7hkyP9-QFfF05xIvlBIFBvREAuKwjhq-Q2loLAntBrZX6YSHYh0PPbmVrgF8Uk25Z-hayvu8hWRJKX5BkqIgbkYwJ06-pWP5I4oeox96u86d3_FLmWg4Gvzb2ppI186ImwC2PGVeup8vAqaXa_zPdkNz4_y5Iuy0QYF9xQ7DbuJZFEhUT_DGrEH8UjF2nCQ3LDHLUKwNC0AM3N2F_55jodQ-9Y-nDIuEzu6Ti3MmFYd9FuCTgEsOsKPQjGhXw1gFMo9wBytQy2EvbJVq-uk_qhvgGSYxaN84R8hMdoIi6aq8JTu2Hpr6P6xsXSbQl-BShhJbBWncj-cAstqPo5kvBkLyL22j8bgFLcWKiPdgzqBGOXZAzeFU9Rz0_7x-9xfbQImFyYpuVXBs3LyK7g)** **Without your support, we may well lose our Senate majority, imperiling President Trump’s picks to fill any future vacancies on the Supreme Court.**

[**LET US KNOW YOU SUPPORT OUR MISSION**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=ada997c4191d4ba3991638dcf5eff26e&_e=fCu018J_nnpqlmfk8zv92WAJref3XaVbsyzHRIJvq1PAf_3Dx7BlggiOJmbCiJPBEOTpVOnF-QveNMwjyOUlxCBGslShiAfaEYs39FC3C59h2BW-U-DOGLzhMUJUkYnbiF_uMKGH0acus6a1oY7CNuK6IUUGpjxOb0TxrkB2efBhzyIjnf6cPL1hOW4EGxh3HzTTM7gmFDFCXlv_2WI0NKbwUIwGOoR2n1z4X43kGcWum324tH0_77ntt0QXt4bNGJQqEWinSGcwWNH_MTRkMkuOqhSdXf0uZgko2LoOQ1Dpxnqw7RQEW8ho2n9i2RNDZOABk6K5TLWHu2pH3szv-qoU7EEAhyAWAfqNhyr1zo1OmaguHv2zN9MizQ3jz-iCLFXRw2m9QetH7LRsim3Rq2XbLWswjjAziwSr4fiMcEt6UuRWFvQkRo3SPhF2xGkbRbsX_mrrJ3B8PQ_otquk4WRPRvo6beDm6yEAlO2w7zijRuu6rMh60Pd_E16djFURwat1_lFd9yWbRibgSn5f-s3ImUivTp7ySMTcqFlhmUqK43fu62UXgVqcw30kKp1c1cFh4c8L3UHhcjUPJs0Of0mnqZPDAv_6VcCLPuyke7FoAXKojIL8OQi3H-f-xvCIdUT-SFLORwu-9jxQ8JwsHB6lQE5X0OCAIj4HI700ktHNaKdeaH-K5qePwSlQ6Spuk0bkp56_qeB-JMoyf-xoVXJk1aumf4J2yVTeOnuFUJJyJJS-NCkzLxmNsO7RDEqG)

Schumer is now brimming with optimism, publicly mapping out the exact roadmap for Democrats to SEIZE the Senate come November!

_**CAPTURE MAINE
CAPTURE ALASKA
CAPTURE TEXAS
CAPTURE OHIO
CAPTURE NORTH CAROLINA **_

I don't mean to overstate it, but the fact that Dems have put Alaska on the map has me a bit concerned.

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: Alex Pretti should be alive today
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
This weekend, a Border Patrol agent shot and killed Alex Pretti in Minneapolis. The violence must stop.
#
Peter,
Alex Pretti was a 37-year-old nurse at a VA hospital in Minneapolis. He was upset over what was happening in his city, so he showed up to protest Trump’s immigration crackdown and protect the people in his community.
This weekend, a Border Patrol agent shot and killed him.
**The fact that this has happened again makes me sick. This violence cannot continue.**
Alex was a U.S. citizen. He had no criminal record. He had participated in protests following the killing of Renee Good just weeks earlier. And the Trump administration is already pushing a narrative that does not match reality or video footage – Alex was not brandishing a gun, he was holding a cellphone. And he was not charging at officers, he was helping a woman who they pushed to the ground.
The administration is blatantly lying about the murder of an innocent person to further their own disturbing political agenda, just like they did with Renee.
**In moments like this, our power lies in each other – in our love for each other, our families, and the belief that every single person deserves dignity and humanity. What we’re witnessing now is the opposite: federal agents operating without guardrails, using lethal force to terrorize the communities they claim to protect.**
When officers operate without transparency, people get hurt, families get separated, and trust in government is shattered.
This is exactly why I have been demanding strict guardrails on ICE before we vote to give another dollar to the Department of Homeland Security. We’re calling for a ban on face masks, independent investigations, required body cameras, and _real accountability_.
Alex Pretti cared about people, showing up for his community when they needed him most. And that’s exactly what we must continue to do. I am going to keep demanding answers, fighting for accountability, and pushing to make sure this can never happen again.
In solidarity,
Pramila Jayapal

---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.

name: Team Fetterman
subject: FWD: I need you to weigh in, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
Hi Derek,

We wanted to make sure you saw the note John sent about his 2026 priorities survey.

It's a **big** election year, and preparations for the midterms have already started. Your feedback is crucial to help him focus his work in the Senate and guide our strategy for the months ahead.

Please, take a minute to weigh in now about what matters most to you. You can use this link or the one below to finish your survey now: https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52669?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1001&akid=10559%2E434096%2EmV6cas

Thanks for taking a moment to share your thoughts.

Team Fetterman 💛

- - - - - - - - - Forwarded message - - - - - - - - -

From: John Fetterman
Sent: Sat, Jan 10, 2026
Subject: got a minute?

Hi Derek, it’s John.

Election year has begun, and the midterms will be here before we know it. So I wanna hear straight from you about what matters most in 2026.

If I could sit down at the kitchen table with every family across PA and listen, I would. Since I can’t, this quick survey is the next best thing.

Will you take about a minute to tell me what you want me to focus on?

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52669?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1002&akid=10559%2E434096%2EmV6cas

What you share here will help me and my team map out our game plan for the year ahead – and how we stand up for working families like yours.

https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/52669?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=1003&akid=10559%2E434096%2EmV6cas

Thanks for taking a moment to weigh in. I really do want to hear what you have to say.

John ❤️

--------

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here: null
